Name: BIG BAD WOLF BOOKS [BBW BOOKS]
Description:
The Big Bad Wolf Books was launched in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, in 2009, is the brainchild of BookXcess' founders, Andrew Yap and Jacqueline Ng. The primary mission is to cultivate reading habits, increase English literacy worldwide and build a new generation of readers, by making books more affordable and accessible, to EVERYONE.

Known as the World's Biggest Book Sale, the Sale is a global reading advocacy initiative that aims to encourage people of all ages to discover the joys of reading and inspire them to pursue their dreams and, importantly, empower them with the knowledge to realise them. We believe that the more knowledge that one gain, the better-equipped a person is to meet today’s competitive world's exacting demands.

Since its inception, the Big Bad Wolf Books Sale has evolved tremendously, going global and touring 48 cities in 15 countries, such as Cambodia, Hong Kong, Indonesia, Myanmar, Pakistan, the Philippines, Sri Lanka, South Korea, Singapore, Thailand, Taiwan, and the United Arab Emirates.

Since 2020, the Big Bad Wolf Books' Online Book Sale has been successfully launched in 10 countries, including Malaysia.

• Total Satisfaction Guarantee. With option to moneyback guarantee

Buscalibre.com team strongly believes that countries borders hinder access to great products , that is why our aim is to provide as many products at competitive prices and great shipping times.

Name: Librerie Ubik
Description:
Le librerie Ubik sono una rete di oltre 180 librerie presenti in 18 regioni italiane.

Il nome Ubik deriva dal latino "ubique" (ovunque) ed esprime l’obiettivo dell’azienda: sviluppare una rete di librerie che siano un punto di riferimento di qualità per i lettori su tutto il territorio italiano.

Ubik rappresenta un modello di offerta focalizzato sulle peculiarità dei mestieri del libro: il ruolo del libraio, la sua indipendenza, la volontà di fornire servizio e assortimento, il radicamento sul territorio, la capacità di attrarre comunità di lettori. 

Ubik è il retail in franchising della holding EMMELIBRI - GRUPPO MESSAGGERIE, società che coordina le attività distributive e commerciali nell'ambito librario.

I punti forti del franchising Ubik sono:
-	Il radicamento sul territorio
-	L’identità e l’indipendenza di ogni libreria
-	Un forte orientamento al cliente, con una particolare attenzione al lettore forte
-	La creazione di una comunità di lettori intorno alla libreria attraverso eventi e incontri con gli autori
-	La formazione e l’aggiornamento costante dei librai 
-	Un’architettura digitale a sostegno dell’attività del libraio 
-	L’eccellenza logistica con la reperibilità di oltre 150.000 titoli in 48 ore

Name: Catavento Distribuidora de Livros
Description:
A Catavento foi criada há 59 anos com a missão clara de ser uma organização a serviço do livro.

Uma missão como essa não se restringe apenas ao papel de intermediador entre editoras e livreiros, mas se estende ao compromisso de enxergar em cada editora e autor o valor inestimável que é conceber um livro, e premia-los buscando em cada ponto de venda existente, uma oportunidade, um espaço para leva-lo até o leitor. E por esse compromisso, a essa empresa tem hoje em seu acervo, mais de 500 editoras e uma operação ampla que cobre mais de 1.100 pontos de venda entre livrarias e pontos alternativos.
A Catavento Distribuidora de Livros busca acompanhar as novas realidades mantendo as bases que propiciaram seus mais de 50 anos de existência: seriedade, transparência e a crença no livro como produto e instrumento de transformação do ser humano.

Name: ANDAAL
Description:
ANDAAL – La plateforme littéraire afrodescendante et africaine

Développée par OFTY France, ANDAAL est une application et une marketplace littéraire qui a pour mission de démocratiser l’accès au savoir culturel africain et de valoriser les auteurs afrodescendants et africains contemporains.

Initialement conçue pour faciliter l’achat de livres scolaires au Cameroun, ANDAAL est aujourd’hui une plateforme culturelle complète :
 Un espace de vente et de promotion pour les auteurs et maisons d’édition.
 Une vitrine qui relie l’Afrique, la diaspora et le reste du monde autour de la littérature.
 Une ressource pour les élèves, enseignants et lecteurs passionnés, avec un focus sur le “livre au programme” des deux systèmes éducatifs camerounais (anglophone et francophone).
 Une alternative responsable et spécialisée face aux géants de la distribution, centrée sur l’identité, la mémoire et la résilience.

Notre ambition :
 Offrir une plateforme de référence pour la découverte et la diffusion des littératures africaines et afrodescendantes.
 Rendre visibles les voix oubliées et engagées, au service du dialogue interculturel et du développement durable humain.

 Découvrez notre catalogue sur andaal.shop

Name: LitJoy Crate
Description:
LitJoy Crate is a simple, creative, and easy way to read more and more often! We work with authors and publishers to create collector’s edition books and licensed merchandise. At our core we seek to cultivate connection and joy through stories. The growth that we have experienced over the years we attribute to our focus on creating amazing products that people want to buy.

LitJoy Crate was founded in 2016 by two women who love to read. It remains to this day a 100% female owned business. Our LitJoy employee family includes individuals from varied backgrounds who each thrive in our culture: an environment of creative thinking, communication, extreme ownership, and heart. 

Product and Community

LitJoy believes in helping readers build their personal library with beautiful books. Our book offerings often come with new artwork, signatures from the author, and LitJoy-exclusive content. In addition to books, we work with authors to create licensed merchandise that readers adore. 

LitJoy has worked with over 50 authors to bring their books to life. Some of our most successful partnerships include: 
•	Holly Black, author of The Cruel Prince
•	Cassandra Clare, author of The Mortal Instruments
•	Jay Kristoff, author of Nevernight
•	Sabaa Tahir, author of Ember in the Ashes
•	Laini Taylor, author of Strange the Dreamer
•	Victoria Aveyard, author of Red Queen

Other product offerings include special edition classic books and a quarterly fiction book box subscription called To Bee Read for fantasy and sci-fi readers. We strive for products that are useful and beautiful.

Ours is a community of readers. We embrace our collective enthusiasm for fictional worlds and characters! Readers can connect with us at #LitJoyCrate and @LitJoyCrate.

Name: YouBeDo.com
Description:
YouBeDo stands for: YOU can make a difference, BE the change, DO it now!

Our dream:
We are dreaming of a world that is fair and righteous. At times, this seems impossible to achieve but we are trying to accomplish this dream by creating new flows of money. This money -we like to look at it as 'oxygen'- will end up with charity organisations that work hard to increase the quality of human lives and the stability of our environment.

How we do it?
We create new flows of money by donating 10% of every purchase to charity. Our customers have the freedom to select the cause to which they wish to donate. Its actually very simple.

Books that 'do good':
YouBeDo.com sells the same books and e-books for the same price and with the same terms and conditions as other retailers. Our customers do not pay anything extra and can decide which charity organisation they want to support. Buy a book and give to charity at the same time.

This way we create new flows of money that move into the right direction.

Name: Le Livre Vert
Description:
Le Livre Vert est une entreprise d'insertion par l'activité économique bordelaise, spécialisée dans la deuxième vie du livre, fondée en 2013 par Nicolas Fesquet et Vera DaCunha.

Le Livre Vert collecte, tri, revend, donne et recycle les livres dont les particuliers, entreprises et collectivités n'ont plus l'usage. Cet ensemble d'activité permet de créer des emplois pour les personnes qui en sont éloignées.

La création d’emplois et la question environnementale sont au coeur du projet du LivreVert. L’entreprise est engagée dans une approche territorialisée de son activité, en s’appuyant sur un tissu de partenaires solide et varié (public, privé, associatif), permettant ainsi la mise en place de véritables chaînes de valeur.

LeLivreVert, vend des livres mais également des vinyles, CD, DVD et jeux de société d'occasion avec pour but de favoriser un modèle économique basé  sur le réemploi et sur une consommation plus responsable, plus écologique.

Name: My Fair Book
Description:
My Fair Book est un site prescripteur et responsable de vente en ligne de livres neufs qui s’adresse aux lecteurs curieux et aux entreprises sensibles aux valeurs RSE. 
Parce qu’un livre n’a pas de date de péremption, My Fair Book déniche des pépites dans les stocks des éditeurs sans se soucier de l'actualité littéraire. Dans une logique d’économie circulaire et de réemploi, My Fair Book remet ainsi un coup de projecteur sur des titres afin de prolonger leur visibilité au nom de la bibliodiversité.

Tous les livres sont lus et finement sélectionnés puis remis en avant via une plateforme web éditorialisée ; via des animations en entreprises (cafés littéraires, interventions, bibliothèques d’entreprise personnalisées, pop up…) pour promouvoir la lecture en entreprise et sensibiliser sur le gaspillage dans le secteur de l’édition.

Face à une société de zapping, My Fair Book propose un projet engagé dans l'économie circulaire :
- Faire une pause, revenir sur des titres toujours disponibles et prendre le temps de partager ces découvertes littéraires via un contenu dynamique et thématique
- Vendre plus d’exemplaires par titre et favoriser ainsi les droits d'auteur
- Réduire le pilon

Pour nous suivre via la newsletter : https://urlr.me/8pYVg

Name: THE SIX SIMPLE SECRETS TO BEING A SUCCESSFUL KID: A Unique New Children’s Novel by Michael G. Gordon
Description:
Come discover the highly anticipated new book from Author and Professor Michael G. Gordon — a first-of-its-kind, fully rhyming children’s book, spanning over 15 chapters & 15,000 words, created specifically to teach lessons on life, leadership, empathy, self confidence & more - delivered through a funny, heartwarming, and endearing adventure intended to be read together by Parents to their elementary-aged children.

Envisioned & created by a Top Voice In Leadership Development & 20-Year member of MENSA & illustrated by an Emmy-award winning Artist & Animator whose credits include Rick & Morty, American Dad, SpongeBob, and more - this book was made not only to entertain, but to empower & inspire each reader and make a difference. 

Most importantly, it was purposefully written and designed to help initiate important discussions naturally and organically between parents and their children about the same common but difficult issues or situations experienced throughout the book by main character, little Jeremy Bean - those very same issues most children will undoubtedly encounter in their lives – allowing parents the added chance to share their own wisdom, advice and guidance... and maybe even a few “Simple Secrets” of their own as well!

This innovative new book written by Professor Michael G. Gordon and illustrated by Artist Pat Keegan will be releasing soon! 

Visit the official site below to learn more, pre-order a book or package, schedule a speaking engagement or program, or register for an innovative new soccer-based leadership clinic sponsored by the Six Simple Secrets Team today! 

www.thesixsimplesecrets.com

Name: LoveReading
Description:
Reading books changes lives. Now buying books through the LoveReading online bookstore can change lives, too.

LoveReading, the UK’s leading book recommendation website, has launched an online bookshop with social purpose, in response to the book funding crisis in schools – in a move that’s been praised by the New Children’s Laureate.

Launched 17 years ago, LoveReading and LoveReading4Kids have since become a staple for readers looking for their next book.

Now, they have relaunched, enabling readers the ability to purchase books directly from the site, with 25% of the cover price being donated to a school, delivering better outcomes for the UK’s children. Readers will also receive 10% off the RRP on a huge selection of titles.

Recent research by the Centre for Literacy in Primary Education found that the school funding crisis means that 60% of classrooms have no access to a budget for new books.

Studies also show that reading and writing are key to unlocking a child’s learning potential and allows them to overcome a disadvantaged background.

Offering a socially conscious way to buy books online, LoveReading’s new venture will allow book buyers to actively support their local school. For books ordered and directly allocated to a particular school, the school will receive 25% of the cover price from each sale. When a sale is made and not attributed to a specific school, 10% of the cover price will go into a pot that will then be split between LoveReading’s school members, prioritising a percentage for schools in particular need and supporting pupils in deprived areas.

Go on, buy a book, support a school  and make a difference. 
Because books change lives.

www.lovereading.co.uk 
www.lovereading4kids.co.uk

Welcome to Saving Sammy Adventures!  We're on a mission to revolutionize financial education for kids. Through our captivating books and engaging adventures, we empower young minds to become great savers and smart spenders.

Our approach is all about making finance fun! From interactive stories to exciting games, we're breaking down the complexities of money management in a way that resonates with kids.

Join us in the journey to nurture a generation of financially literate youngsters. Each Saving Sammy Adventure is carefully crafted to instill valuable lessons in budgeting, saving, and making smart financial decisions.

At Saving Sammy Adventures, we believe that the earlier kids start learning about money, the more confident and empowered they become. Our books create a bridge between financial concepts and real-world scenarios, making the learning experience both enjoyable and practical.

Explore our collection on Amazon https://amzn.to/47GQlnR Whether you're a parent, educator, or someone passionate about shaping a financially literate future, we invite you to be a part of the Saving Sammy movement.

Let's make financial literacy a joyful adventure for every child! Follow us for updates, resources, and the latest Saving Sammy releases. Together, we're building a foundation for a financially literate generation. #SavingSammyAdventures #FinancialLiteracyForKids #EmpowerYoungMinds

Name: Nessaire
Description:
Nessaire Magazine is a privately distributed print publication produced in limited editions and delivered by invitation to high-net-worth individuals in Dubai and the Emirates. The magazine operates outside subscription, retail, and mass circulation models, focusing instead on controlled distribution and editorial coherence.

Each edition of Nessaire Magazine is built around a central theme examining power, permanence, movement, and authority in contemporary culture. Content, design, and advertising are developed as a single, integrated object rather than as separate components.

Advertising in Nessaire Magazine follows a partner-based model. Placements are limited per issue, editorially governed, and designed in collaboration with participating brands. There are no standard ad units, automated buys, or frequency-based pricing. All partnerships are reviewed for alignment, relevance, and long-term positioning.

The Dubai Edition is printed in a controlled run of 10,000 copies and distributed directly to high-net-worth decision-makers through private channels. Nessaire Magazine is produced for environments where discretion, continuity, and context matter more than reach.

Advertising enquiries are reviewed prior to response.

Description:
Wij zijn Doorgelezen, een jong en dynamisch bedrijf dat begon als tweedehands boekwinkel. Het idee ontstond in 2021, toen wij – Luuk en Izmarij – op zestienjarige leeftijd besloten onze passie voor boeken om te zetten in een onderneming. Op die leeftijd hadden we uiteraard nog geen rijbewijs, maar dat weerhield ons er niet van om op onze elektrische vouwfietsen door heel Nederland te rijden, op zoek naar tweedehands boeken voor ons magazijn in Zaltbommel.

Inmiddels zijn we flink gegroeid en ligt onze focus nu voornamelijk op de verkoop van nieuwe boeken. Toch blijft tweedehands onze eerste liefde, al vormt dit momenteel een kleiner onderdeel van ons bedrijf. We knappen tweedehands boeken met zorg op, in samenwerking met een praktijkschool in de buurt. Op die manier geven we boeken een tweede leven, zodat ze opnieuw gekoesterd kunnen worden.

Wij geloven dat boeken niet (on)gelezen in een kast horen te blijven staan.

Alle boeken verdienen een bewonderaar!

Met passie voor boeken, oog voor duurzaamheid en een frisse blik blijven we ons elke dag inzetten om elke lezer te inspireren.

Description:

The main store, Square Books, is in a two-story building with a cafe and balcony on the second floor; Off Square Books is a few doors down from the main store and has lifestyle sections such as gardening and cookbooks; Square Books, Jr., the children's bookstore, is in a building on the east side of the square; above it (in the site of the original bookstore) is the more recently opened Rare Square Books, which feature collectible, vintage, first edition books across a broad price range. 
Square Books is known for its strong selection of literary fiction, books on the American South and by Southern writers, a large inventory of reduced-price remainders, and its emphasis on books for children. The store hosts the popular Thacker Mountain radio show and over 150 author events a year.

Name: Galatea Llibres
Description:
GALATEA LLIBRES REUS
Galatea va obrir les seves portes l'any 1987 amb una forta vocació de servei i amb una clara dedicació a la ciutat de Reus. 

Des de llavors, la llibreria s'ha implicat en la vida cultural i associativa de la ciutat. Des del primer moment vam tenir clar que la nostra missió era la de procurar ser un referent cultural com a llibreria i una excel·lència en qualitat de serveis com a empresa, amb l'única finalitat de redundar en la població tot el que des del primer moment aquesta ens va oferir.  

Participem en totes les iniciatives que es duen a terme en el nostre àmbit -el de promoció del llibre i la lectura- a Reus, a la resta de la  comarca i a nivell regional i nacional.  Hem participat i ho continuem fent en tots els projectes que s'han dut a terme des del Gremi i Associacions de Llibreters.  Creiem que la unió de les llibreries independents és la solució de futur de les nostres empreses i estem convençuts que aquestes iniciatives repercutiran positivament en els lectors.

GALATEA LLIBRES CAMBRILS
Galatea Cambrils obre les seves portes l’agost de 2002 amb la mateixa filosofia que Galatea Llibres: oferir el millor servei als seus clients.

A l’encantadora localitat de Cambrils, poble pesquer, conegut per la seva bellesa a tota la comarca, Galatea Cambrils es troba a la plaça del Pòsit, centre neuràlgic de la zona marítima del poble.

Galatea Cambrils es troba oberta tots els dies de la setmana per a seguir, com sempre, a disposició del client, fins i tot quan aquest gaudeix dels seus dies de descans.

Name: Vrindavan Today
Description:
Vrindavan Today is a non-denominational, non-sectarian site dedicated to the uplift and positive development of the Dham.
The goals of Vrindavan Today are:
* to attract readers from all around the world to experience the spiritual, religious and cultural glories of Vrindavan and Braj,
* to build a community of Vrindavan vasis beyond the limits of any one institution or organization,
* to create awareness of the positive work that different individuals and institutions are doing in Braj/Vrindavan,
* to publicize vital issues related to the “bhauma” Vrindavan of today, especially those concerning heritage and environment,
* to become an important source of information about these issues, both past and present,
* and ultimately to engage people actively in ways that will serve the interests of the Dham.
We welcome contributions from English or Hindi-speaking authors (see our Hindi site) and photographers in the nature of relevant news articles (such as temple events, etc.), researched articles related to Vrindavan or its residents, or editorials related to the themes outlined above. Any other volunteers, such as translators, web designers, contributors in cash or in kind, are also invited to lend a hand.

Name: Toroka Books
Description: Toroka Books is an online used-book rental store. Our name, "Toroka", is the Swahili word for escape, and represents the ability for reading books to ignite escapism in us all. While reading is an essential and beautiful avenue to education and joy, there is a huge barrier faced by many readers and that is accessibility and affordability. Our solution provides the means to read physical copies of books without committing to buying them. Not only is this a more sustainable solution, but it affords people access to a whole world that otherwise has huge barriers to entry. We hope to kindle a love of reading in us all by kicking the boulder that blocks accessibility to reading to the side and revolutionise reading habits.

Name: Unreported: A Media Relations Guide To Killing Stories
Description:
When bad news arrives, consider three possible approaches to deal with it:
Screw - Deal with the bad as best you can.
Marry - Transform the bad into something good.
Kill - Make the bad disappear. 

In media relations, the third option—killing a story—is rare. Bad news has a way of clawing its way to the surface, & once it is published, the impact can be devastating.

But there are a series of tactics you can leverage to make that bad news disappear before it hits the headlines. It’s the art of killing a story—a strategy few discuss. It’s a subtle, almost invisible skill set that, when executed well, can save money, prevent pain, & avoid damage. 

The result of killing a story? Nothing.

This book serves as your quick guide to the techniques you can leverage to bury bad news before it even gets a chance to break. Master these tactics & you’ll have the power to keep bad news from becoming the next headline.

Name: Display Daily
Description:
КАКВО Е DISPLAY DAILY?

Display Daily е платформа предоставяща онлайн достъп до печатни издания в дигитален вид. През Дисплей Дейли могат да се закупуват абонаменти за едно или повече периодични издания, които се предоставят чрез индивидуален достъп до системата.

KAK РАБОТИ ПЛАТФОРМАТА?

Издателите предоставят на Display Daily своите издания в pdf формат в деня преди тяхната публикация, след което компанията ги проверява и поставя на своята платформа. По този начин изданието става видимо до всички свои абонати в системата.

КАКВИ СА ПРЕДИМСТВАТА и ПОЛЗИТЕ?

Name: Booker Brings
Description:
When reading feels hard, Booker guides children from frustration to confidence, one story at a time. 

 Children’s Author | Actively Seeking Publishers | Copyright 2025 

 Manuscript only | No illustrations.

 Booker Brings is a heartwarming picture book and early literacy concept for children who feel left behind when learning to read. Maria dreads books — until she meets Booker, a quiet fairy-garden turtle who leaves her stories to discover overnight. As she reads beside him, frustration turns into confidence. With no judgment and quiet encouragement, Booker brings more than books — he brings the desire to try! 

 The story is paired with a toy concept: Booker the Book Buddy, a plush reading companion designed to support reluctant readers at home. It becomes a fun ritual that sparks literacy through imagination, empathy, and friendship. And unlike seasonal traditions, Booker Brings works year-round, adapting to your child’s pace, progress and family's schedule. 

Booker brings more than books: 
- A self-paced, flexible introduction to books and reading
- A cozy reading routine grounded in exploration and wonder
- Accountability, empathy, and relationship-building through storytelling
- A space for self-discovery through diverse and inclusive books
- Available in English & Spanish

Name: Agogobooks
Description:
Chez àgogo, nous avons un penchant particulier pour le 9e art, la bande dessinée. Les amateurs de bédés franco-belges, les collectionneurs passionnés de livres, ainsi que les acheteurs avertis seront ravis de parcourir notre site où l'on retrouve des milliers de titres à prix réduit, parfois même très réduit.
« Dans le monde du livre francophone à prix réduit, il y avait clairement un manque ici au Canada et, plus largement, en Amérique du Nord. « Nous avons voulu le combler » explique M. Andrew Kirk, fondateur de agogobooks.com.
« Nous sommes des professionnels du déstockage et nous avons appliqué notre connaissance de ce milieu aux domaines du jouet et du livre francophone. Avec la pandémie, nous avons pris le temps de construire notre site et, maintenant, nous le déployons, juste avant les fêtes de fin d’année, pour le bonheur des familles francophiles ! »
« Faciliter l’accès à la culture francophone est notre mission première. Nous nous adressons, en premier lieu, aux familles qui recherchent des ouvrages et des jouets de qualité à des prix très, très raisonnables mais nous sommes aussi une véritable caverne d’Alibaba pour les collectionneurs et amateurs d’éditions rares ou épuisées » explique Bertrand de Pétigny, chargé du développement de agogolivres.com.
« Nos livres éducatifs pour enfants sont des éditions sous licence ou exclusives. Ce sont des livres neufs, vendus à prix réduit. Tous nos jouets et jeux sont neufs et viennent dans leur emballage d’origine. » Le meilleur de l’Europe est chez Àgogo.

Name: The Orange Notebooks
Description:
The Orange Notebook is here to accompany you on your journey, empowering you to unleash your potential and conquer the world, one page at a time.  

Why settle for ordinary when you can write your extraordinary story in a notebook that reflects your ambitions? Our notebooks are not just paper and ink; they are a reservoir of positivity, a catalyst for innovation, and a springboard to greatness!  

Each Orange Notebook is designed to ignite your creativity and fuel your passion. We believe that success starts with a positive mindset, and our notebooks are the perfect companion to unlock your brilliance and set your ideas ablaze!  

With our eye-catching orange covers and motivational titles, your notebook will be an instant conversation starter. Whether you're in a boardroom meeting, a coffee shop, or simply seeking inspiration at your favorite spot, The Orange Notebook will undoubtedly catch the attention of go-getters like yourself. Get ready to make a statement with your stationery!  

But don't just take my word for it. The Orange Notebook has been rigorously tested by a team of accomplished dreamers, daring entrepreneurs, and unstoppable innovators. Their feedback has been overwhelmingly positive, with comments like "This notebook exudes ambition!" and "I felt inspired just by holding it!"  

So, if you're ready to embrace a new level of productivity, creativity, and success, join us on this vibrant journey with The Orange Notebook. Let's write our dreams into reality, one bold and brilliant page at a time!  

Follow us for more updates, giveaways, and opportunities to seize your success. Together, let's unleash the power of positivity and make our mark in the world. Get ready to #ThinkOrange and #WriteSuccess! 

 #TheOrangeNotebook #Positivity #inspirationforsuccess

Name: 飛地書店 Nowhere Bookstore
Description:
飛地書店的出現，源於對某種「香港」精神的延伸：開放、流動、包容，在他與我之間、本土與離散之間。以「Nowhere」為英文名，讓我們在無處可去時（nowhere），安住此時此地（now here）；在離散的時代，重建家園，重逢你我。

我們相信，閱讀是人與人相遇最古老、也最深刻的通道。正因如此，飛地首先是一間書店；而這裡的每一本書，都是交流的起點。我們期待更多人來到這裡，與陌生的世界相遇，與未知的自己相遇。

Name: The Book Nook Community Bookshop C.I.C.
Description:
The Book Nook Community Bookshop C.I.C. is , a not-for-profit Community Bookshop for local people in Ware, Hertfordshire. The bookshop is a warm and welcoming place, where people can have a cup of tea and a chat, make new friends, join a book group, write a short story and much more!   

Books that are sold in the bookshop and funds raised from events will go towards running our community projects, including: 
* Well being book groups for people with long term conditions and/ or disabilities  
* Working with schools to arrange author visits and events to help children and young people to engage with reading and books and ultimately improve literacy levels.  
* Donating books to local people on low incomes through the local Food Bank.
Founded in order to secure the future of The Book Nook to ensure that the local community keeps its much-loved bookshop, we sell a range of books, gifts and toys, run author events and book subscriptions to fund our community projects.  
We are currently crowdfunding to kick start our programme of community projects. Please visit https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/help-us-to-open-a-community-bookshop-in-ware

Name: Crazy or Genius?
Description:
Crazy or Genius? isn't your typical business book. It's a powerful, action-oriented guide designed to ignite your entrepreneurial spirit and push you to take bold steps toward success. Martin Karafilis, a former touring musician turned startup sensation, shares his unique journey and the winning philosophies that helped him achieve incredible success.

Through insightful anecdotes, practical strategies, and invaluable wisdom, this book will teach you how to:

- Overcome indecision and make impactful decisions
- Generate unstoppable momentum
- Sell your vision to customers and investors
- Seize opportunities when they arise
- Stand out and get noticed
- Master your mindset for long-term success
- Build meaningful and lasting relationships
- Balance seriousness with a sense of play
- Navigate the fine line between brilliance and madness

If you're tired of the same old business advice and ready for a fresh, invigorating take on entrepreneurship, Crazy or Genius? is the book for you. This is more than a book - it's a call to action, a challenge to break the mold, and a guide to turning your most ambitious ideas into reality.

Name: Status Report SciFi Book
Description:
Step into the mesmerizing world of "Status Report," a thrilling novel set in a futuristic smart city nestled within the breathtaking landscapes of Northern Queensland, Australia. Quintomo Hospital, a beacon of advanced technology and compassionate healthcare, takes center stage in this exhilarating journey.

In the year 2030, Quintomo Hospital showcases the remarkable fusion of AI, robotics, and healthcare. Its ultramodern walls witness an extraordinary dance between cutting-edge technology and the unwavering dedication of healthcare professionals, pushing the boundaries of patient care.

However, amidst the awe-inspiring advancements, controversy looms. Ethical dilemmas and concerns over privacy cast a shadow over this technological marvel, heightening the intrigue and setting the stage for a thrilling showdown. As the hospital harnesses the power of AI and robotics to transform lives, a devastating cyberattack throws it into a battle for survival. The humanoid robot program faces suspension, unleashing a tale of resilience and determination.

Follow the courageous healthcare professionals as they navigate treacherous waters, unraveling a web of conspiracy that threatens their work and the very fabric of the hospital. From the depths of the cyber underworld to the hallowed halls of Quintomo Hospital, each step brings them closer to a heart-pounding truth.

"Status Report: AI, Robotics and Healthcare in a futuristic city" immerses you in a world where trust is tested, alliances are forged, and the line between humanity and machines blurs. Anticipation mounts with each turn of the page, leading to an electrifying revelation. Suspense, intrigue, and optimism pulse through the veins of this extraordinary novel.

Through captivating prose and masterful storytelling, "Status Report" plunges you into a realm where resilience and technology converge. Join the remarkable journey of Quintomo Hospital and its fearless leaders as they navigate high stakes and palpable tension.

Name: Urban Butterfly Books
Description:
About Us

Growing up, books weren't just stories to me – they were portals to endless possibilities. I'd spend hours curled up in my favorite hiding place, lost in worlds of mystery, adventure, and wonder. Those precious moments shaped who I became — they sparked my imagination, deepened my empathy, and gave me a sense of possibility that carried into every part of my life. Books were my safe space, my escape, and my inspiration. That's why I'm thrilled to introduce Urban Butterfly Books — an independent online bookstore created especially for kids, teens, and young adults. This isn’t just about selling books; it’s about passing on the magic that shaped my childhood. It’s about helping young readers find their own quiet corners and unforgettable stories. 

We're not just selling books; we're nurturing the next generation of readers, dreamers, and thinkers. We believe that every child deserves to see themselves in the pages of a book. Our online bookstore is dedicated to promoting literacy and a love of reading among teens and young adults by offering a diverse collection of stories that reflect the rich tapestry of our world.
  
Mission

At Urban Butterfly Books, our mission is to spark a lifelong love of reading in children, teens, and young adults. We believe every young reader deserves to see themselves in the pages of a book — and to discover new worlds, ideas, and adventures along the way. Our store is a space where curiosity takes flight, creativity blossoms, and every story matters.

Vision

We envision a future where every young person grows up with access to diverse, empowering, and inspiring stories. Urban Butterfly Books aims to be a joyful hub where families, educators, and young readers gather to explore books that reflect who they are — and who they dream to be.

Name: مجموعه فرهنگی و هنری چهار آینه روشنان (Roshanan Group)
Description:
روشنان مجموعهای فرهنگی و هنری است. از فعالیتهای این مجموعه میتوان به کتابفروشی، کافه، برگزاری رویداد و فروش الکترونیکی محصولات فرهنگی و هنری نام برد. در آینده فعالیتهای دیگری همچون تولید فصلنامه، پادکست، جایزه داستاننویسی، تولید محصولات فرهنگی و غیره به فعالیتهای این مجموعه اضافه میشود. 
عمارت روشنان در زمستان سال ۱۳۹۷ با هدف ایجاد فضایی برای معاشرت و وقتگذرانی اهالی و دوستداران فرهنگ و هنر در خانهباغی واقع در دزاشیب تهران تأسیس شد.
این مجموعه شامل یک کتابفروشی است و از حیاط مجموعه به عنوان کافه استفاده میشود. روشنان، از ابتدای شروع فعالیت تاکنون میزبان برگزاری رویدادهای فرهنگی و هنری بوده و تاکنون رویدادهایی به مناسبتهای مختلف در این مجموعه برگزار شده است.
در آینده نزدیک فعالیتهای دیگری به این مجموعه اضافه میشود. پلتفرم «روشنانت» یکی از این فعالیتهاست. فضایی مجازی که میتواند تجربه حضور در محلی مثل عمارت روشنان را برای مخاطبان به همراه داشتهباشد. صفحه اینستاگرام روشنانت راهاندازی شده و فعلاً برای فروش غیرحضوری محصولات از آن استفاده میشود؛ اما به زودی پلتفرم روشنانت آماده خواهد شد و مخاطبان میتوانند از آن استفاده کنند.
.

Description:
Professor Judy Franks helps people make sense of a media world that feels louder, faster, and more fragmented than ever. At Northwestern University Medill School, she teaches students to decode complexity, ask sharper questions, and think like strategists in a constantly shifting landscape.

She is the author of Media from Chaos to Clarity and Back Again (Third Edition), where she revisits her Five Global Truths — a simple, powerful system for understanding the hidden patterns behind media disruption. Her work offers a refreshing way to step back from the chaos and see the big picture.

Judy brings together experience from industry, academia, and consulting to create a grounded, accessible approach to media literacy and strategic thinking. Her passion lies in giving people the tools to navigate the noise with confidence.

Name: DIOGENES LITERARIO
Description:
Diógenes Literario: lectura sostenible y compromiso social

Fundada en junio de 2022 por María Alfaro, Diógenes Literario es una librería que apuesta por la economía circular y la sostenibilidad, facilitando el acceso a libros de segunda mano de forma responsable y asequible.

María, con más de 20 años de experiencia comercial, y Rafael, asesor fiscal para pymes, crearon este proyecto tras la pandemia, cuando María recuperó su pasión por la lectura y detectó la necesidad de un modelo que promoviera la reutilización de libros.

La librería utiliza embalajes ecológicos, protege cada ejemplar y planta un árbol por cada 200 € vendidos para compensar su huella de carbono. Además, apoya a mujeres víctimas de violencia de género, dona libros a infancia en riesgo y promueve la igualdad y el bienestar laboral.

Desde octubre de 2023, cuentan con sede física en Elche, siendo un punto de encuentro para lectores y autores. Diógenes Literario está integrada en la Red de Librerías Independientes y en CEGAL, y sigue creciendo como un referente local de lectura accesible, sostenibilidad y responsabilidad social.

Name: Poetry Inspires Me
Description:
Whatever you're searching for, poetry has the power to light your path and connect you to your most authentic self. You find yourself here for a reason...
Poetry has the power to heal us all.

In words and metaphor, rhythm and rhyme, we find ways to make sense of the world and where we fit within it.

What brought you here? A love of words? A search for personal truth? A way to calm your racing mind?

Poetry brings you all these things, and S.L. Conduite’s words are the clues you’re looking for… the clues leading to your personal truth.

Inside, you’ll find:

The raw thoughts and emotions of one poet, who holds a mirror up so you can understand your own
Beautiful nuggets of wisdom and understanding short enough to read in one sitting and powerful enough to light your path for a lifetime
Powerful imagery shown through simple and accessible language – because you shouldn’t need a degree in literature to feel the magic of poetry
All your most challenging emotions brought to life in words that soften their power, showing you the pathway to peace and freedom
The poet’s reason for writing shining through the page – perhaps you’ll be inspired to pick up a pen yourself
Reflections on moments passed to pave the way to truth in the present
The one-word poem that will stop you in your tracks, give you perspective, and remind you what truly matters
The soothing melody of poetry to help you step away from the chaos of racing thoughts and find peace in the day
And much more.

Whatever you’re looking for in a poem, you’ll find it in this beautiful collection… because poetry is designed to speak to your soul, and these poems know you.  

You don’t often think of poetry and science in the same breath, but there’s been a wealth of research into the power of poetry, with studies finding that both reading and writing are therapeutic for those facing illness, sadness, anger, and fatigue.

We look to poetry because it shows us a mirror of ourselves and shines a light on our experiences.

Plus qu’une simple librairie, c’est un véritable espace de vie où l’on "fait vivre le lieu" autrement : ateliers d’écriture, sessions de dessin "manga" pour tous les âges, créations artistiques pour les plus petits, rencontres littéraires et dédicaces avec des auteurs passionnés... chaque visite est une nouvelle expérience, emplie de surprises et d’enrichissements.

Venez découvrir cette bulle de créativité et de plaisir, on vous attend avec impatience !

La librairie est également membre du réseau des Librairies Indépendantes de Nouvelle-Aquitaine (LINA)

Riesige Buchauswahl
Unsere Buchhandlung hält eine riesige Auswahl an Büchern und weiteren spannenden Artikeln für Sie bereit. Die entspannte Atmosphäre lädt zum Verweilen und Schmökern ein.

Genießen und Wohlfühlen
Auf vier Etagen mit insgesamt 250 Plätzen bieten wir in unseren Cafés und Restaurants ein kulinarisches Angebot für Jedermann. Ob Hausmannskost, frisches Soulfood oder klassische Kaffeetafel: In ruhiger Atmosphäre und liebevoll gestalteten Gastronomien kommt jeder zur Ruhe und zum Genuss.

Events und Kultur
Poetry Slam, Konzerte, Lesungen, Theater, Kino und Kongress: Das kulturelle Angebot in der Mayerschen kennt keine Grenzen. Während auf der großen Bühne im forum M schon internationale Stars zu Gast waren, ist die neue Bühne in der dritten Etage offen für kleinere Veranstaltungen und Nachwuchsstars.

Online bestellen & liefern lassen
Wer auch zu Hause nicht auf den Service der Mayerschen Buchhandlung verzichten will, kann unser gesamtes Sortiment bequem online bestellen und sich liefern lassen.

Name: JF Books
Description:
A Beacon Silenced, a Legacy Reborn

Jifeng Bookstore wasn't just a bookstore; for two decades, it was a cornerstone of China's intellectual landscape. With eight branches at its peak, Jifeng fostered a love of reading and critical thinking through meticulously curated selections in social sciences and humanities, alongside vibrant cultural events. Lectures, forums, readings, and independent documentary screenings pulsed with intellectual energy, drawing in over hundreds of thousands of attendees in its final five years.

However, Jifeng's commitment to open dialogue clashed with a tightening grip on free expression. When told in advance of its fate of having to close on Jan. 31, 2018, it held a 283-day long countdown.

The Last Night

The bookstore's last night was a testament to its spirit. Readers from across China converged, bringing flowers, choosing books, and reciting poems in a silent show of solidarity. Faced with the darkness that followed being cut off and a heavy police presence, these patrons refused to be silenced. They injected joy and hope into the darkness. Phones became flashlights, bookshelves adorned with LED lights, and the bookstore hummed with life anew. A young man's piano serenade, a circle of dancers swaying to the music, and a chorus of voices singing farewell resonated through the night.

Jifeng's story resonated globally, featured in The Economist, Voice of America, The National Interest, and The New Yorker. The bookstore's demise became a symbol of a stifled civil society.

Jifeng Rises Again

Today, Jifeng Bookstore finds a new home in Washington D.C. This isn't just a revival; it's a continuation of its legacy. While Chinese literature remains a cornerstone, Jifeng will also showcase English-language works exploring China and celebrate the voices of Asian-Americans. Beyond books, Jifeng will once again be a platform for diverse cultural events, fostering connections through knowledge, ideas, and the shared human spirit.

Founded and operated a small-scale online bookshop, overseeing all aspects from product sourcing to sales, content, and customer service.

Gradually expanded product lines and engagement strategies while maintaining a personal, value-driven brand identity.

tarted selling individual books through personal channels (Facebook, Messenger). Managed sourcing, pricing, customer interaction, and order fulfillment manually.

Opened an online bookshop with structured inventory and daily operations. Built consistent customer base, created simple branding, and streamlined ordering via social platforms.

Developed a book review segment to enrich content strategy and attract organic reach. Balanced between promotional and community-driven content to foster trust.

Expanded offerings beyond books to include fashion accessories, hair & body care items, and basic office equipment. Applied curated selection and soft selling to complement main brand identity.

Gradually closed the shop to focus on new professional directions. Retained brand credibility and a loyal network of customers and readers.

Name: Melanin Pages
Description:
Melanin Pages is a platform that provides a space for black authors to showcase their work and connect with readers who are looking for diverse and inclusive voices. Our mission is to foster a community that values and celebrates black culture and creativity, and that supports and uplifts one another. We believe that great literature should be accessible to all, and that's why we offer a wide range of books across genres and age groups, as well as a Top Shelf service that helps authors get more exposure and reach new readers.

Our Classification fee for 3 months is only $5.00 for a limited time, and we classify your book under your specific genre. We also offer a 5-day Top Shelf fee of $55.00, which includes a book description, classification under genre, and homepage exposure. For authors who want even more visibility, we offer a 3-day Featured Spots fee for $75.00, which includes all of the Top Shelf benefits plus the added exposure of being featured on our homepage.

At Melanin Pages, we believe in uplifting and empowering our community, and that includes providing opportunities for black-owned businesses to advertise with us. We offer custom rates for sponsorship advertising, so if you're interested in advertising with us, please don't hesitate to contact us.

In addition, we also offer gift cards for purchase, so you can give the gift of diverse and inclusive literature to your friends and family.

Join us in celebrating black excellence in literature and supporting black authors.

Name: "AI 2024" Book Volume 2
Description:
Go on a captivating journey through the world of artificial intelligence (AI) with "AI 2024: Trends, Technologies, and Transformations," by seasoned Creative Technologist & AI Strategist David Borish. This book offers an accessible and thought-provoking exploration of AI's transformative potential across industries, society, and the creative landscape.

In this book you will learn how AI is transforming industries across the board, from filmmaking and healthcare to construction and education. Explore the future of creative expression as AI redefines the boundaries of animation, video content creation, and immersive storytelling. Discover how AI is advancing medical discoveries, reshaping traditional farming, and pushing the frontiers of scientific research. Uncover the societal implications of AI, from its potential to create billion-dollar unicorns with just one person to its ability to democratize mental health care for millions, while examining the principles and guidelines that will shape our AI-driven future

Whether you're a business leader, technology enthusiast, or simply curious about the future, "AI 2024" serves as an essential guide to navigating the AI landscape.

With a blend of technical insight and accessible storytelling, Borish paints a vivid picture of a future shaped by AI, inviting readers to consider the ethical implications and societal impact of this transformative technology. "AI 2024" serves as a catalyst for meaningful conversations about the development and deployment of AI.

Prepare yourself for the transformations that lie ahead. "AI 2024: Trends, Technologies, and Transformations" is a roadmap to understanding and embracing the future of artificial intelligence.

Name: Unintentionally Biased and Exposed: Unveiling The Power of Awareness
Description:
The drive to ignite the nation's consciousness regarding the consequences of unchecked biases became the initial underpinning of this project. With that said, "Unintentionally Bias and Exposed: Unveiling the Power of Awareness by Examining Race, Religion, and Politics," aims to shed light on the profound impact of unintentional bias, exploring its origins, manifestations, and consequences across various domains of human interaction. This book seeks to empower individuals and organizations to overcome bias and foster more inclusive environments by exploring the underlying mechanisms of unintentional bias and emphasizing the importance of awareness. In a rapidly evolving world driven by interconnectedness and diversity, the prevalence of unintentional bias has emerged as a significant concern. 

Unconscious biases are deeply ingrained attitudes and stereotypes that affect our judgments and decision-making processes without our conscious awareness. Despite our best intentions, unintentional bias can infiltrate our thoughts, actions, and interactions, leading to unfair treatment, limited opportunities, and the perpetuation of social inequalities. Unintentional bias can no longer be dismissed as a peripheral issue; it demands our attention and action. Nonetheless, "Unintentional Biased and Exposed: Unveiling the Power of Awareness by Examining Race, Religion, and Politics," seeks to illuminate the subtle ways in which bias permeates our lives and how its effects reverberate through society. 

By exploring the nature of bias, examining its manifestations, and equipping readers with strategies for change, the purpose is to consciously awaken the reader into action and change the distorted vision that allows bias in any form, to exist. Moving beyond theory, the motivation is to examine the pervasive presence of unintentional bias in our daily lives.

Name: ColorPort Books
Description:
At ColorPort Books, we believe that the joy of travel and the serenity of coloring books should not be worlds apart. Our innovative concept blends the thrill of exploring new destinations with the relaxing art of coloring and trivia, offering an escape for those who cherish both adventures abroad and quiet moments of creativity.

Name: The Comic Shop Fiji
Description:
Welcome to the heart of comic book fandom in Fiji! At The Comic Shop, we pride ourselves on being the premier online destination for all your comic book cravings. As Fiji's sole dedicated comic book provider, we offer a vast and eclectic collection of both new and used comic books, ensuring that enthusiasts and collectors alike can find their favorite titles and discover hidden gems. Immerse yourself in the vibrant universes crafted by renowned prints such as Marvel, DC, and many more.

Our commitment goes beyond just providing comic books; we're curators of narratives, purveyors of art, and guardians of the geek culture. From the iconic superheroes of Marvel and DC to the rich tapestry of independent creators, our shelves boast a diverse range of genres and stories. Whether you're into high-flying action, mind-bending sci-fi, or heartwarming drama, we have something that will resonate with your tastes.

Navigating our online store is a seamless experience designed for both seasoned collectors and newcomers. Our user-friendly interface ensures that you can easily explore our extensive catalog, find exclusive editions, and secure the issues missing from your collection—all from the comfort of your home.

Why choose The Comic Shop?

 Wide Variety: We bring you an unparalleled selection of comic books, spanning genres and publishers, ensuring there's something for everyone.

 Quality Assurance: Our commitment to quality extends to both new releases and carefully curated used comics, promising a satisfying reading experience.

 Exclusive Deals: Be the first to know about exclusive deals, promotions, and events. Follow us for a front-row seat to the latest and greatest in the comic book universe.

At The Comic Shop, we're not just selling comics; we're connecting people with the extraordinary stories that have the power to inspire, entertain, and ignite the imagination. Join our community of comic book enthusiasts, and let the adventure begin!

Name: Librairie Stephan
Description: Fondée en 1956 par son PDG Nazih Stephan, la Librairie Stephan est active sur plusieurs canaux de vente de livres : deux librairies de vente au détail, un réseau de vente en gros et une activité de vente directe auxquels est venue se rajouter en 2008 une maison d’édition. Le point de vente de Furn El Chebback est généraliste avec spécialisation en livres scolaires, et livres pour enfants. Une bibliothèque de prêt met un très grand choix de livres à la disposition des clients depuis 25 ans. On y trouve les dernières nouveautés. Le point de vente d’Achrafieh inauguré en 1998 est généraliste, couvre tous types d’ouvrages (romans, essais, beaux livres, jeunesse, bandes dessinées…), et est spécialement réputé pour son étage entier dédié à la bande dessinée ainsi que pour le très large rayon de livres de jeunesse. De même, la Librairie Stephan est le distributeur exclusif des éditions Dar El-Machreq, comprenant les livres religieux, les dictionnaires et les manuels scolaires

Name: American Insanity
Description: "American Insanity" reflects on the political insanity that has overtaken the United States. It addresses citizen's apathetic view of our governing system, both towards elected officials and the ever-controlling Washington bureaucracy. How and why the citizens of this Nation have failed their obligation to keep vigilance over our governing politicians and holding them accountable when they fail to uphold their promises and their oath to office. Compares the America he grew up in, which is rapidly slipping away, to the Nation it has now become. "American Insanity" addresses the insanity that we the American citizens are now living through while the "Last Vestige of Hope for Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness," rapidly transforms from a Constitutional Republic into a Marxist-Communist Nation. Cossette addresses a failed two-party political system that no longer supports and protects our Judeo-Christian values upon which the United States was founded. Parties which have lost their moral compass, strength, and courage to protect our Constitutional Republic and the citizens therein.

Name: Artisan Joy
Description:
Artisan Joy is an independent publisher and media outlet that features stories about diverse entrepreneurs from an array of creative disciplines. 

Vision
Be a platform where creative entrepreneurs are heard, valued and celebrated for their positive impacts on the economy and their local communities.

Mission
To amplify the work of creative entrepreneurs, chronicle the positive impact of art and craft on the economy and community, and foster connection among art/artisan business owners.

Artisan Joy is an organization exempt under IRC Section 501(c)(3) and is further classified as a public charity under IRC Section 509(a)(2).

Name: Found Image Press
Description:
At Found Image Press, history, artistry, and a dash of humor create unforgettable and delightful paper gifts. We're not just purveyors of vintage visuals; we're your ticket to a nostalgic adventure spanning the 1800s to the 1970s. Our collection is a treasure trove of over 60,000 hand-picked images, including historical events, iconic figures, landscapes, and more. Each picture tells a unique story, ready to inspire, inform, and entertain.

Our journey began with a passion for vintage art and a quirky sense of humor, leading us to curate a collection that's as diverse as it is delightful. From the sublime to the offbeat, our images capture timeless and timely moments.

Whether looking for a postcard, greeting card, or art print, you can choose your desired images individually or from a carefully compiled collection. We'll print them to order on high-quality, eco-friendly paper products designed to impress and last.

Every image is meticulously examined for cultural relevance, historical accuracy, and artistry. Our thoughtfully categorized collections make it easy to find the perfect pieces. From the moment you visit our site to the day your order arrives, we aim to impress you with personal touches and attentive service.

Our products are made to exacting standards, using top-notch materials that are biodegradable, recycled, and recyclable. Limited plastic use ensures we tread lightly on the planet. We are family-owned, and our products are proudly made in the USA. Each piece is handled with care, from printing to finishing, ensuring it meets our high standards and your expectations.

Whether you're reaching history buffs, art lovers, or those who appreciate a good laugh, we have something special. Explore our collections, pick your favorites, and let us bring a touch of vintage charm to your world.

At Found Image Press, we're not just about paper gifts – we're about preserving memories and sharing stories, one image at a time.

Name: Kindred Stories
Description:
We believe reading is one of the most vital acts of self-care. When we read, we can take a step back from our day-to-day stresses and fall into new worlds — and when that book is written by someone who looks like us, grew up in a similar environment to ours, and understands what we’re going through, we can return from our momentary escape with new knowledge that helps us live more beautiful and authentic lives.

Kindred Stories is a community space and bookstore that doesn’t just highlight Black literature but celebrates our stories in all their diverse and genre-spanning glory. Every book on the shelves is written by a Black author or other marginalized voice, and every display can spotlight a unique aspect of Black storytelling and craft.

Through visiting our space or attending one of our many events, we hope our supporters can unite over our shared love of these books; delve into the ways we see ourselves reflected in their stories; learn about new and upcoming Black writers, artists, creators, and changemakers; and find connection at a time when we need it more than ever — all while working to create change, and spread access for those who’ve been systematically cut off from literature for far too long.

Our physical store is located in Third Ward in partnership with Project Row Houses. We hope to edify our community’s swelling appetite for authentic stories — as told by those who have lived them. Follow us on Instagram, shop online, or visit the store to keep up with all the fun happening at Kindred Stories.

Thank you for being a part of our tribe!

Name: Black Unicorns
Description: "BLACK UNICORNS" spans centuries and continents, following the epic journey of Tré Johnson and his team as they transform abandoned urban spaces into thriving communities.

Name: Libristorie
Description:
Libristorie est née dans une chambre remplie de livres neufs. Tous ont coûté plus d'une quinzaine d'euros à l'unité voire plus. Il faut un budget pour lire qu'importe s'il s'agit d'un roman, d'un livre politique ou d'un manuel sur la finance. 

Puis, une fois lu, le livre prend la poussière. Comme un trophée que l'on met en haut d'une étagère mais nous ne levons pas la tête. Alors, Libristorie est née d'une réflexion sur les livres d'occasions. Pourquoi ne pas les revendre beaucoup moins cher ? Donner une seconde vie, permettre que l'histoire fasse vibrer d'autres sentiments. 

Ainsi, Libristorie c'est ça. Donner une seconde vie à vos livres. Partager la connaissance et rendre la lecture accessible sans avoir à payer plus de quinze euros pour un seul bouquin. 

Lire, c'est vivre et nous voulons vous donner un bout de vie.

Name: Chantelivre
Description:
Chantelivre, founded in 1974 by the publishing house L'École des loisirs, is one of the first and most respected children's bookstores in France. Located in the 6th arrondissement of Paris, it offers a 300 m² space entirely dedicated to books for children, teens, and adults. 
The store is organized into three main sections:
Adult Section: Novels, nonfiction, comics, and manga.
Youth Section: Books for independent readers aged 6 to 18.
Early Childhood Section: For ages 0 to 6, with a cozy area for toddlers.

One of its strong points is its personalized customer service. Staff are known for offering expert reading advice tailored to each age group.

Chantelivre also houses the Maison des Histoires ("House of Stories"), a unique immersive experience for children aged 0–7. Half museum, half play space, it invites children to explore interactive story worlds based on beloved picture books.

Name: Pymoon
Description: PYMOON is a social impact brand that offers eco-friendly products dedicated to fostering curiosity and creativity through universally appealing STEAM-focused educational resources.

Name: Myre
Description: Somos apaixonados por idiomas e por conectar pessoas através da leitura! Situada em São Paulo, a Myre importa e distribui livros que melhoram o aprendizado. Promovemos o conhecimento de idiomas através de uma seleção cuidadosa e diversificada de obras literárias e didáticas.

Name: Trends In Riviera
Description:
Trends in Riviera est un magazine lifestyle de luxe, rédigé en français et en anglais, entièrement dédié à l’art de vivre en Principauté de Monaco et sur la Côte d’Azur. Véritable ode contemporaine aux tendances et aux savoir-faire d’exception, le titre propose une lecture inspirée et exigeante de ce qui façonne l’identité singulière de la Riviera française.

À travers cinq numéros par an, Trends in Riviera met en lumière les gestes d’excellence, les créations et les lieux emblématiques qui incarnent le raffinement de la région. Haute horlogerie, joaillerie, mode, beauté, gastronomie, art de vivre, décoration, automobile, évasion, œnologie, culture et événements d’exception composent une ligne éditoriale riche, élégante et résolument actuelle.

Le magazine se distingue par une esthétique moderne et lumineuse, portée par un graphisme épuré et des contenus à forte valeur éditoriale. Chaque édition célèbre une Riviera plurielle, entre héritage et modernité, excellence artisanale et création contemporaine.

Trends in Riviera bénéficie d’une diffusion sélective et premium. Le magazine est présent au cœur des plus prestigieux établissements du Resort Monte-Carlo Société des Bains de Mer, véritables icônes du luxe monégasque. Il accompagne également la clientèle des hôtels cinq étoiles et Palaces de la région, de Saint-Tropez à Cannes, d’Antibes à Nice.

Sa diffusion s’étend à un réseau exclusif réunissant décideurs et prescripteurs, incluant plages privées, boutiques de luxe, galeries d’art, centres de bien-être, cliniques esthétiques et golfs de la Côte d’Azur. Le titre s’appuie également sur des partenariats privilégiés avec des institutions majeures, telles que le Business Lounge de l’aéroport Nice Côte d’Azur et les kiosques Premium Nice-Matin.

Présent lors des événements majeurs de la Riviera et diffusé au sein de circuits haut de gamme, Trends in Riviera s’impose comme un média de référence, à la croisée du luxe, de la culture et de l’art de vivre méditerranéen.

Name: Sinclairity Press
Description:
Welcome to Sinclarity Stationery!

Sinclarity Stationery offers elegantly designed planners, journals, and workbooks that are more than mere organizational tools. Each product is meticulously crafted to empower black women, enabling them to navigate life's transitions with confidence and grace. Our products incorporate elements that encourage goal setting, self-exploration, and clarity of purpose. Whether plotting a new career path, embracing changes in personal life, or simply organizing daily tasks, Sinclarity Stationery is committed to enriching the lives of women who are as committed to their self-discovery as they are to their responsibilities.

Our Products: Each item in our collection is thoughtfully crafted to support the significant life transitions and everyday needs of mature Black women. From managing personal goals to navigating life changes like career shifts and menopause, our products provide not only organizational tools but also resources for self-care and reflection.

Our Commitment: We are dedicated to sustainability and ethical manufacturing, using eco-friendly materials and practices to produce our high-quality items. We believe that personal empowerment and environmental responsibility go hand in hand.

Our Community: Sinclarity Stationery is more than just a brand; it’s a community. We strive to create a space where our customers can find support and inspiration from others who share similar journeys and experiences.

Join Us: Follow Sinclarity Stationery on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest products, gain access to exclusive content, and be part of a growing community of empowered women. We’re here to celebrate your strength, resilience, and majesty at every stage of life

Name: BD BOOKS
Description: BD Books is a trusted e-commerce bookstore. We have all kinds of academic, admission, job preparation and many more books in our platform. We deliver our products all over the country.  We ensure quality assurance of our products and a dependable customer service facility.

Name: Johnstan Books
Description:
This page is designed to connect with persons who are bibliophiles. Whether you are collecting or looking for a fresh book to read, this is where you can find it. 

Our niche focus is romance but don't worry, there are many subgenres to choose from. You can expect reviews as well as recommendations. 

We will be posting links to any issues we feature so you can have access to it. New releases will have purchase links. 

There will also be discussions surrounding books that were adapted into movies or tv-series. There are a few interesting ones being covered by Netflix right now - Bridgerton for example is really making waves.

We can't wait to work with you and turn this dream into a well-oiled reality and an active community. #bookworms

Name: CAP For Indies
Description: The Carousel Aware Prize for Independently Published Authors (The CAP for Indies) aims to provide a platform to showcase the cream of Irish Self-Published authors, bringing them to the attention of book shops, distributors, and the media in Ireland and abroad, with all money raised going to the charity Aware.

Name: Shock & Aww Books
Description:
Established in 2025, Shock & Aww Books was created to fill a void in the book community in Central Florida. We will be offering a curated selection that focuses on our favorite respective genres of horror and cozy fantasy. 

Our hope is to foster a safe space for marginalized people to find and discuss books. We will be featuring BIPOC, indie, local, and queer authors in our selections and recommendations. 

We are now offering books online!
Physical & Ebooks: https://bookshop.org/shop/shockandawwbooks
Audiobooks: https://libro.fm/shockandawwbooks

Our hope is to start attending in-person events in 2026. If you’d like to contribute to this goal, you can visit 
www.gofundme.com/shockandawwbooks

You can find our progress and updates on Instagram and Bluesky at @shockandawwbooks .

Name: Le Marais du Livre
Description:
Le Marais du Livre est une librairie indépendante qui a été créée en 1994, sur l'initiative d'Élisabeth et Vincent Bécart.



C'est une librairie générale avec un fonds important en littérature adulte et jeunesse.
Nous ne faisons pas de papeterie (à part un grand choix de cartes postales) pour laisser le maximum de places aux produits culturels.
 

Le Marais du Livre est une librairie où l'on peut y acheter également des Compact Discs, des DVDs et des accessoires pour guitares. Nous pratiquons le neuf et l'occasion sur les Compact Discs et les DVDs afin d'avoir le plus large choix possible de styles et de prix.



D'où vient le nom "Marais du Livre" ?

Hazebrouck signifie en flamand Le Marais (Brouck) du Lièvre (Haze = la femelle du lièvre plus précisément)
De plus, le quartier du Marais à Paris a marqué une partie de nos années lorsque nous étions étudiants.
D'où le Marais du Livre. Voilà, tout simplement !

Name: Tallulah - Forlag
Description: Velkommen til Tallulah! Her får du ny dansk fiktion skabt af både etablerede og helt nye forfattere og illustratorer med ønsket om at inkludere nye børn og unge i det livslange fællesskab af bogelskere i alle aldre. Vi udgiver nye generationers nye yndlingsbøger, historier der åbner din forestillingsverden, underholder og giver dig et sprog til at forstå både dig selv og de andre. Hold øje med katten.

Name: Myre Livraria
Description: Somos apaixonados por idiomas e por conectar pessoas através da leitura! Situada em São Paulo, a Myre importa e distribui livros que melhoram o aprendizado. Promovemos o conhecimento de idiomas através de uma seleção cuidadosa e diversificada de obras literárias e didáticas.

Name: Lana Lou Books
Description:
I am Lana Lou Jackson, a Catahoula Dog who turned 10 in Dec 2024. However, back in Feb 2024, I was diagnosed with Oral Melanoma Cancer, and YES! I'm still being a Wonder Woman and in Remission. My Mom & Dad, Marianne Guinee Jackson & John Jackson, started our company as a legacy to me, and to give back to both other rescue dogs & donate to Canine Cancer Research. 

At Lana Lou Books, we believe in the power of creativity and purpose.

Our mission is to inspire, help others remember cherished moments, and give back to meaningful causes. We make books for coloring, journaling, and puzzling. 

We benefit our customers by delivering in 2 ways - Paperback books sold via Amazon, and very affordable downloadable PDF's on our website that give you instant gratification. 

Each creation is thoughtfully designed to encourage relaxation, self-expression, and connection. Whether you're coloring intricate designs, journaling your thoughts, or solving fun puzzles, our books are crafted to provide comfort, joy, and inspiration.

What sets us apart is our commitment to making a difference. We proudly donate 20% of all profits to animal rescues and canine cancer research, honoring the legacy of me - their beloved therapy dog, Lana Lou.

Join us in inspiring creativity, creating memories, and supporting a brighter future for our furry friends. Together, we can color the world with compassion and hope.

Name: Başalan Library
Description: As Başalan Library, we are pleased to share thousands of first editions and original signed works in our library's by our country’s and the world’s most valuable authors with our connections.

Name: Belbuk.com
Description: Belbuk.com adalah situs toko buku online yang berdiri sejak tahun 2009.

Name: Got Enough Books
Description: Got Enough Books are a second hand book shop based in Leicester, UK. We specialize in books about all aspects of culture and politics, cherry picked by owners Tom and Holly. We also run Night Market, an evening event showcasing phenomenal traders and makers. Reach out to learn more!

Name: Literature and Libations
Description: Welcome to Literature and Libations!  We're your one-stop destination for literary discoveries and curated libation experiences, with a special focus on spotlighting black authors and books telling black stories. As an online bookstore, we're dedicated to bringing you a world of captivating stories and thought-provoking literature that celebrate the rich diversity of black voices. Stay tuned for exciting updates as we expand our presence to a city near you, offering unique in-person events, book clubs, and more, all while continuing to champion black literature. Join us on this journey of words and spirits, and let's celebrate the love of reading and the power of black storytelling together.  #BlackAuthors #BlackStories #LiteratureAndLibations #ComingSoon

Name: The Roasted Bookery
Description: Our (virtual, for now) bookstore aims to amplify the literary works that center BIPOC and LGBTQIA+ characters and authors. We curate our collection to reflect a very specific and often neglected point of view and set of experiences. Our bookstore is only the beginning! We invite you to follow along our journey.

Name: LitVerse
Description: A book community aim of reigniting the reading culture

Name: Grupo Magic
Description:
No Grupo Magic, acreditamos que brincar e aprender têm o poder de transformar vidas. Há 14 anos, desenvolvemos e distribuímos livros e produtos que vão além do entretenimento, unindo diversão, educação e desenvolvimento infantil.

Nossos materiais são cuidadosamente pensados para estimular criatividade, imaginação, coordenação motora, concentração, raciocínio lógico e comunicação. Cada produto é uma ferramenta de aprendizado que visa apoiar o crescimento saudável das crianças, proporcionando experiências enriquecedoras tanto no ambiente doméstico quanto educacional.

Estamos comprometidos em acompanhar as tendências do mercado e as mudanças no comportamento dos consumidores, o que nos permite oferecer sempre as melhores soluções para o desenvolvimento infantil. 

Nossa missão é proporcionar momentos de magia que encantam, ensinam e aproximam as famílias, criando conexões que vão muito além dos produtos que oferecemos. Acreditamos no poder da educação lúdica para transformar o futuro das crianças, e estamos aqui para fazer parte dessa jornada.

Name: Nia Bailey Books
Description: Welcome to Nia Bailey’s Books, where we celebrate the importance of loving our neighbors, the Agape way!

Name: Kitapetkisi Yayıncılık
Description:
Hoş Geldiniz!

Kitaplarla dolu bir dünyada sizi ağırlamaktan mutluluk duyuyoruz. Kitapetkisi, 2021 yılında kitapseverler için bir cennet yaratmak amacıyla kuruldu. Amacımız, kitap tutkunlarına en iyi kitapları sunarak okuma deneyimlerini zenginleştirmek ve yeni dünyalara kapı aralamaktır.

Biz Kimiz?

Kitapetkisi, büyük bir aşkla kitaplara bağlı olan bir grup tutkulu okur ve girişimci tarafından kuruldu. Hepimizin ortak bir hedefi var: Dünyanın dört bir yanından gelen çeşitli kitapları, okurlarımız için kolayca erişilebilir hale getirmek. Her biri kendi alanında uzmanlaşmış olan ekibimiz, sizi en iyi kitaplarla buluşturmak için sürekli olarak çalışmaktadır.

Neden Kitapetkisi?

Geniş Kütüphane: Kitapetkisi, her türlü okur için bir şeyler sunar. Klasiklerden en son çıkan eserlere kadar geniş bir kitap koleksiyonuna sahibiz. Her zevke ve ilgiye uygun kitapları keşfetmek için sitemizi dolaşın.
Hızlı Teslimat: Kitaplarınızı hızlı ve güvenilir bir şekilde kapınıza getiriyoruz. Siparişlerinizi en kısa sürede teslim etmek için çaba gösteriyoruz.
Müşteri Desteği: Kitapetkisi olarak müşteri memnuniyetine büyük önem veriyoruz. Herhangi bir sorunuz veya isteğiniz olduğunda, size yardımcı olmaktan mutluluk duyarız. İletişim bilgilerimizle bizimle iletişime geçmekten çekinmeyin.
Güvenli Alışveriş: Kitapetkisi olarak müşteri bilgilerinin güvenliğini ciddiye alıyoruz. Tüm ödeme işlemleri güvenli ve şifrelenmiş bir ortamda gerçekleştirilir.
Vizyonumuz

Vizyonumuz, herkesin kitaplara erişimini kolaylaştırmak ve insanların daha fazla okuma alışkanlığı kazanmasına yardımcı olmaktır. Okumanın gücünü keşfetmeye ve yeni dünyalara açılmaya teşvik etmek istiyoruz.

Misyonumuz

Misyonumuz, kitapları herkes için daha erişilebilir kılmak ve okuma deneyimini zenginleştirmektir. Her bir kitap, yeni bir macera, yeni bir dünya ve yeni bir öğrenme fırsatıdır. Bizim görevimiz, bu fırsatları size sunmaktır.

Name: My Bulle Toys
Description:
My Bulle Toys was founded in 2019. The creator, Fanny, is a mother of two and French teacher in a French-American bilingual school in Florida. She’s spent years combining the best of both worlds between the French and American educational philosophies, learning that offering a variety of learning tools and approaches helps every child find the right path for them and enjoy learning.

 

Fanny believes that children are born with a natural sense of curiosity and love of learning, which can be supported by engaging their existing interests and curiosity to "connect the dots" to other subjects. Wanting to provide her children with creative French educational products (and finding none available in the American market), she recognized a need to supply them.

Founders Nico and Fanny
Founders Nico and Fanny
During one of Fanny's semiannual trips to Paris, she decided bring back a variety of French educational toys and objects to share with families in the U.S. Her friends and the parents of her students were soon begging her to bring back more items each trip. When Fanny's husband, Nico, wondered whether they could make the toys accessible to kids across the U.S., My Bulle Toys was created!

We've grown our family business ever since, opening a physical store and online shop to allow families all over the United States to access our product line. Now, every child can learn a variety of subjects the fun way (including French) through My Bulle Toys' educational toys and supplies.

We search high and low to find items that engage children and capture their attention to ensure that the lessons imparted aren't quickly forgotten.

Name: Bonus Days Magazine
Description:
Bonus Days Magazine is a publication focused on sharing inspiring stories and insights from individuals navigating life after major health challenges. The magazine is designed for transplant and chronic illness patients, their families, and donors, providing a supportive community and platform for shared experiences. It aims to remind readers that life can be beautiful despite challenging circumstances and medical diagnoses.

The magazine was founded by Alison Conklin, a lifelong storyteller, and Taylor Van Kooten, who serves as the Art Director. Together, they bring a unique blend of photography, storytelling, and design to create a visually compelling and emotionally resonant publication. The inaugural issue, released in Summer 2024, features 40 pages filled with stories from various contributors, including Caroline Laubach, Nicole Crook, Vanessa Daugherty, and Rosie Giacosa.

Bonus Days Magazine is available for purchase, and readers can subscribe to stay updated on future issues and news. The publication is based in Lehigh Valley, PA, and encourages readers to share their own stories, fostering a peer-supported and patient-initiated community. 

For more information, you can visit the website www.BonusDaysMag.com or email Alison at Alison@BonusDaysMag.com

Description:
Livres d’Algérie est née en octobre 2020 d’une simple envie : permettre à chaque Algérien, où qu’il soit, d’accéder facilement aux livres qui nourrissent l’esprit et élargissent les horizons.

Dans un pays où l’accès aux ouvrages internationaux reste un défi, Livres d’Algérie s’est imposée comme la première et seule librairie en ligne de type Amazon, entièrement pensée pour répondre aux besoins des lecteurs algériens.

Notre mission ? Offrir un pont entre les lecteurs d’Algérie et le monde du livre, avec une interface moderne, un vaste catalogue, et un esprit profondément ancré dans la passion de la lecture.

Aujourd’hui, Livres d’Algérie, c’est bien plus qu’une librairie en ligne suivie par plus de 29 000 personnes : c’est un symbole d’accès, de culture, et de renouveau littéraire.
