Description:
Nous sommes fiers de vous présenter Kamarade, une plateforme innovante dédiée à l'apprentissage des langues pour adultes, ainsi qu'au soutien scolaire pour les enfants âgés de 8 à 10 ans !

Chez Kamarade, notre objectif est de vous offrir une expérience d'apprentissage stimulante et enrichissante. Nous comprenons l'importance de maîtriser les langues pour élargir vos horizons professionnels et personnels, c'est pourquoi nous proposons une variété de services adaptés à vos besoins spécifiques.

 Nos services comprennent :
1 Cours de langues pour adultes: Que vous soyez débutant ou que vous souhaitiez perfectionner vos compétences linguistiques, nos cours sont conçus pour répondre à vos objectifs individuels. Avec des programmes flexibles et interactifs, vous pouvez apprendre à votre propre rythme, tout en bénéficiant du soutien personnalisé de nos instructeurs expérimentés.

2 Aide aux devoirs pour enfants: Nous offrons un soutien scolaire individualisé pour aider les enfants à exceller dans leurs études et à surmonter les difficultés éventuelles rencontrées à l'école. Nos tuteurs qualifiés fournissent une assistance adaptée à chaque enfant, favorisant ainsi leur réussite académique et leur développement personnel.

3 Cours en petits groupes pour adultes: Nos cours en petits groupes permettent une interaction sociale enrichissante tout en garantissant un suivi personnalisé. Avec un maximum de trois participants par session, chaque apprenant bénéficie d'une attention individuelle de qualité, favorisant ainsi un apprentissage collaboratif et efficace.

 Chez Kamarade, nous croyons fermement à l'importance de la communication claire et précise dans l'apprentissage des langues. C'est pourquoi notre approche met l'accent sur l'acquisition d'une prononciation précise et phonétique, vous permettant de vous exprimer avec confiance dans n'importe quelle situation.

Name: Professional Masonry
Description:
Of the more than 15,000 masonry contractors in the United States, Donnie Williams knows that only a handful are at the elite level where they have mastered everything they need to know and do to be successful. The rest are stressing, worrying, and not sleeping because they don't know where to turn.

In Professional Masonry: Welcome to a Full Night's Sleep, Donnie humbly shares, in precise detail, everything that he has learned to help you be successful and stress free in your masonry business. His patented 39 processes will revolutionize how you operate your business and dramatically increase your capacity and your profits. But it may be his personal story of overcoming addiction so that he could continue his family's legacy in masonry, and his closing tips on how to practice mindfulness to take control of your thoughts and actions, that will truly transform who you are and can still become, as a mason and as a person. 

Discover how there are no shortcuts in business or in life -- and learn how you can create an enduring legacy of your very own.

Name: El regalo que no pedí
Description:
Esta historia es un testimonio para todos, tanto para quienes estén viviendo momentos difíciles como para aquellos que solo buscan aprender a vivir en plenitud y ser felices. A través de sus páginas te darás cuenta de que la vida no es increíble porque ya lo sea, sino porque en tus manos está hacerla así, aun en los momentos de tormenta.

El regalo que no pedí muestra cómo la vivencia más dolorosa te enseña una forma increíble de vivir.

Léelo y descubre los regalos que la vida te está dando sin que tú los pidas!

Name: Gin The Elevated Vodka

Name: "The Safety Salesman"
Description:
If you're in the health and safety game and want to know more about how to "sell" and not "tell" your approach more effectively then these books might just be for you.

Written in a light-hearted and conversational style with (lots) of pop culture references and tales from the author's life and times scattered throughout, "The Safety Salesman" books encourage you to not be the "clipboard-totting, high-viz wearing safety plod no-one wants to talk to" and embrace a more modern and engaging style.

These books are NOT textbooks and they don't take themselves too seriously. But the underlying messages are there just the same. You just have to learn to look for them...

Name: NotiSeoton
Description:
NotiSeoton est une entreprise dédiée à la promotion de la lecture chez les enfants. Nous croyons en l'importance de la littérature jeunesse dans le développement cognitif, émotionnel et social des enfants. Notre mission est d'inspirer et d'éveiller la passion pour la lecture dès le plus jeune âge.

Nous proposons une expérience unique grâce à notre service d'abonnement de livres pour enfants. Chaque mois, nous sélectionnons avec soin une collection de livres adaptés à différents groupes d'âge, allant de la petite enfance jusqu'à l'âge de huit ans. Nous nous efforçons de garantir une variété de genres, de styles et de thèmes pour élargir les horizons de lecture des enfants.

Chez NotiSeoton, nous attachons une grande importance à la qualité des livres que nous proposons. Notre équipe, dirigée par Nathalie Le Breton, journaliste et spécialiste de la parentalité, effectue une recherche approfondie pour identifier les meilleurs ouvrages de littérature jeunesse. Nous croyons que chaque livre peut éveiller l'imagination, nourrir la curiosité et contribuer à l'épanouissement des enfants.

Nous comprenons que chaque enfant est unique et nous cherchons à personnaliser chaque box pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque abonné. En tenant compte de l'âge, des intérêts et des préférences de chaque enfant, nous créons une expérience de lecture sur mesure qui favorise l'amour de la lecture et la découverte de nouveaux mondes.

Chez NotiSeoton, nous accordons une grande importance à la confidentialité des données de nos clients. Nous nous engageons à protéger la vie privée des familles qui utilisent nos services. Toutes les données personnelles sont traitées de manière confidentielle et ne sont en aucun cas partagées avec des tiers.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure littéraire ! Ensemble, nous pouvons cultiver le plaisir de la lecture chez les enfants et stimuler leur imagination pour un avenir rempli de découvertes et de connaissances.

La librairie indépendante française doit faire face à de nombreux défis. 

Les chiffres sont éloquents.
1% : c’est la marge nette du secteur de la librairie, qui est l’un des moins rentables du commerce de détail.
22% : c’est la part de marché e-commerce dans le secteur du livre.

Face aux défis croissants des librairies indépendantes, Pageliae propose une alternative unique et solidaire aux géants du e-commerce.

L’engagement de Pageliae est clair : soutenir la pérennité des librairies de proximité en s’adaptant aux nouveaux usages de consommation des lecteurs.

Pageliae, c’est un projet de e-librairie engagée. Pageliae s’engage à reverser 30% des bénéfices à un fonds de dotation dédié au développement et à la pérennité des librairies indépendantes.

Pageliae offre aux lecteurs la commodité de l'achat en ligne tout en transformant chaque acquisition en un geste solidaire et significatif. C'est une synergie vertueuse où la passion de la lecture rime avec la préservation d'un métier primordial pour la culture française et le dynamisme de nos centres-villes.

Abonnez-vous sur Linkedin, Instagram, Tiktok ou le podcast « Se (re)Lancer » pour suivre toutes les étapes de ce projet qui verra le jour fin 2025 !

Instead, we use advanced technology, such as deep learning and various computer vision techniques to place your kid into their own unique superhero origin story involving faeries and trolls!

All you need to do is simply upload a set of pictures of your child from your phone or computer - you can even pull directly from your social media accounts! Their images are stylized to appear as if they'd been drawn right into the story.

While Emily is a fictitious character, the highly accomplished people she interviews are very real. The hard-won expertise, wisdom, and abundant science they share with Emily are sure to resonate with you as you navigate your own career and personal life journey.

Along the way you will discover:

- Why it was essential to redefine generosity to make it more available for all. 
- Why generosity, as we define it, is a superpower and will ignite personal success.
- Generosity’s role in fostering emotional well-being, purpose-fueled happiness, confidence, and passion.
- How generosity is defining the next generation of leaders.
- The importance of self-generosity and why it compounds your ability to help others.
- Why technology is accelerating the benefits and power of generosity.

Authors Monte Wood and Nicole F. Roberts passionately believe that generosity is core to comprehensive success of every kind. The clear path they chart in these pages begins with one insight; you have the power.
 
Prepare yourself for radical new perspectives and a profound impact far greater than you might imagine. Be courageous!

Name: Magiske Briller
Description:
"Prinsesser bruger ikke briller"
- blev starten på et eventyr ...
Idéen til Magiske Briller-universet opstod, da min datter Isabella tilbage i sommeren 2022 fik briller.

Ret hurtigt derefter, fortalte Isabella at hun var ked af at have fået briller fordi "at prinsesser og ballerinaer ikke bruger briller". Det gjorde ondt i mit hjerte at høre, og jeg gik straks igang med at forsøge at finde eventyrlige bøger om prinsesser med briller, men udvalget var yderst begrænset. Den dag opstod idéen til Brilleprinsessen og Magiske Briller-universet. Et univers, som børn med (og uden) briller forhåbentligt kan spejle sig i. For briller er for alle - også prinsesser og superhelte. 

Med Magiske Briller ønsker jeg at kunne bidrage til endnu mere diversitet i børnelitteraturen/eventyruniverset, samt at kunne skrue op for brilleglæden hos de mange skønne børn med briller.

Name: Use Case Magazine
Description:
It’s been 17 years since a document describing “peer-to-peer electronic cash” was published on a cypherpunk mailing list.

But people still ask: What’s all this stuff used for, anyway?

You’ll find four main answers in the inaugural issue of Use Case magazine: Bitcoin, which started it all; stablecoins, which Wall Street (now) says are the future of finance; open-source culture, which underpins the entire cryptocurrency world; and finance reinvented, the primitives of our onchain economy.

Today, corporations and countries are stockpiling bitcoin; the decentralized infrastructure of the previous decade and a half is finally being put to work; and banks and financial institutions are figuring out how to move dollars, equities, and more onchain.

None of this happened overnight. Our hope is that Use Case explains how we got here, and what comes next.

Building wealth is one thing—keeping it and making it last is another. Two-Comma Wealth is for high-income earners, entrepreneurs, professionals, and retirees with a sizeable nest egg who want to maximize their financial success while avoiding costly mistakes that erode wealth.

This book delivers advanced wealth-building strategies used by top investors and financial professionals to optimize taxes, build resilient investment portfolios, and create a lasting financial legacy. Through real-world case studies, behavioral insights, and SWIM Lessons (Stefanou Wealth & Investment Management insights), you’ll gain clear, actionable steps to take control of your money with confidence.

 Inside, You’ll Learn:
 Tax Optimization for High Earners & Retirees – Reduce tax burdens with Roth conversions, tax-efficient investing, and strategic asset placement.
 The Multi-Lane Highway of Investing – Balance risk and growth with a diversified, structured portfolio suited for different life stages.
 Avoiding Lifestyle Creep – How to enjoy wealth without overspending or falling into financial traps.
 Estate & Legacy Planning – Protect your assets from probate and ensure your wealth benefits future generations.

Two-Comma Wealth is more than financial theory—it’s a blueprint for long-term financial security, smarter investing, and generational wealth. Whether you’re an entrepreneur, executive, or retiree managing a significant portfolio, this book provides the proven strategies used by financially successful individuals to grow and protect their wealth.

Name: Portraits of Ukraine A Nation at War
Description:
The Wall Street Journal hails Portraits of Ukraine A Nation At War as an important new book providing readers a comprehensive analysis into the realities of the brutal 2022 Russian invasion within the context of Ukraine’s history, arts, culture, traditions, and geography. Enhanced with over 300 stunning photos, readers will gain an understanding of the people of Ukraine at this critical geopolitical juncture. All profits go to pro-Ukrainian charities helping the war relief effort. This is the Ukraine war book you want in your collection. If you're looking for Ukrainian gifts or you're just into books on Ukraine, buy this one. The constitution of Ukraine is older than the USSR, which is one of many cool facts in our Ukraine war photo book to counter Russian propaganda.

Ukrainian resistance stories = Real stories from real people that will help you learn the truth and resist Russian propaganda being spread. Go back even further and learn the Ancient history of Ukraine. This is a Ukraine history book for beginners. Kids, teens and adults will all love this book.

Learn about Ukraine and why it's worth defending.= Ukraine is a distinct country with its own culture separate from Russian culture and identity. Ukraine military patches 2022 are valuable rewards for those defending their country. One of our chapters even contains a Ukrainian soldier diary and a Ukrainian volunteer medic story to read.

Groundbreaking new book on Ukraine that features a Further Reading section where you can check out some great historical books in Ukrainian language and popularly translated worldwide. Learn about the Medieval Ukraine history and the Ukraine revolution 2014.

Award-winning book telling the Ukrainian tale of freedom and providing a Ukraine war strategy analysis so vital to winning the Ukraine war. Go back further in history and see that this is also a Ukraine Cossack history book and History of Kyiv book.

Name: Rediscovered Books
Description:
Bruce and Laura DeLaney opened Rediscovered Books in September of 2006 to create a place where people could find books and conversation. Since then, Rediscovered Books has grown into Boise's favorite independent bookstore.

Through an expert staff ready to help match people with the right books, great author events, and an ever growing online experience, Rediscovered Books brings the community together. 

With this love of community, books, and reading in mind, Bruce and Laura took over the small bookstore on 13th and State, now known as Once and Future Books. The all used bookstore provides gently used books at great prices as well as a cozy atmosphere with treasures around every corner. 

In the fall of 2019, Rediscovered Books added a second location in Caldwell to spread the love of books and reading farther across the Treasure Valley.  They are excited to help the community in Caldwell grow, starting with a love and passion for reading and books. 

Rediscovered Books is dedicated to helping get books into the hands of children in Idaho and supply many of the Valley's school libraries with great reads. Community book clubs register through the store, and Redicovered hosts and organizes the Human Rights Book Club.  

Rediscovered Books believes that the Treasure Valley is a place with fervent readers who are excited about books.

Name: FAFA Bouquinerie Café
Description:
FAFA : OÙ LES LIVRES ET L'IMAGINATION SE RENCONTRENT
Cette bouquinerie-café, bien plus qu'un simple commerce, est imprégnée de l'amour de l'accueil et du plaisir de recevoir. Nous mettons un point d'honneur à créer un espace convivial où chacun∙e peut se sentir chez soi, où les liens se tissent aussi facilement que les pages d'un livre se tournent.

Notre sélection de livres d'occasion, aussi large que possible avec un petit plaisir pour les littératures de l'imaginaire, propose également des œuvres d'auteur·es français·es, issues de petites maisons d'édition ou d'autoédition. Nous croyons en la richesse et la diversité de la création littéraire, et nous souhaitons offrir à nos visiteur·euse la possibilité de découvrir des trésors méconnus qui sauront les transporter vers de nouveaux horizons.

LE 18ÈME, UNE ÉVIDENCE
Implantée au cœur du dynamique 18ème arrondissement, FAFA s'inscrit dans la diversité et le foisonnement culturel de Marx Dormoy. Nous aspirons à devenir un véritable lieu de vie, à l'image des habitant·es de ce quartier vibrant et éclectique. Notre ambition est de créer un espace inclusif, où chacun·e se sent le·a bienvenu·e, où la culture et le partage sont les maîtres-mots.

FAFA, L'ÂME DU LIEU
Je m'appelle Slim. J'ai 32 ans. Depuis l'enfance, je suis tombé sous le charme envoûtant du monde de l'imaginaire, où chaque page tournée offre un refuge empreint de merveilleux. Mes premiers pas dans cet univers magique ont été guidés par Fafa, ma mère, qui m'apportait des trésors littéraires en fin de vie de la bibliothèque locale. Ces livres délaissés ont rapidement pris une place essentielle dans ma vie, nourrissant ma passion pour les récits envoûtants et les mondes fantastiques. L'idée d'une bouquinerie qui rendrait facilement accessible ces trésors littéraires à tous∙tes a germé dans mon esprit, animée par le désir ardent de partager le doux réconfort que peut offrir un livre.

Description:
The Pyramid Principle by John Vallely with Paul Weissenstein

At its heart, The Pyramid Principle is a gift of courage. It is the never-before-told story of John Vallely, showing how one man turned unimaginable pain into a life-giving purpose, surviving the loss of his daughter to cancer and his two battles with the same disease.

A portion of the book’s sales goes directly to pediatric cancer research, transforming its message of hope into concrete support for those battling.

Now available everywhere books are sold. Learn more at thepyramidprinciple.org.

Name: Books For A Better World Sdn Bhd
Description:
Books For A Better World (BFBW) is a social enterprise dedicated to promoting literacy, sustainability, and community impact through books.

We give preloved books a second life by curating them into our self-service bookshops across Malaysia, where readers can discover amazing titles at unbelievably affordable prices. Every purchase directly supports our mission of making books accessible to all while reducing waste.

Beyond our bookshops, we:
	•	 Operate donation programs – making it easy for individuals and corporates to contribute books for a good cause.
	•	 Set up Pages-With-Purpose corners – reading spaces in malls, schools, and public areas to encourage a culture of reading.
	•	 Work with CSR partners – enabling companies to channel their resources into literacy and education initiatives.
	•	 Support communities in need – from schools and refugee learning centres to Orang Asli villages, ensuring books reach those who need them most.

With more than a dozen outlets (and growing!), BFBW is more than just a bookshop — it’s a movement to make reading accessible, sustainable, and impactful.

Great Books. Greater Purpose.

Name: Humans of Books
Description:
Humans of Books is a space where stories, strategy, and community meet. We believe that books are more than products on a shelf—they are ideas, voices, and experiences that shape the way people think, work, and connect. This page is dedicated to exploring that intersection.

Here, you’ll find thoughtful reviews of books across genres, insights into the world of publishing and book marketing, and reflections on the people who bring books to life—authors, publishers, marketers, and of course, readers. Our goal is to highlight not just the pages themselves, but the human effort and imagination behind them.

Whether you’re an industry professional looking to understand trends, an author seeking inspiration, or a reader curious about what to pick up next, Humans of Books offers a mix of practical knowledge and storytelling. Expect conversations on how books find their audience, what makes certain titles stand out, and why the written word continues to hold influence in a digital-first world.

Join us in celebrating the power of books—not just as objects, but as living connections between people and ideas.

Name: Growing Up Aspen

From navigating school plays to dealing with complicated family dynamics, this book captures all that makes Aspen a unique place filled with many adventures. Ready for your own wild ride? Then come meet some of the crazy characters that used to be Aspen and dive headfirst into their world -- buckle up for an extraordinary story about growing up in one of America’s most beloved cities!

Pestil Books aims to find old and forgotten books their new home, inspire new and already existing collections, divert the life paths of books, and create a digital archive of publications.

Taking its main inspiration from the textures of Istanbul, Pestil Books sees books as time machines and seeks for the different worlds at different parts of the world. Name: Destination Employer

#1 on Amazon in *3* Categories!

Consistently, Attract, Recruit, and Retain the Top-Talent in your market and form them into HIGHLY performing teams to create the kind of unfair competitive advantage that keeps your competitors up at night!

Check out the program!

Attract. Recruit. Retain.

If you can’t grow your team, you can’t grow your business.

If you are a Founder, CEO, CIO, CISO, this is the biggest part of your job. Fullstop.

Regardless of overall labor-market conditions, in-demand talent will have options. It is up to you to gain their attention, convince them to join your team, and keep them with you. How do you do that? How do market leaders like Google, Harvard, and Apple consistently achieve this outcome? They cultivate a reputation for being “the place” to grow your career. Potential employees know that if they join those firms they can 10X their career. Said differently, they become Destination Employers.

In this hands-on book, we break down the Destination Employer Methodology into twelve key elements that you can implement within your organization. This is done in an actionable, step-by-step format so you can not only match the industry leader’s strategy but beat them at the game of building world-changing teams.

This will transform how you do business and give you an unfair competitive advantage that will maximize the likelihood of your company crushing growth goals and becoming a Unicorn.

Name: Strong Floor, No Ceiling
Description:
A Vision for America For the Frustrated Majority — A Bold, Unifying Way Forward

America is drifting—and most of us know it. We feel more divided than before, wages have not kept pace with the cost of living, trust in our government is broken, and fewer people than ever believe in the promise of the American Dream. The Strong Floor, No Ceiling approach offers a bold, unifying solution:

A radically moderate plan that combines the best ideas from left and right to rebuild opportunity for every citizen.

Conceived for the frustrated majority—those who want a strong floor for all citizens, a thriving middle class, and a powerful economy—this vision reimagines what’s possible when we stop vilifying one another and start rebuilding together.

From healthcare and education to infrastructure, immigration, and justice, we have crafted a practical roadmap to restore trust, renew shared values, and reignite the American spirit.

Whether you’re politically adrift or just tired of the noise, Strong Floor, No Ceiling is your guide to hope backed by action. If you believe in common sense, shared sacrifice, and solutions that work, you’ll find a home in this movement.

Book available for pre-sale. Visit our website for more information.

Description:
Founded in 1998 in Lake Forest Park, we opened a store in the Ravenna neighborhood of Seattle in 2002, and another in the Seward Park neighborhood in 2016. Third Place Books is a general interest bookstore with over 200,000 new, used, and bargain books in Lake Forest Park and over 40,000 books in Ravenna. It is a fun, comfortable, and safe place to browse, linger, lounge, relax, read, eat, laugh, play, talk, listen, and just watch the world go by.

Sociologist Ray Oldenberg suggests that each of us needs three places: first is the home; second is the workplace or school; and beyond lies the place where people from all walks of life interact, experiencing and celebrating their commonality as well as their diversity. It is a third place. In his celebrated book, The Great Good Place, Oldenberg discusses how the cafes, pubs, town squares, and other gathering places make a community stronger and bring people together.

Name: Cervantes y Cia Libros
Description:
Queremos ser una librería cargada de futuro: una librería como las de antes.

Hubo un tiempo en que los escritores y los artistas eran auténticas estrellas capaces de influir en el espíritu de su época y que no se contentaban con pedir limosna a la actualidad; un tiempo en el que las librerías eran santuarios a los que se acudía buscando mucho más de lo que se puede encontrar en un almacén.

Pensamos en la Shakespeare & Co. de París: editorial, refugio y centro cultural (está claro que nos gustaría ser su equivalente en España). Pensamos en la City Lights de San Francisco, ágora de la revolución beat. En la Librería de los escritores, encabezada por Mijaíl Osorguín, último reducto de libertad e independencia moral en la Rusia del terror.

Pensamos en tantas librerías maravillosas que la rapacidad del presente ha terminado matando para beneficio de unos pocos y desgracia de millones. Librerías entre cuyas estanterías nacieron escritores, artistas, músicos, cineastas, actores, pero también locos, dementes, profetas, políticos y otros Quijotes necesarios para que una sociedad sea libre y sueñe. No hace tanto de ese tiempo. En realidad hace muy poco y puede volver en cualquier momento, aunque algunos nos quieran hacer creer que ayer fue hace mil años para que compremos la última novedad.

Cambian los nombres que les damos, pero nuestras necesidades son las mismas. Cervantes y Compañía es más que un negocio, es un refugio en medio del caos. Sobre todo en este tiempo, que ya está durando demasiado, de ruido y mercaderes que gritan mucho para no dejarnos leer en paz.

Queremos ser una librería como las de antes: una librería cargada de futuro.

Name: Unleashing Abundant Energy
Description:
Unleashing Abundant Energy
How AI, Innovation & bold Entrepreneurs Will Transform Global Power
 Unleashing Abundant Energy is a timely and comprehensive exploration of our complex energy landscape, offering valuable insights into the technologies and strategies crucial for a sustainable future. From the potential of AI-driven waste management and bioenergy with carbon capture to the evolving roles of nuclear, wind, and solar, Todd Thomas, drawing on his extensive experience in the field, presents a thought leader’s perspective on the challenges and opportunities in rapidly doubling the energy sector. This book is a valuable resource for business leaders, policymakers, and anyone interested in understanding – and shaping – the path toward a cleaner, more resilient energy future. 
 — Nick Bagatelos, Net Zero Envelope

Unleashing an Abundant Energy Revolution
How Breakthrough Technologies Are Transforming the Way We Power the World
 A visionary yet grounded blueprint for the future of energy—one that investors, policymakers, and innovators can’t afford to ignore. Unleashing the Abundant Energy Revolution bridges the gap between technological promise and financial viability, making it essential reading for anyone looking to align capital with long-term climate solutions.
 — Dr. Nishant Dass, Claremont McKenna College

Unleashing an Infinite Future
Innovation, Energy, and the Limitless Potential of the Human Mind
 With the electrification of everything, AI, crypto and data centers, the global energy demand is exploding. This insatiable appetite for energy is overheating the planet. This is not the first existential threat the world has faced, nor will it be the last. Humanities super power will drive the innovations needed to resolve this crisis. The human mind, the intellect, the curiosity, and the drive to understand and improve the world will drive new and bold innovations unleashing limitless power and connectivity around the world and beyond.

Name: Lesestoff Buchhandlungen und Verlage
Description:
Lesestoff Buchhandlungen
Unter dem Dach lesestoff.ch treten Buchhandlungen auf, die sich an ein regionales Publikum richten, oder ganz bestimmte Spezialgebiete anbieten. Die gemeinsame Website deckt vieles ab: Buchkäufe übers Internet, Download von E-Books. 
Stäheli Interlingua, Ziegelbrücke
Zielpublikum Lehrpersonen aus der ganzen Schweiz; Sprachlehrmittel mit Schwergewicht Englisch sowie Deutsch für Fremdsprachige.
BSS Bildungsservice Schweiz
Der BSS richtet sich an Fachhochschulen und Berufsschulen. Als Besonderheit werden den Partnerschulen Shops im Internet zur Verfügung gestellt, wo die Lernenden aus vorbereiteten Listen genau ihre Schulbücher und die nötigen Papeterieartikel bestellen können.  
Schuler Bücher
Buchhandlung mit Standorten im Kanton Graubünden, Chur, Davos, St. Moritz. Spezieller klick & pick Service, am Vortag bestellen und am nächsten Tag vor Ort abholen. An allen Standorten wird das volle Buchsortiment angeboten; St. Moritz hat auch eine grosse Papeterieabteilung.
Baeschlin Bücher
Stammhaus der Lesestoffgruppe, Buchhandlung mit Vollsortiment, aber auch regionaler Ausrichtung, seit 1853 in Glarus.
Kinderbuchladen Zürich
Spezialbuchhandlung beim Münsterplatz; Sortiment Kinderbücher, Jugendbücher aber auch Spielsachen, Lernhilfen usw. Der Kinderbuchladen bietet vieles an, das man nirgendwo sonst findet. 
Lesestoff Verlage
Baeschlin steht für ein Sortiment von anspruchsvollen Kinder- und Jugendbüchern, für Bilderbücher – nicht nur die beliebten «Geissbock Charly» - und für regionale Literatur.
AS-Verlag und Grafik wurde durch Bergbücher bekannt und steht heute auch für «Swissness», Verkehr und Natur. Die Kompetenzen auch im grafischen Bereich ermöglichen auch anspruchsvolle Corporate Publications, beispielswiese zu Firmenjubiläen.
Der Th. Gut Verlag hat Bücher rund um den Zürichsee im Programm und publiziert die Reihe Schweizer Literatur unter «Reprinted by Huber».
Unter «elfundzehn» werden Biographien von Zeitzeugen publiziert.

A literary bookstore for everyone in Denver, CO

Petals & Pages is a queer woman-owned literary bookstore in Denver, CO. It is a place for community to come together over a shared love of literature and the arts. We host author events, book clubs, open mic night, read-a-thons and much more. Check out our event schedule and consider becoming a Petals & Pages member.

Visit us Tuesday-Sunday 11am-6pm. Sappho Coffee will be opening inside Petals & Pages soon!

Name: RAWNAQ LIFE
Description:
We are a library that includes many book titles and sources as well. We provide all Arabic, English, and translated versions.
 
The Bookstore was established with passion and ambition for books and a goal to reach all readers in the world. As a team, we aspire to satisfy all our customers and readers.

Name: S&H Partenaires
Description: Entreprise locale et indépendante, S&H Partenaires s’engage à faire vivre le commerce de proximité avec authenticité et bienveillance. Nos enseignes incarnent une même promesse : des services de qualité, une relation humaine sincère et une présence au cœur de la vie quotidienne.

Name: Article Stand
Description:
New mobile app that allows you tear off and send news & magazine "Topic Articles" to friends and family, when a friend or family member sends you a torn off "Topic/Article" the incoming article will fall on your screen in the "incoming article" section while your using the Article Stand app.

(This app will allow you to read articles from various websites and gives you the ability to tear off articles and send them to other users in the Article Stand app, providing live on screen updates when you receive torn off Newspaper/Magazine articles)

A simple article share platform with widget functionality.

Name: MICREATIVEWELL GLOBAL
Description:
Embark on a literary journey with us, where your ideas are transformed into captivating books that resonate with your voice and vision.

At our esteemed company, we specialize in nurturing the seeds of your creativity, meticulously cultivating them into full-fledged literary masterpieces. We are passionate about empowering authors, from aspiring writers to seasoned veterans, to share their stories with the world.

Our team of experienced ghostwriters, editors, and publishing experts possesses an unparalleled ability to capture the essence of your voice and translate it onto the page. We delve into the depths of your ideas, understanding your motivations, inspirations, and the messages you wish to convey.

Through a collaborative and supportive process, we guide you every step of the way, from brainstorming concepts to crafting compelling narratives. We meticulously refine your manuscript, ensuring your unique voice shines through, captivating readers and leaving a lasting impact.

Whether you envision a captivating novel, an inspiring memoir, or a groundbreaking non-fiction work, we are your trusted partners in bringing your literary aspirations to life. Together, we will transform your mere ideas into full-fledged books that stand as testaments to your creativity and leave an indelible mark on the world of literature.

Embrace the power of storytelling and let your voice be heard.

Name: Epic Table Games
Description:
At Epic Table Games, we offer a diverse selection of captivating RPGs, and gaming accessories. Our mission is to empower players to become the heroes of their own stories, forging legends that will stand the test of time.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to storytelling and immersion. We believe that every game should be an epic adventure, where players can unleash their creativity, face thrilling challenges, and form lasting alliances.

Through collaboration with talented designers and publishing partners, we constantly push the boundaries of innovation. Our games feature meticulously crafted mechanics, captivating narratives, and high-quality components, ensuring an immersive and engaging gaming experience.

Our inclusive and collaborative company culture values diversity and fosters a sense of community. We believe in the power of gaming to bring people together, creating shared memories and connections that last a lifetime.

As we continue to evolve, Epic Table Games remains dedicated to enhancing player experiences, expanding our offerings, and engaging with the gaming community. Join us on this incredible journey and let your gaming legends come to life.

Name: LIBRAIRIE MANAHIL AL IRFANE
Description:
Notre société, sise à lot Alimam No 266 Drarga Agadir est leader dans la distribution des articles scolaires, bureautiques, informatiques, fournitures et mobilier de bureau, travaux d’impression et négoce générale.

A cet effet, nous serons à votre disposition pour mener à bien toute prestation que vous déciderez de nous confier, et vous faire parvenir dans les meilleurs délais notre devis selon vos besoins personnalisés.
Dans l’espoir de retenir votre attention lors de votre prochaines consultations, nous vous prions de croire
chère madame, cher monsieur, en l’assurance de nos sentiments les plus dévoués.

Name: Friends to Lovers Bookstore
Description:
The first romance bookstore in the DC metro area.
Alexandria, VA
 Find what you love

Name: Langoon
Description:
Langoon is a one-stop distributor for literature from over all over the world, catering a growing market of international migrants. The proprietary distribution platform makes books written in a range of languages accessible over conventional metadata transferring standards to any data system capable of retrieving ONIX over the Langoon API. 

The platform currently supports literature sourced from over 200 publishers in 20 different countries and the number is growing.

Name: Chez Bratache Books
Description: Hi there! Chez Bratache, at your service! I am a fiction author located in Augusta, Georgia. I enjoy writing fantasy novels and transparent articles about self-care and my journey as an author.  Simply, I love to write! My goal is to create a diverse and inclusive space inside and outside the walls of my books. Look for more from me in the coming months. Here's to better days, and better books, ahead!

Name: The Folkestone Bookshop
Description:
The Folkestone Bookshop is an independent bookshop located on Tontine Street in our lovely seaside town in Kent.

We are committed to providing a supportive and inclusive space for nurturing new readers, invigorating lifelong bookworms, and creating a welcoming environment for everyone.

The shop is run and owned by Erin, Hunter and Jay, three avid readers with many years professional experience in the bookselling and publishing industry.

We are a resource for radical, diverse, and interesting books, and also a space to host writing workshops, book launches, poetry readings, and many more community events. We are all queer and trans, so the shop is a safe space for anyone and everyone.

Pop down and say hello!

Name: Librairie L’Encrier Spa
Description:
Librairie à Spa
info@lencrier.be

Name: The AI Book Club
Description: The AI Book Club is an AI focused online bookstore. We also run the best book box subscription for AI enthusiasts - bi-monthly & delivered via mail which comes with curated books, skills guides, tutorials & more.

Name: Pamflett
Description:
PAMFLETT mediates artists’ publications with exhibitions, art book fairs, workshops, launches, talks and other events.

Pamflett is a self-publishing workshop and mediation space in Bergen, Norway, available for local artists to use. We organize the annual Bergen Art Book Fair, hosted by Bergen Kunsthall.

Name: Artforum
Description:
Internetový obchod Artforum je jeden z prvých knižných internetových na Slovensku a kníhkupectvo Artforum jedno z mála, ktoré sídli na nezmenenej adrese na Kozej ulici už viac ako 25 rokov. Artforum vzišlo z komunity spriaznených ľudí bez akéhokoľvek obchodného či marketingového vzdelania, prežilo turbulentné deväťdesiate roky aj finančnú krízu a predsa sme si zachovali idealizmus a kritické myslenie.

Nevenujeme sa len predaju kníh, ale aj množstvu neziskových, vzdelávacích či popularizačných aktivít, ktoré sa týkajú literatúry, knižného a kníhkupeckého sveta.

V priestore Artfora a našej príjemnej kaviarne sa odohrali stovky čítačiek, debát, koncertov a výstav, no najmä nespočetné množstvo očakávaných aj neočakávaných stretnutí. Lebo práve ony – v spojení s nezameniteľným výberom kníh – vytvárajú jedinečnú atmosféru Artfora.

Name: BooxClub.mx
Description:
En Booxclub, creamos experiencias literarias únicas con nuestras cajitas literarias. Cada mes, enviamos a los suscriptores una caja cuidadosamente curada que incluye un libro , una sorpresa , y una guía de lectura, además de acceso a nuestro club exclusivo.

Para las empresas, Booxclub es una forma increíble de fortalecer los lazos con sus colaboradores. Al regalar nuestras cajitas, no solo ofreces un bonito obsequio, sino también una experiencia enriquecedora que fomenta la lectura y el bienestar entre tus empleados.

Transforma la experiencia laboral y motiva a tu equipo con un regalo que inspira y conecta. Únete a Booxclub y descubre cómo podemos ayudar a tu empresa a crear un ambiente más unido y motivado!

Descubre más en BooxClub.mx

Name: Safety Dog Diego LLC
Description:
Safety Dog Diego, LLC is a family-inspired brand that centers around the character of Safety Dog Diego, a lively, adventurous, and loving French Bulldog. The company was founded by Angel and Tracey Jimenez, who created the brand to promote safety and well-being through engaging children's stories, and educational tools.

The main storyline behind the brand comes from the real-life experiences of Diego, a French Bulldog who accompanied Angel to construction sites during the Covid lockdown, earning the nickname "Safety Dog Diego." Angel and Tracey decided to turn these experiences into a children's book series to share important lessons about safety with their grandson, Xander, and other children.

Name: Antar's Bookshop
Description: AntarBookShop is a leader in book guiding services as well as providing global brand luggage. Our services and expertise are directed towards the following categories: International & national books & novels, traveler’s luggage,office supplies, art materials, Copy & Print, school supplies. Our wide book collection contains various sections devoted to our customers' book preference. The collection includes topics on politics, the middle east, art, islamic art & history, architecture, decoration, graphic design, bestseller novels, pocket books, children books, classics,poems, and way more! AntarBookShop was founded in 1991, and today is one of the leading bookshops in southern Lebanon. With 33 years of experience, our lifelong goal is to direct our readers and customers towards the most suited service & product.

Name: Kalynonka
Description:
Welcome to Kalynonka - the first official Ukrainian bookstore in Scandinavia!

Our mission is to simplify access to the favorite books of Ukrainians, even thousands of kilometers from home. We aim for every Ukrainian, no matter where they are, to find a literary corner that reminds them of their homeland.

Kalynonka offers a wide range of books across various genres – from classic literature to contemporary bestsellers, from children’s tales to scientific publications. We have something for everyone.

We understand how crucial culture and language are for preserving national identity, which is why our bookstore serves as a cultural bridge between Ukraine and Scandinavia. Our books help not only to maintain a connection with native culture but also to promote it among our friends and colleagues in Sweden and other Scandinavian countries.

We invite you to our bookstore, where every page carries a piece of the Ukrainian heart and soul. Feel the warmth and comfort of your native language with Kalynonka!

Name: Magazine Run Bien Naître
Description:
Run Bien Naître est un magazine numérique trimestriel fraîchement lancé en mars 2024, dédié à l'accompagnement des futurs et jeunes parents dans leur parcours périnatal. 

Nous offrons des conseils pertinents, un annuaire de professionnels du bien-être, des activités créatives pour les enfants, des méditations audio pour la famille, ainsi qu'un soutien continu à nos lecteurs fidèles, le tout regroupé dans un seul média. 
Nos professionnels sur le terrain assurent également des ateliers et des événements familiaux.

Name: Grit and Gratitude Book
Description: Grit and Gratitude is a transformative journey through stories of resilience, personal growth, and the power of gratitude. Co-authored by experts in personal development, this book reveals how grit and a grateful mindset can turn challenges into triumphs. Each chapter is packed with real-life experiences, practical tips, and empowering insights that inspire readers to embrace inner strength, overcome obstacles, and build a more fulfilling life. Whether you seek motivation, coping strategies, or a fresh perspective on life’s ups and downs, Grit and Gratitude offer a roadmap to lasting growth and joy. Perfect for readers on the path to self-improvement, resilience, and emotional well-being.

Name: Sidetrack Bookshop
Description: Sidetrack Bookshop, in Royal Oak, MI, offers a mission-driven, curated selection of new fiction and nonfiction, chosen to share comfort and laughter and to build community and compassion with readers of all ages and identities.

Name: Words On Warren
Description:
Words on Warren Bookshop is a warm, family-friendly children focused bookshop in the heart of Tribeca, dedicated to inspiring a lifelong love of reading. 

With thoughtfully curated shelves filled with stories for young readers of all ages, the shop invites children and families to explore, imagine, and connect. But beyond being a bookstore—it’s a vibrant community hub. 

Scattered throughout the shop, there will be typewriters that invite visitors to share their thoughts, dreams, and reflections. Each year, these heartfelt contributions will be compiled and published, creating a unique book that fosters empathy and celebrates the voices of our diverse community. 

We aim to help cultivate a generation of readers, as books offer the most profound and accessible way to step into someone else’s shoes. 

In a world where understanding and empathy seem to slip further away each day, we truly believe books have the power to bridge divides and remind us of our shared humanity.

Name: The Power of Soft Skills in Sales
Description: "From Tech to Trust: The Power of Soft Skills in Sales" is a podcast that dives deep into the transformative impact of soft skills in the world of technical sales. Hosted by Evgeniy Kharam, the show brings together thought leaders, industry experts, and sales professionals to discuss how mastering soft skills can enhance communication, build stronger relationships, and ultimately drive sales success. Inspired by Evgeniy's book Architecting Success: The Art of Soft Skills in Technical Sales, this podcast serves as a valuable resource for sales professionals, founders, and anyone looking to unlock their full potential in the business world. Tune in to learn actionable insights and strategies that will help you navigate the ever-evolving landscape of sales with confidence and trust.

Name: Librería Submundo
Description:
Submundo: la librería donde los libros cobran vida. 

En Submundo encontrarás los libros que inspiraron tus películas, series y anime favoritos, así como las novelas basadas en ellos. Desde clásicos como Harry Potter o Las crónicas de Narnia, hasta novedades como libros de recetas e  ilustrados y pop up. También tenemos libros de arte, curiosidades, datos,  biografías y mucho más. 

Visita nuestra web y descubre el mundo mágico que se esconde tras las pantallas. Submundo: la librería de los amantes del cine, las series y la animación.

Name: Paint Your Store Book
Description:
Welcome to Paint Your Store, where job searching meets strategy, personal branding, and the power of networking.

In today’s job market, your career isn’t just about sending resumes—it’s about standing out, building relationships, and becoming the subject matter expert of YOU. Whether you’re looking for your next career move, launching a business, or securing new clients, your personal brand is your storefront—and it’s time to paint it boldly.

Authored by Craig Fisher, a pioneer in talent attraction and career networking, Paint Your Store walks you through proven methods to:

 Build a powerful personal brand that attracts opportunities
 Leverage LinkedIn and other digital tools to showcase your expertise
 Use the L.A.K.E. approach to pivot, transition, and land roles you love
 Network with confidence and turn connections into career opportunities

Your job search shouldn’t feel like a never-ending grind. With the right strategy, the right visibility, and the right story, opportunities will start finding YOU.

Are you ready to stop chasing jobs and start attracting them? Let’s paint your store.

Explore the book. Embrace the strategy. Elevate your career.

Name: Moon Lane
Description:
Moon Lane includes four physical bookshops, a school supply and book consultancy, annual literary festivals and a wide range of other initiatives promoting a life-long love of books.

Moon Lane believes that the lack of diversity in the UK publishing industry leads to a singular dominant voice in our cultural conversation, limiting empathy, understanding, integration and social mobility.  We work to address this by bridging the gap between the UK’s brilliantly diverse population and UK publishing, in order to ensure that every child sees themselves represented in our children’s book ranges.

Our initiatives include highlighting and celebrating the work of authors and illustrators from under-represented groups, ensuring a route to market for more diverse titles, working closely with schools in our communities to drive the vital conversation about inclusion in children’s books, and creating opportunities for young people from a more diverse range of backgrounds, to access careers in bookselling and publishing.

Name: Kool Skool
Description:
Books are not only sources of knowledge and fun, but they can also bring a family together. So, if you want to buy books in India for your toddler’s bedtime story sessions or get one that your kid can read aloud to you while curled up at your side on the sofa, Koolskool is here to help. As an emerging bookstore in India, we have an extensive catalogue of books spanning different genres for people of all ages. 
Whether for family night or a quiet rainy day of solo reading, we can guarantee you'll find the book you need right here. Aside from the categories of story books online for toddlers, children, and adults, we also have graphic novels, boxed sets, activity and reference books, and books written in the native Hindi language.

Name: SisStore Joy Christian Bookstore
Description: The SisStore Joy Christian Bookstore features Christian Black Women authors and artisans in a bookstore located in the historic Fifth Ward of Houston, Texas and online.  Situated inside of a residential neighborhood, the SisStore Joy Christian Bookstore holds space for faith, sisterhood, and culture.  With a diverse collection of books and gifts, the SisStore Joy Christian Bookstore is poised to be a one-of-its-kind experience.

Name: Ughi snc
Description: La cartolibreria/edicola Ughi snc situata a Odolo è un negozio specializzato nella vendita di articoli di cartoleria e cancelleria. Si trova in una posizione strategica, nel centro del paese, e offre una vasta selezione di prodotti per soddisfare le esigenze di studenti, professionisti e appassionati di scrittura e disegno e aziende. All'interno della cartolibreria è possibile trovare un'ampia varietà di materiale. Sono disponibili diversi marchi e modelli per permettere ai clienti di scegliere tra diverse opzioni in base alle proprie preferenze e necessità, Offriamo servizi di plastificazione, fotocopie e rilegatura per soddisfare diverse esigenze.

Name: Philippine Books
Description:
Philippine Books is an online bookstore dedicated to Filipinos searching for their roots. We focus on Filipiniana or books on the Philippines. We are based in New Jersey in the US and Quezon City in the Philippines.

We are proud of our selection of titles, including latest arrivals, longtime bestsellers, and rare books on food, history, culture, and art. Our promise is to provide a well-curated collection of titles and the best customer service to our clients.

Name: Sarah's Books
Description:
I've always been the friend people call when they need a book recommendation. I get it—finding the right book at the right moment is a small kind of magic .

So I built this: a digital version of my bookshelves, searchable and powered by AI that knows my taste. My 200 curated books are the foundation, but now you can build your own library too—upload photos of your books, track what you want to read, and get personalized recommendations based on both our collections.

It's a living library that grows as we both read, with a discovery engine to help us find what's next. And when you're ready to buy, I hope you'll support a local bookstore—they're the heartbeat of our communities.

Happy reading, friends.

Name: ReBooked
Description:
Headquartered in Hong Kong, ReBooked is an award-winning non-profit social enterprise that encourages the reuse and redistribution of children's books. 

Since ReBooked's soft launch of its online store in August 2019, it has collected over 200,000 books, sold over 45,000, donated over 40,000 (to our community and NGO partners), and recycled over 35,000. In April 2021, we opened a retail store strategically located in Hong Kong's commercial district. 

Locally, ReBooked has a presence in primary and secondary schools through 5+ 'school chapters,' initiating book collections and education-related programs led by students. ReBooked has also expanded to branches in Brazil and Turkey, and a dynamic community outreach and literacy program in the Philippines.

Name: ICONIC.
Description: *un mélange de mode, luxe, beauté, business : toute l'actualité mode à ne pas rater !

Name: Pluma Errante Casa Editorial
Description:
Pluma Errante – Voces que merecen mundo 

Somos una editorial independiente con sede en Bogotá, Colombia, dedicada a descubrir, publicar y difundir las voces emergentes de América Latina.

Nuestro propósito es dar un hogar a aquellas obras que, aunque han recibido reconocimiento —incluso premios literarios—, aún no han encontrado el alcance y la visibilidad que merecen.

En Pluma Errante creemos en la curaduría detallista y artesanal, en la edición cuidadosa y en el compromiso de entregar a los lectores libros que no solo se leen, sino que permanecen.

Más que publicar libros, construimos puentes entre autores con talento y lectores curiosos que buscan historias nuevas, auténticas y memorables.

 Qué ofrecemos:

Publicación y distribución de autores emergentes.

Ediciones de alta calidad, pensadas en el detalle.

Experiencias de lectura que inspiran y dejan huella.

En Pluma Errante, las historias errantes encuentran su puerto seguro.

Name: Read Books & Improve Your Life
Description:
We are an online books store and provide home delivery service.
पुस्तक सुचिको लागी यहाँ shorturl.at/aCEVZ क्लिक गर्नुहोस.

Name: Planjeweek.nl
Description: Bij Planjeweek.nl vind je een divers aanbod aan super overzichtelijke en prikkelarme dag- en weekplanners, speciaal ontwikkeld om jou te helpen meer overzicht, structuur en rust te krijgen in het dagelijks leven. Deze planners zijn perfect inzetbaar als ondersteuning tijdens behandeling, revalidatie of herstel en helpen jou heel precies te plannen. Ideaal als overzichtelijk hulpmiddel om je energie te leren verdelen of als je wilt werken aan een nieuwe dag- of weekstructuur. Kies uit een fysieke planner of uit de ideale digitale downloads en printables en ga direct van start. Shop daarnaast ook uit het ruime assortiment Pilot FriXion uitwisbare pennen en markeerstiften (onmisbaar om écht onbezorgd en flexibel te kunnen plannen), STABILO markers en handige accessoires zoals etuis, penlusjes, zelfklevende insteekhoekjes en meer. Een eigen planner of agenda op maat gemaakt voor jouw bedrijf? Neem gerust contact op en ik help je graag.

Name: HopeForHeroes.com
Description:
Welcome to Hope for Heroes 
We empower first responders with top-tier training materials to excel in their roles. From actionable  books and engaging  DVDs to interactive  webinars, we provide tools to lead, grow, and thrive. Ready to take your skills to the next level? Discover more below!

 What We Offer
At Hope for Heroes, we believe in equipping first responders with the knowledge and resources they need to succeed. Here’s how we make a difference:

 Books – Packed with actionable insights to help you overcome challenges and lead with confidence.
 Training DVDs – Real-world scenarios brought to life for practical learning.
 Webinars – Interactive sessions to connect, learn, and grow.
 Articles – Stay up-to-date with leadership strategies and resilience tips.
 Why Choose Us?
First responders face unique challenges, and we’re here to help. Whether you’re navigating high-pressure situations or developing your leadership skills, our materials are designed to:

Boost your confidence and capability.
Foster resilience and adaptability.
Empower you to lead effectively and inspire those around you.
 Our Mission
We are passionate about serving those who serve. By providing exceptional training materials, we help first responders stay engaged, proactive, and prepared for the challenges of today and tomorrow.

 Join the Community
Thousands of first responders trust Hope for Heroes for their professional growth. Let us help you achieve your goals and make an even greater impact.

Name: Graham Keavney's Children's Books
Description:
Flamingo Island is Graham's first children's book, available in December 2024!
The idea came to him during a trip to Aruba with his wife celebrating their 20th anniversary, watching the Flamingos interact with all the people.
We hope you, and your children, enjoy this story!

Name: Cheap Book Depot
Description: Welcome to our bookstore! We believe that reading should be accessible to everyone, which is why we offer a wide range of books at affordable prices. From bestsellers to classics, we have something for everyone. Follow us for updates on new arrivals, special promotions, and reading recommendations.

Name: BooksontheRise
Description:
A unique independent books and record store offering a curated selection of books and music as well as a vibrant cultural programme. We welcome local book clubs, authors, publishers and businesses to work with us. Please contact the manager patrick@booksontherise.com to hire space or join mailing list.

What makes the people at Books on the Rise different is our long-term commitment to pluralistic publishing and widening the culture to include voices from the margins. Our store is also home to indie publishers, Aurora Metro, with the Supernova, River Light and Amber Lane Press imprints. With three decades of experience publishing both new and renowned authors, we are book makers as well as book sellers. See more at  www.aurorametro.com.

The campaign to create a statue of Virginia Woolf in Richmond was led by the bookshop owners, Cheryl and Steve Robson, and volunteers at sister company, the charity Aurora Metro Arts and Media. www.aurorametro.org.uk
We are also the proud organisers of Feminist Book Fortnight running annually in May.

Name: HENT STORE - Bouquiniste Pau - Béarn Bigorre Landes Pays Basques
Description: Bienvenue chez HENT STORE, votre bouquiniste passionnée opérant à Pau, Tarbes, Bayonne et Mont de Marsan. Nous vous offrons un service d'achat permanent de livres, qu'ils soient anciens ou modernes, par lots et bibliothèques complètes. Actuellement, nous sommes ravis de proposer nos services aux habitants des Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Landes et Hautes-Pyrénées. Quelle que soit la raison de votre séparation avec vos livres, que ce soit suite à une succession, un déménagement ou un manque de place, nous sommes là pour vous avec un paiement comptant rapide. Explorez notre univers littéraire riche en trésors et laissez-nous donner une nouvelle vie à vos livres et revues d'occasion.  #Bouquiniste #AchatDeLivres #PyrénéesAtlantiques

Name: Livrarias Logos - λόγος
Description: As Livrarias Logos, foi concebida com o objetivo de proporcionar cultura e conhecimento por meio de livros e materiais de educação. Entendemos portanto, que a nossa missão é ser um facilitador na busca pelo saber.

Name: RAIslands
Description: Raislands is a news hub for Artificial Intelligence related hot topics. We explore the impact of AI on people and how to make best use of it.

Name: Stanza Books
Description:
A stanza
welcomes you,
invites you in,
guides you room by room, 
unraveling its meaning as it goes.

Name: buku library
Description: buku is your cozy escape into the world of books, we are an online bookstore where you can find more than 10,000 unique original books in English and Arabic, we ship to all cities in Morocco, and our goal is to build human beings by reviving the relationship between the book and its owner, believing that every reader is a leader tomorrow.

Name: RIK Services Limited (Trinidad Book World)
Description:
In 1975,the formation of a new company – R.I.K. Services Limited  developed into a major enterprise throughout the country with seven branches. R.I.K. Services Limited is a major supplier of books & stationery to schools throughout the country via the Ministry of Education, as well as attending to the needs of numerous government and private industries.

On entering any store one can find novels, short stories, cookbooks, self help and entertainment material adorning its shelves. It is also home to a wide range of local, Caribbean and international authors. This milieu of rich literature is just what R.I.K. Services Limited provides, along with a whole line of other treats to spark thoughts of our heritage, raise an appreciation for history and improve on our reading skills.

Thousands of local & foreign customers visit the seven branches each year. As a major contributor to the growth of literacy in Trinidad & Tobago, R.I.K. Services Limited is proud to be referred to as “Trinidad Book World” after more than forty years in the industry.

Name: APHILIA
Description:
APHILIA is a monthly book subscription delivering curated new releases straight to your door.

Explore our monthly subscription and prepaid packages, as well as shop our past selections directly on our website.

Name: Librairie Herbes folles
Description:
La librairie Herbes folles propose une offre qualitative de romans, de romans graphiques, d’essais et de littérature jeunesse. 
Vous y trouverez aussi une sélection de plantes vertes de qualité à petit prix, ainsi qu'un espace convivial pour prendre une boisson en feuilletant des livres. 
La librairie propose aussi des événements littéraires, culturels et artistiques. Cliquez sur la page événements, suivez-nous sur les réseaux sociaux ou abonnez-vous à notre newsletter.

Name: TheBookBundler
Description: TheBookBundler is a company based out of 1200 Dinwiddie Ave, Richmond, Virginia, United States.

Name: Fonts Books & Gifts
Description: McLean's independent bookstore - now open!

Name: Katib Library
Description: A public open library project initiated to get book donation, fund and contribution from local community to promote culture of reading, borrowing, donating and valuing books.

Name: Australian Coin Review
Description: One of the longest running numismatic publications in the world. Recently acquired by Imperial Group and under the management of Scott Waterman, one of Australia's leading numismatists.

Name: CHRISTIAN BOOK FAIR
Description: CHRISTIAN BOOK FAIR is an individual & family services company based out of Mckinney, Texas, United States.

Name: Addison's
Librairie Hannenorak
Description: Librairie générale agréée située au 87, boul. Bastien à Wendake (Québec)  G0A 4V0

Name: De Queer Boekenkast
Description:
De Queer Boekenkast is the only 100% queer bookstore in the Netherlands, located in Alkmaar. Opened in March 2023, the bookstore offers a curated selection of queer literature and hosts community events. After Valentijn's  untimely passing, Thomas continued their shared dream, transforming the store into a tribute to Valentijn

From newborns and children to grandparents and adults, our titles span themes like birthdays, holidays, family legacies, and milestone moments. Each book is crafted with care, printed on demand, and shipped globally—with fulfillment centers in the USA, Australia, Canada, New Zealand, and the UK. 
My Story Tale

Our Mission
At Big Book Wholesale, our mission is clear and unwavering: to provide access to fantastic books while delivering unparalleled customer service. We firmly believe that the magic of reading should be within everyone's reach, and we're dedicated to making it happen.

Our Derby-based warehouse is brimming with books that span every genre, from classic literature to contemporary bestsellers, ensuring that our customers have access to the stock they need.

Our commitment to our customers is unwavering. We are dedicated to building lasting relationships with suppliers and customers, working together to provide a better experience for all.

Name: Sinners in the Hands of a Loving God
Description:
Long before you and I were born, more than a millennia ago, believers in Jesus were filled with love for God and each other. The "fire and brimstone" theology we are familiar with today emerged during the Dark Ages. Beforehand, generations of Christians were joyful with an ever-present comfort in God's grace and forgiveness. They didn't believe in an angry God who judged and punished them with eternal separation from Him.

This book is a clarion call for believers to re-take the biblical truth of a God who is love and seeks only to save and not condemn. The author sheds new light and a fresh perspective on God's original plan and His enduring love for each of us.

Lectura y resistencia desarrolla toda una línea de trabajo profesional dedicada a la escritura fantasma y los libros por encargo. Podrá tener escrito, impreso y publicado el manuscrito en que lleva pensando tanto tiempo. Póngase en contacto con Lectura y resistencia – Libros por encargo para enviarnos sus consultas.

Australian Christian Resources is an Australian owned business with a history dating back to 1913, when the Lutheran Church of Australia formed the Lutheran Publishing House.

ACR exists to provide high quality Christian resources that will enrich you in your personal faith journey, and equip and enhance the ministry activities of your church.

Mission and ministry is at the heart of ACR.  From a warehouse in Sydney, we are excited to serve Christians of all denominations, as well as non-Christians who perhaps have an interest to learn more about the Good News.  Every person of every age should explore who Jesus Christ was and is.  He claimed to be God.  It's awesome when you discover for yourself that He was telling the truth!  Your life will be better, now and forever.

Every outfit we choose, every detail we carefully adjust, they talk about who we are and what we want to convey to the world. When you dress with confidence, you not only feel better about yourself, but you also affect the way others see you. The self-confidence that comes with knowing you're well-dressed is second to none. Success is not only about achieving professional goals, but also about achieving your own self-esteem and the way you interact with the world around you.

Name: La Purisima Book Club
Description: Welcome to the La Purisima Book Club Facebook Page, where we pay homage to the rich heritage and diverse stories of the La Purisima community spanning from La Mission Puerto de Purisima Concepcion to La Purisima in Lompoc and Boyle Heights. Our club is deeply rooted in honoring the legacy of my grandfather, a championship boxer, native catholic, and World War II veteran whose remarkable journey continues to inspire us. In addition, we pay tribute to the heroic spirit of the La Purisima Crowd Army of the United States. Join us as we come together to celebrate literature, share insights, and foster a sense of community that reflects the resilience and strength of our collective history.

Name: Retro & Co Bookstore
Description:
Retro & Co Bookstore is an independent bookstore and coffee bar nestled within Mwembe Resort along Mtangani Road in Malindi, Kenya. We specialize in offering a curated selection of new and used books across various genres, including fiction, non-fiction, children’s literature, and works by local authors. Our cozy space is designed to foster meaningful, community-driven connections, providing a haven for literary enthusiasts and visitors alike to enjoy a great cup of coffee and a lovely read. ￼

Beyond our bookstore and coffee offerings, we host a range of literary events such as book signings, writers’ salons, book clubs, and more, aiming to champion a love of reading and support a culture of learning and artistic exploration. As a locally-owned establishment, we’re dedicated to creating a space where stories come to life and communities come together.

Name: Bookiffy

Name: The Poetry Shop
Description:
The Poetry Shop is an online bookstore devoted to the appreciation and practice of poetry. Our goal: to curate collections that move people to read more poetry. We want to help you find your next favorite book.

Brick-and-mortar stores, online retailers, and even public libraries at best carry a slim collection of poetry. That's why we founded The Poetry Shop, a place for readers to discover new work and for poets to find new audiences. We want to make it easy to select your next poetry book with thoughtful, seasonal, and inspired curation of new collections of work.

The Poetry Shop is a mom-and-pop business run by San Diego based couple David Panarelli and Katie Kemple. David, a design and product consultant, handles the management and logistics of the site; while Katie, a poet and public relations consultant, focuses on curation and literary partnerships.

Name: The Gift of Failure
Description:
If you haven't failed, then you aren't trying hard enough.

Not just the little failures either. The big ones. The failures that push you to the edge of insanity and put your entire career in jeopardy. The failures that knock you to the ground and won't let you back up. The failures that force you to ask better questions, to learn from your mistakes, and to commit to becoming a better person.

These are the failures that plant the seeds of greatness.

Ari Rastegar, a licensed attorney, founded Rastegar Property Company in 2015 with one mission: to build the future of real estate. A true renaissance man, Ari is a larger-than-life personality who is also an artist, technologist, health enthusiast, and entrepreneurial visionary with the ambition to change the world.

Everything Ari Rastegar has achieved was forged through failure. From delivering pizzas at DoubleDave's to his rise as real estate's "Oracle of Austin" (Forbes) and every step and misstep in between, Ari owes his success not to what he did right but to what he did wrong.

In The Gift of Failure, Ari pulls back the curtain on his darkest moments, revealing the hard-earned lessons from his struggles, showing why prosperity in any enterprise is linked to prosperity in life.

Full of Ari's trademark wit, energy, compassion, and candor, this book will help you see failure in an entirely new way.

By decoding these structures, the book empowers readers to break free from this rigged system and reclaim control over their lives, fostering true freedom and self-mastery.

Name: OPENBOOX
Description:
At OpenBoox, we believe that reading is not a luxury — it’s a right.

In a world overwhelmed by consumption and digital noise, we choose to bring people back to books. Not just as objects, but as companions for growth, clarity, and freedom. OpenBoox is Vietnam’s first subscription-based book rental platform, created to help people read more, spend less, and build a sustainable relationship with knowledge.

We’re rethinking what it means to own a book. Instead of buying to possess, we read to grow. Our model allows readers to borrow high-quality titles, keep the ones they love, and rotate books seamlessly — all through a modern, tech-enabled experience.

OpenBoox exists for curious minds, minimalist spirits, and those who want more from less. We serve readers who value learning, not collecting. Movement, not hoarding. Flow, not stagnation.

This is not just about books. It’s about designing a new reading culture — one that is affordable, accessible, and deeply human.

We’re not building a bookstore. We’re building a revolution in how people read.

Name: Heino de Piraat
Description:
Heino belandt onverwachts op een echte piratenboot. Terugvaren kan niet meer. Het is het begin van een spannende reis vol avontuur op zoek naar de schat van Side. De piraten komen er snel achter dat Heino een bijzonder slim ventje is. Hij redt de piraten uit de handen van zeevaarders, bannikalen en junglebewoners. 
Onderweg ontdekken ze een wereld van raadsels, vallen, pianokamers, glasstranden en vreemde wezens. Om de schat te bemachtigen, mogen de piraten drie wensen doen. De schatkamer blijkt een val te zijn. Weet Heino de piraten en de schat veilig naar huis te brengen?

Name: The ART of Pushing FORWARD
Description:
The ART of Pushing FORWARD: A GUIDE TO OVERCOMING LIFE’S RESISTANCE.

Life is full of obstacles—some external, some internal, and many we don’t even realize are holding us back. The ART of Pushing FORWARD is a powerful guide to recognizing and overcoming the invisible forces of resistance that keep us stuck in cycles of hesitation, fear, and self-doubt.

Through a blend of deep psychological insights, real-life examples, and practical strategies, this book reveals how to break free from procrastination, self-sabotage, and limiting beliefs. It explores how passive resistance—the subtle force that keeps us in our comfort zones—prevents us from achieving the success and fulfillment we seek.

You will learn how to:

 Identify and dismantle the mental and emotional barriers blocking your growth
 Overcome procrastination and develop unstoppable momentum
 Shift your mindset from fear and hesitation to confidence and action
 Build resilience in the face of challenges and adversity
 Create an environment that supports your success

Whether you are striving for personal growth, professional success, or simply a more fulfilling life, The ART of Pushing FORWARD will equip you with the mindset and tools to break through limitations and move boldly toward your goals.

If you’re ready to stop waiting and start pushing forward, this book will show you the way.

Name: Open Book Mozambique
Description:
Open Book Mozambique is an inspiring online bookstore dedicated to providing a diverse range of books and fostering a love for reading. Our vision is to reignite the joy of reading in every Mozambican, allowing us to rediscover our best selves through the power of books. We invite you to explore our website and join us on this enriching journey.
WHY READING? 
Reading books offers numerous benefits, such as:
•	expanding your knowledge 
•	enhancing your vocabulary
•	improving your focus and concentration.

Additionally, reading can transport you to different worlds, help you relax, and reduce stress. It's also a great way to exercise your brain and imagination. Plus, reading can provide valuable insights and perspectives on various topics and life experiences, ultimately contributing to personal growth and empathy. Whether it's fiction, non-fiction, or poetry, books have the power to entertain, educate, and inspire. So, if you're looking for a way to broaden your horizons and escape into new adventures, picking up a book is definitely worth it!

Name: Keogh's Books
Description:
Keogh’s Books are secondhand and antiquarian booksellers based in Skipton, North Yorkshire, the gateway to the Yorkshire Dales. We are dealers in finely crafted, historically impactful, rare and unusual books.

The business was founded in 1985 by the late Joe Keogh who traded for over thirty years before passing the business onto his daughter, Carmel Keogh.

In addition to our online business, we have a small bookshop at 71 High Street, Skipton, stocked with books for every type of collector and reader. You’ll find rare and interesting antiquarian items alongside shelves full of fiction, non-fiction and children’s books, including many paperbacks and inexpensive editions.

Avec d’un côté, des livres sélectionnés avec soin et de l’autre, un café lieu de vie pour des rencontres et des animations, la librairie café Recto Verso est une librairie généraliste indépendante qui se distingue par une attention particulière portée à la littérature jeunesse, la littérature généraliste d’auteurs et d’éditeurs de proximité français et suisses, la littérature liée à l’environnement proche (montagne, plantes, nature, randonnées, guides) et aux sujets sociétaux et d’actualité (écologie et développement durable, féminisme et LGBTQ, …)

Description:
Here at MiliMoments, we strive to provide love and community to the military children of the world. We bring support to military families through realistic and unique stories that focus on a variety of engaging themes. These themes cover a broad range of military-specific experiences as well as everyday situations. We use adorable illustrations, roll-off-the-tongue rhymes, and relatable characters to make memorable stories that readers enjoy coming back to, time and time again. As children connect with these characters and stories, we hope they will find peace and solidarity in knowing there are others going through similar circumstances. Our wish is to provide books that not only are enjoyable for our readers, but also empower children to love and accept their own special selves, to always try their best, and to gain valuable skills and tools that will equip them for all of life’s adventures.

Although our stories are written with military children as the primary audience, we hope everyone who picks up one of our books will find something that resonates with them!

Name: Endless Wonders Books
Description:
We are a trans, queer, and neurodivergent-owned bookshop in Portland, OR. We exclusively feature books by and about people from underrepresented communities (2SLGBTQIA+, Black, Indigenous, POC, disabled, immigrant, etc.) with a mission to help readers expand their worldviews and increase community engagement.

We are dedicated to story, connection, and discovery. We see books as places where exploration has no threshold, and as opportunities for us to learn new things about ourselves, our world, and our possibilities. We connect you with new voices, stories that invite questions, and works that make you want to take action. We want ideas to flow freely and stories to be shared in pursuit of building a more just future rooted in collective care.

We believe in the power of story, art, and community in creating a world we can all thrive in. We curate books and creations by people from historically underrepresented communities, because we believe everyone benefits when we see ourselves represented and being exposed to stories different from our own cultivates empathy and connectedness. 

Inspired by the 1920’s German cabaret song and one of the first gay anthems, “Das lila Lied” or “The Lavender Song”, we believe in the power of being true to ourselves – even or especially when those in power wish to suppress us. Choosing to defy the mainstream and find the endless wonder and joy inherent in being authentically oneself is revolutionary. Whether it is because you are 2SLGBTQIA+, Black, Indigenous, a person of color, disabled, neurodivergent, an immigrant, or just a little different from those around you – we welcome you here. Your stories are important. Your presence in the world is vital. For those who consider themselves a little more mainstream, we hope you’ll come with an open mind and open heart to our stories and lives.

Our mission is to help readers expand their worldviews and increase community engagement.
