Mallia & D'Amato Booksellers is an independent, online bookstore set up in 2018. We firmly believe that bookshops are essential to a healthy culture but as more people move online to buy their books, readers are missing out on those personal touches that a competent bookseller can provide: the knowledge, the recommendations, the friendly bookish chats. That personal touch is what distinguishes us from other algorithm-driven online stores.

Our focus was always on carrying a small, well-curated selection of fiction, poetry, and beautiful books and thus providing the local book enthusiasts with the latest and most prominent voices in contemporary literature. We could very easily say that our bookshop is an extension of our personal library and interests. Our bookshelves represent books and authors that we love to read or plan to read. This means that among our meticulously curated selection of titles you will find classics of world literature to cutting edge of contemporary fiction and poetry. Our shelves also feature a good selection of nonfiction titles and essays, as well as books about art, science, and philosophy.

We aim to become a catalyst for innovation, collaboration, and a new generation of independent media in Canada.

Issues was founded by Nicola Hamilton, an award-winning editorial designer and art director.

Why this? Why now? Because despite shrinking magazine stands and the ascendency of digital everything, Issues is here to prove that reports of print’s death are greatly exaggerated. A tactile medium that offers an entirely unique interplay of words and visuals, magazines can’t easily be replicated online. Around the corner and around the globe, editors, writers, artists, and designers are producing vital magazines that mine stories and visual inspiration from the worlds of art, fashion, food, sports, politics, pop culture, and beyond — they’ve just become a little harder to find.

Name: Books & Toys Brasil
Description:
Somos a Books R Toys!
Fundada em 2012 por dois professores de inglês, a empresa foi inicialmente batizada de Saco de Brinquedos. O objetivo da nova empresa era ampliar a oferta de material que pudesse qualificar o ensino da língua inglesa dentro da sala de aula. “Flash cards”, “posters”, bem como jogos e livros para “storytelling” fizeram muito sucesso nos primeiros anos. A empresa logo caiu no gosto dos “teachers”. A partir de 2014, a empresa passou a focar também em livros didáticos, os “course books”, bem como em “readers”. Com o tempo, os didáticos das mais importantes editoras passaram então a ser comercializados e a frase “Books R Toys” foi incorporada ao nome da empresa. Até 2017, os livros e jogos comercializados chegavam através de importadoras especializadas, mas a partir do final de 2018, e, principalmente 2019, a Books R Toys assumiu esta responsabilidade.
Em 2018, a empresa firma um importante parceria com a Express Publishing. O trabalho desenvolvido nos primeiros 12 meses fortalece a relação entre as empresas e em 2019 é selado um acordo para distribuição exclusiva dos materiais da Express Publishing em todo o Brasil. Ainda em 2019, a Books R Toys passa também a importar os materiais da Scholastic de forma direta.
Além do comércio de jogos, livros e literatura, a Books R Toys oferece cursos, treinamentos e organiza eventos voltados para a qualificação de profissionais e educadores especializados em inglês como língua adicional e bilinguismo. 
Desde o início, a Books R Toys busca ser referência na área de materiais para ensino e aprendizagem de língua inglesa e em atendimento ao cliente. Com honestidade, ética, transparência, competência e eficiência, vem crescendo de forma gradual e sustentável e almeja contribuir na construção de conhecimento, fornecendo conteúdo educacional de qualidade e atendendo nossos clientes e colaboradores com excelência.

Name: Valuation and Sustainability
Description:
Valuation and Sustainability is a collective book born from the work of top notch experts in the field of business valuation and sustainability: Elena Maksimovich founder at Weather Trade Net, Paul Jouy financial due diligence and valuation manager at BDO, Mathieu Joubrel founder at ValueCo, Laurent Inard partner at Mazars and Frédéric Le Meaux Senior European Equity Portfolio at Amundi.

The book primarily aims at reaching two types of audiences: practitioners and students in finance (graduate and undergraduate level).

Practitioners in finance will find interest in the book, as it will give them access to academic knowledge in a format that suits them.

Academic research has made substantial advances in the field of business valuation and ESG.

The book intends to transform this knowledge into practical and rigorous methodologies for taking ESG into account when valuing a company.

Graduate and undergraduate courses have recently developed in business schools, universities, and engineering schools. These courses usually directly refer to academic articles or valuation companies' website documentation, but not to academic books.

Therefore, the book will allow students to have access to centralized and organized information about business valuation and ESG.

Readers without prior knowledge of business valuation will be guided through the ESG integration process. They will first be introduced to the concept of value and the reasons for incorporating ESG into the value. They will then learn simple financial methods to value firms and see step-by-step use cases. 

For instance, the reader will learn how to value a firm in the renewable energy sector using cash flow and multiple valuation methods.

After building knowledge of standard business valuation, readers will better understand ESG data and ratings. The reader will then learn how to integrate ESG into business valuation using cash flow and multiples approaches.

Name: The Urbanist: Dan Doctoroff and the Rise of New York
Description:
A never-before-told, behind-the-scenes look at the central role one man played in New York’s rise from the ashes of 9/11, creating a new generation of landmarks in the world’s most recognizable city.

On January 1, 2002, Michael R. Bloomberg took office as the 108th mayor of New York City, with smoke still rising from the World Trade Center site. Many questioned whether the city could rebound from the worst terrorist attack in the nation’s history. Instead, New York thrived — entering a period of unprecedented growth, spurred by new neighborhoods, parks, office districts, cultural facilities, and more. At the center of many of these initiatives was Daniel L. Doctoroff, who served as Deputy Mayor for Economic Development and Rebuilding from 2002 to 2007.

Told through the eyes of the individuals who worked with Doctoroff to lead these projects and accompanied by more than 450 photos, The Urbanist: Dan Doctoroff and the Rise of New York tells the astonishing story of the role that one man played in creating an array of iconic projects, from the rebuilt World Trade Center to Brooklyn Bridge Park to the High Line and more.

Description:
The Good Indian Employee’s Guide to Surviving a Lala Company is an essential read for anyone navigating the unique landscape of Indian family-owned businesses. Written by Rajiv Gupta, a corporate veteran with over 30 years of experience, this book is packed with candid insights, practical advice, and a touch of humor, making it relatable and enjoyable.

Through vivid real-life examples and humorous cartoons, this guide reveals the dual perspectives of both employee and employer. It dives deep into the distinct culture of Lala Companies—known for their loyalty and traditional values, yet often shaped by rigid hierarchies and blurred personal boundaries. The book offers invaluable advice on how employees can not only survive but thrive in these settings, while also providing owners with strategies to strengthen both their business and family bonds.

Name: Chapters Bookstore
Description:
A new chapter for Chapters …

Words like institution, gem, foremost, important, stalwart are words constantly bandied around, but with no real sense of weight or gravitas.  After 40 years in business as an independent bookseller, with a hugely extensive, eclectic range of new and secondhand books, Chapters announced in October that we would be closing our doors in Parnell Street, January 31st, 2022.  The response to this news was both shocking and gratifying; people contacted us from around the world to express their affection for the store and disappointment that we would be going, customers queued down the street to load shopping trollies with treasures that they found on our shelves and tables.

As always, Ireland likes to buck a trend and contrary to widespread opinion, we as a nation still love books and bookshops … so as breaking up is hard to do, Chapters will reopen on Friday 11th March.

Willie Kinsella, founder, mentor and secret bibliophile really does want to retire and spend more time reading books, rather than working on them, so he has sold the store to his protégées, Kevin Neary and Michael Finucane, co-founders, and former directors of GameStop Ireland. In a perfect example of the circular economy, Neary and Finucane opened their first shop in a 50 square meter space at the back of Chapters old store in Middle Abbey Street – 25 years of friendship, admiration and shared understanding of retail and championing customer choice have come home again. 
Although vastly experienced in retail and retail environments, the new directors believe the secret to Chapters continued success will be to leave it alone; investment will be made in improving the IT infrastructure and stock visibility systems, plus converting the website for ecommerce.

Name: Librería El gato que lee y bebe
Description:
El Gato que Lee y Bebe: Donde la Magia de las Letras se Encuentra con el Alma de Villa de Leyva

Bienvenidos al rincón más mágico de Villa de Leyva! En El Gato que Lee y Bebe, no solo encontrarás una librería, sino un espacio donde cada visita se transforma en una experiencia sensorial y cultural inolvidable. 

Soy Claudia Sterling, y mi pasión es entrelazar el encanto de los libros con el deleite de los vinos, el aroma del café y la riqueza de las letras, creando un universo donde la mente y el espíritu se nutren en perfecta armonía.

En nuestro acogedor hogar de historias, celebramos la lectura como un viaje sin fin. Desde las grandes obras literarias hasta los tesoros escondidos, cada libro es una puerta a mundos inexplorados y a nuevas perspectivas. Pero la magia no termina ahí. Complementamos esta travesía con una cuidadosa selección de vinos y viches que acarician el paladar y cafés y tés que despiertan los sentidos, elevando cada momento de lectura a una experiencia sublime.

El Gato que Lee y Bebe es más que una librería; es un epicentro cultural en Villa de Leyva. Aquí, las letras cobran vida en tertulias, presentaciones de libros y encuentros con autores que inspiran y conectan. 
Fomentamos la cultura en todas sus expresiones, creando un ambiente vibrante donde la conversación fluye tan libremente como la tinta en una página.

Si eres un amante de los libros, un entusiasta del buen beber, o simplemente buscas un refugio donde la imaginación se encuentre con la realidad, te invitamos a ser parte de nuestra historia. 

Ven y descubre por qué en El Gato que Lee y Bebe, cada página, cada sorbo y cada charla es una invitación a la magia.

Name: Revista Problemas Brasileiros
Description:
A Revista Problemas Brasileiros (PB) é uma publicação singular. Com mais de 60 anos de história, mantém-se fiel ao propósito da sua criação: estimular o necessário debate à superação de mazelas seculares e contrastes que fazem do Brasil um dos países mais desiguais do mundo.

Sua versão impressa é publicada bimestralmente e distribuída a um público constituído por empreendedores, acadêmicos e estudantes. A publicação se destaca também por suas parcerias com universidades e organizações do terceiro setor, uma maneira de dar voz aos mais amplos setores da sociedade. Em sua versão digital, conta diariamente com reportagens inéditas, entrevistas e artigos de opinião. 

Uma realização da Federação do Comércio de Bens, Serviços e Turismo do Estado de São Paulo (FecomercioSP), a PB seguiu trajetória única como publicação de entidade de classe porque não se restringe a discussões político-econômicas. As causas do atraso estrutural do País são analisadas também sob a perspectiva de áreas como Educação, Trabalho, Gestão Pública, Meio Ambiente, Infraestrutura, Saúde e Cultura.

Livre de alinhamentos de qualquer natureza, a PB se mantém aberta à diversidade para analisar as transformações que moldam e influenciam o País. Em sua linha editorial, persegue a ideia de que o Brasil precisa crescer mantendo e ampliando as conquistas democráticas, com distribuição de renda, e incorporando a sustentabilidade socioambiental à cultura de desenvolvimento.

A FecomercioSP acredita que informação aprofundada é um instrumento fundamental para qualificar o debate público sobre assuntos importantes não só para a classe empresarial, mas para toda a sociedade.

Tranquebar Boghandel
Tranquebar ligger på et gadehjørne. 
Vi forsøger, at være svære at runde – og helst ikke til at komme udenom.
Et skarpt hjørne.
Bogen er i centrum.
Men der er adskillige andre årsager. Fordi herinde, blandt alle forlag, forfattere og formuleringer – ude på gulvet eller bag skranken – finder du folk, der har læst med, og altid har lyst til at tale om litteraturen.
Vi er snakkesalige folk. Belæste i fritiden, berettende i arbejdstiden. 
Herinde på hjørnet frister kaffen. De krydsede fingre er fordi, vi håber du køber en kop mere.
Og leder du efter en gave? Alt er i sin tid indkøbt af os, som du nu selv er på indkøb. På jagt efter kvalitet og originalitet.
Hold øje med vores foredrag, vores arrangementer. 
Så ses vi også, en skønne aften.

Description:
𝗟𝗶𝘃𝗿𝗼𝘀 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗼𝘀 é uma Iniciativa Voluntária Permanente de arrecadação e venda de livros para manter e criar Bibliotecas Vivas nos projetos da Fraternidade sem Fronteiras – uma organização humanitária sem fins lucrativos.

𝗟𝗶𝘃𝗿𝗼𝘀 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗼𝘀 é formado por Empreendedores Sociais Voluntários em diversas cidades no Brasil e no exterior, realizando ações estrategicamente dentro dos Objetivos de Livros Fraternos – o GIPE:
𝗚 - Gerar recursos financeiros através da venda de livros adquiridos por doação
𝗜 - Incentivar o apadrinhamento de projetos sociais e o voluntariado
𝗣 - Promover a cultura e educação através da criação e manutenção de Bibliotecas Vivas
𝗘 - Estimular a consciência e a sustentabilidade ambiental

O principal investimento com os valores arrecadados com a venda de livros destina-se ao financiamento para criação e manutenção das Bibliotecas Vivas dentro dos Projetos Próprios e Apoiados pela Fraternidade sem Fronteiras, além da capacitação e preparação de tutores, facilitadores e cuidadores responsáveis pelas bibliotecas no Brasil e no exterior.

Os Polos Locais de Livros Fraternos administram localmente atividades como: gestão e organização das ações, relacionamento com as diversas parcerias; comunicação e divulgação de ações; captação e arrecadação dos livros doados; curadoria, categorização e precificação dos livros; controle, estoque e armazenamento dos livros; e a estruturação das Livrotecas Criativas para a venda de livros.

Os livros doados recebidos pelos Polos Locais, podem ser: usados, novos, seminovos, antigos, danificados, já expostos, de segunda mão, não mais vendáveis, com pequenos defeitos, com avarias, com páginas amareladas, com ferrugem de papel, com presença de amassados, com marcas, com manchas, com riscos, com sinais de uso, com imperfeição de produção etc.

Para ser Doador, Apoiador ou Voluntário fale conosco:
e-mail: livrosfraternos@gmail.com

You will become educated in creating financial plans, budgeting, managing credit, setting up accounts, planning for retirement, and investing. 

We have both general books and books based on specific topics such as children and money, teens, couples, and women. Topics covered include the following, depending on the book:

Name: The Future of Community
Description:
The Future of Community is an incisive and eye-opening exploration of the next stage of digital transformation sweeping through our online and real lives. Veteran Web3 evangelists John Kraski Justin Shenkarow and Charles Adkins explain why Web3 really is the “next big thing” and how it will fundamentally reshape many of the interactions we have with one another.

You’ll learn about how fan tokens are poised to disrupt your understanding of the relationship between artists and their fans  and how you can take control of your personal data with a self-sovereign identity on the blockchain. You’ll discover how our next generation of young people, Generation Alpha, communicate with one another—and with us—and how the ways they form human connections will impact our own online and offline social networks.

A can’t-miss roadmap to critically important new technologies that are already making digital waves around the world, The Future of Community will earn a place in the libraries of business leaders, entrepreneurs, founders, and technology and Web3 enthusiasts ready to leap into the future.

Wann hören wir eigentlich auf zu lernen?
Am besten niemals!

Wir sehen eine Zukunft, in der das Streben nach Wissen und persönlicher Weiterentwicklung zu einem grundlegenden Bestandteil unseres Lebens wird. In dieser Welt hören Menschen niemals auf zu lernen, unabhängig von ihrem Alter, ihrer Herkunft oder ihrem aktuellen Wissensstand.

Aus dieser Vision heraus, haben wir den ForwardVerlag gegründet. Bei uns findest du eine große Auswahl an Büchern aus den verschiedensten Kategorien, die deine Persönlichkeitsentwicklung fördern.

„Wer zu lesen versteht, besitzt den Schlüssel zu großen Taten, zu unerträumten Möglichkeiten.“
(Aldous Huxley)

Name: TheUnderCovers
Description:
Welcome to the most captivating literary revolution of our era!
We extend our warmest invitation to join us in realizing a bookstore dedicated exclusively to self-published authors.
This is not merely a campaign; it's a groundbreaking movement, and your support is the key to making it a reality.


Our Vision
In a world where a handful of publishing giants dominate the literary landscape, many independent authors find themselves silenced, unheard, and overlooked. These authors have deliberately chosen self-publishing to unleash their stories without the constraints imposed by traditional publishing.
We understand the importance of creative freedom and the need to share diverse, unique voices with the world. Our vision is to rewrite the rules, level the playing field, and bestow self-published authors with the recognition they genuinely deserve.

The Dream

Our vision transcends a single bookstore-cafe; we aspire to create a network of self-published author bookstores, commencing in the UK and expanding across the United States. These establishments will serve as beacons for storytellers who might otherwise remain undiscovered and for readers seeking fresh, original narratives.


Cafe at "The Under Covers"
Where Words and Brews Unite
Step into the heart of our bookstore, and you'll discover more than just books. Our cafe is a cozy sanctuary where literary enthusiasts and casual readers come together over exceptional coffee, fine teas, sweets, and a selection of quality wines.
Whether you're delving into a self-published masterpiece, meeting an author, or simply seeking a tranquil space to savor your favorite brew, our cafe is the perfect spot to unwind, connect, and celebrate the power of storytelling. Enjoy a cup of inspiration at "The Under Covers."

Why your Support Matters
By supporting this campaign, you're not merely endorsing a project; you're championing a movement.

You're advocating for creative independence!

Name: Before All is Said and Done by Pat Miles
Description:
The notion of planning for one’s death is intrinsically at odds with our human instinct to avoid considering our own mortality. Although we may contemplate the grief that our life’s impermanence would cause to our loved ones, we seldom consider the myriad of emotional and legal issues that can arise afterward.

Before All Is Said and Done begins with the experience of author Pat Miles Zimmerman and her husband, Charles “Bucky” Zimmerman. Pat and Bucky were fully set for life but, regrettably, not set for death.

After Bucky’s death from an abrupt and short illness, Pat found herself with a plate full of unanticipated emotions, decisions, and legal problems.

But, as she spoke with other widows, she learned she was not alone in finding herself adrift after losing a spouse. The shock and grief that erupt from the loss of someone dearly beloved do not create a state of mind fit for navigating the numerous challenges that follow an unexpected death.

Before All Is Said and Done dutifully and courageously confronts a challenging topic head-on — planning for one’s death. In helping readers navigate the pitfalls of death and dying, it’s a book that will prepare us for the often ignored problems that run in tandem with somber situations:

The shock of loss and what to expect
Planning for a sudden death or a prolonged illness
Facing a potential cognitive decline
Finding support and healthy grieving during a complex time
Connecting with ethical and morally sound attorneys/lawyers
Family disputes and blended family issues
Caring for yourself after the loss

In addition to Pat’s personal story, the book includes accounts and advice through the lens of widows and widowers, attorneys, doctors, financial advisors, and many other experts.

Although we may initially shirk away from the notion of our life’s transience, it is powerfully beneficial to ready ourselves and our loved ones for every stage of life — and death.

Journal of Medical Radiation Sciences (JMRS) is an international journal in radiation therapy, nuclear medicine, medical imaging/diagnostic radiography, medical ultrasound/sonography, and the complementary disciplines of medical physics, radiology, radiation oncology, nursing, psychology and sociology research and practice.

JMRS is an open access journal that promotes excellence and collaboration in international medical radiation science through the publication of contemporary and advanced multidisciplinary research that encourages the adoption of the best clinical, scientific and educational practices.

JMRS is the official professional journal of the Australian Society of Medical Imaging and Radiation Therapy (ASMIRT) and NZSMIRT (formerly NZIMRT).

Our mission is simple: help creative people build authentic, sustainable lives—on their own terms.

We serve musicians and makers who feel deeply, think differently, and want tools that honor both their artistry and their humanity. Whether you’re navigating the music industry, building a creative career, or learning to set boundaries as an introvert, our books offer clarity, confidence, and real‑world strategies you can actually use.

Our work blends emotional intelligence, creative psychology, and practical frameworks designed for people who create from the heart. We understand the unique challenges artists face—overwhelm, self‑doubt, burnout, people‑pleasing, and the pressure to stay visible in a noisy world. Every book is crafted to support your growth while protecting your energy, your identity, and your creative voice.

Specialties include:  
• Creative coaching and musician development

• Emotional intelligence for artists

If you’re a musician, creative introvert, or purpose‑driven artist seeking practical tools, emotional clarity, and a more sustainable way to live and create, you’re in the right place.

Books by Neil J Milliner exists to help you thrive—creatively, emotionally, and intentionally.

Description:

The Wolfe & The Kron specializes in Genre Fiction, with a particular emphasis on Feminist SciFi, Afrofuturism, and LGBTQIA+. We have both affordable Paperbacks and Hardcovers, as well as Collectible, Out-of-Print, and Rare Books. However, we are not an antiquarian bookseller, and our books are almost all from the 1950s onward, mainly being from the mid-70s to present day. We hold that Black Lives Matter, that Abortion is Healthcare, that Trans Rights are Human Rights, and that Vaccines Save Lives.

As a Used Bookstore, we aim to fill in the back-catalogs of authors, and to maintain the accessibility of books that have not been republished. Our goal is to help you find authors who've been left off the shelves of the big-box stores, and the books that may not have made it back into print, for all that New Bookstores might want to stock them. 

We are buyers and sellers of used books, and we are genuine in our mission to find new homes for the books that come to us. Please, spread the word! Too often we still hear stories of old books ending up in dumpsters simply because someone didn't understand they still had worth. 


Your Auntie Anti-Incunabulist, 
Fin the Kron

New Jersey's LGBTQIA+ Owned Used Bookstore since 2023

Description:
Ten years after the internationally acclaimed photo art collection-turned coffee table book Pieces of Jamaica, and in celebration of the island’s 60th anniversary of independence, photographer David I. The new edition, Pieces of Jamaica 60, will showcase the island beyond tourism, politics and individuals, depicting Jamaican culture not typically published or celebrated, creating a meaningful keepsake that inspires nostalgia and a patriotic spirit.

The collection features photographs of locations, people, activities, attractions and more from the island that inspire nostalgia and a sense of home, made up of the photo art of David I. Muir, and the photos and fine artwork of Sean Henry. Pieces of Jamaica 60 tells the story of Jamaica from the eyes of her sons and daughters, occasionally including images of old Jamaica, quotes about the island, the work itself or from popular prose, and large, immersive visuals of the most familiar Jamaican sights, as well as those the artists invite you to explore.

Name: Udbodhan
Description:
Sri Ramakrishnadev (1836-1886) was the founder of Ramakrishna Math and Ramakrishna Mission. In 19th century history, Sri Ramakrishnad Paramahamsa is a man whose generous words spread all over the world beyond India. His beloved disciple Swami Vivekananda (1863-1902 AD) is one of the main heroes of modern India who established the Ramakrishna Math and the Ramakrishna Mission to spread the Guru's message to all people. Both the Ramakrishna Math and the Ramakrishna Mission are legally and economically independent institutions, but ideologically and administratively the two are inextricably linked. Ramakrishna Math has many branches where the Ramakrishna Mission is carried out. Such as school-college, hospital-service, rural and rural development etc. These two institutions work together to keep alive this innovative modern spiritual movement named after Ramakrishna.
The ideology that underpins this movement has its roots in the ancient Upanishad ideals of India. We find its reflection in the utterances of the Vedic sages. Indian history and Indian philosophy are multi-faceted and multi-coloured, yet Vedanta philosophy stands supreme among them. There is nowhere else such a vast range and depth. Sri Ramakrishna's life is a modern interpretation of this Vedantadarshan, which helps us overcome the needs and obstacles of modern life. Swami Vivekananda became a world traveler with a vow to bring this Vedanta as reflected in Sri Ramakrishna's life from home to home, and eventually the Ramakrishna Revolution began through the Ramakrishna Math and Mission. Today, not only Gairikadhari sannyasins, but countless people of different ages from all walks of life are members of the Ramakrishna family. The Ramakrishna Math and Mission believed in the unity of all religions, engaged in the pursuit of Shiva-service through Jiva-seva; Sectarianism, blind fundamentalism, proselytism, The Ramakrishna Math-Mission has nothing to do with Gandhian mysticism or Siddhai, or superstition.

Name: Adventures of Boo and Chin
Description:
The Adventures of Boo and Chin is a children's book series published beginning December 2023. These wonderful books center the lives of two elementary school children who become best friends after meeting in 3rd grade. Boo is an AfroLatina girl who moves from the city to a small town, Summersville and on her first day of school, she meets her new best friend, Chin. Chin is a Chinese boy who becomes enthralled with the new girl immediately and welcomes her to Summersville with an immediate invitation to be his best friend. All of Boo's jitters roll away and she knows she's in for an absolute treat, and so are you and the kiddies in your life!

Author, Aubria Ralph wrote these books because she wanted to see people that were like the people she knows and loves represented. As a kid she almost never saw a book with a Black or Hispanic child protagonist, let alone books that included different aspects of the various cultures and religions in our global society. Boo and Chin are an amalgamation of the wonder children she has had the privilege of being an aunt or teacher to over the years. Watching her God-children who inspired and will continue to inspire her stories grow up and enjoying mini-adventures with them catalyzed these beautiful books. With the help of illustrator, Reya Lanot-Manuel, Ralph was able to complete the first 7 books August 2022-August 2023 and get them to market almost immediately. 

The first seven books are currently available on our company website, adventuresofbooandchin.com, as well as where all books are sold, including Amazon, Barnes & Noble, Target and Walmart, to name a few. We also designed handmade limited edition plush toys that are available exclusively on our website.

You can also follow us on instagram to hear about our happenings at:
@adventuresofbooandchin. We look forward to engaging with you!

Name: The Heart of Business Book
Description:
Hubert Joly, former CEO of Best Buy and orchestrator of the retailer's spectacular turnaround, unveils his personal playbook for achieving extraordinary outcomes by putting people and purpose at the heart of business.

Back in 2012, "Everyone thought we were going to die," says Joly. Eight years later, Best Buy was transformed as Joly and his team rebuilt the company into one of the nation's favorite employers, vastly increased customer satisfaction, and dramatically grew Best Buy's stock price. Joly and his team also succeeded in making Best Buy a leader in sustainability and innovation.

In The Heart of Business, Joly shares the philosophy behind the resurgence of Best Buy: pursue a noble purpose, put people at the center of the business, create an environment where every employee can blossom, and treat profit as an outcome, not the goal.

This approach is easy to understand, but putting it into practice is not so easy. It requires radically rethinking how we view work, how we define companies, how we motivate, and how we lead. In this book Joly shares memorable stories, lessons, and practical advice, all drawn from his own personal transformation from a hard-charging McKinsey consultant to a leader who believes in human magic.

The Heart of Business is a timely guide for leaders ready to abandon old paradigms and lead with purpose and humanity. It shows how we can reinvent capitalism so that it contributes to a sustainable future.

Name: HOW TO HACK BACK YOUR MIND
Description:
HOW TO HACK BACK YOUR MIND  by Multi-Award-Winner Najjar is a little secret book that will revolutionize your life. 

In this groundbreaking guide, Najjar takes readers on a profound exploration of self-discovery and empowerment that goes beyond the boundaries of traditional self-help literature.

This book is not just a collection of theories; it's a practical guide grounded in extensive scientific research and personal insight. 
It delves deep into the complexities of the human mind, offering practical tools that you can start using today to unlock its full potential. 
From understanding the inner workings of your mental landscape to mastering your thoughts, beliefs, and actions, Najjar equips you with the knowledge and skills needed to regain control over your life.

At the core of the book's message is unlocking the hidden potential of the subconscious mind. Through techniques to identify and rewrite harmful scripts, readers can align themselves with their desired outcomes and overcome limiting beliefs that hinder personal growth.

The exploration extends into cognitive processes and patterns, empowering individuals to alter conscious beliefs and behaviors. Techniques for breaking free from negative behaviors and influences are unveiled, alongside strategies for establishing boundaries and cultivating self-regulation.

Najjar's book is not just regular self-help literature; it is about self-empowerment and seizing the opportunity to transform your life. By turning the book into a beacon of inspiration for personal growth and self-empowerment, Najjar motivates you to shape a life filled with purpose, resilience, and fulfillment.

With insightful guidance and practical strategies, HOW TO HACK BACK YOUR MIND  is more than just a regular self-help book—it is a roadmap to unlocking untapped potential and authentic empowerment.

Join us on this transformative path, as this book has enormous self-help potential.

Name: Aphasia Readers, LLC
Description:
Aphasia Readers was created by husband-and-wife team, Ryan and Anna Teal. Ryan had a massive stroke at the age of thirty-four which left him with aphasia and apraxia. Throughout his recovery, the repetition of reading aloud seemed to be a tried-and-true form of speech practice with promising results. However, the only books available to practice on a simple level were children’s books. As an adult, reading these types of books felt a little demeaning. Although Ryan and Anna had many good laughs reading about “a trip to grandma’s house,” they quickly realized a need for simple, short readers with adult-themed content to support those in the aphasia community. After more than a year in the making and extensive collaboration with the renowned University of Michigan Aphasia Program at the University Center for Language and Literacy and input from top neurological teams, they finally wrote their first book of Aphasia Readers for adults. 

Their ultimate hope is to provide accessible and affordable supplementary speech practice tools for others in the aphasia community that will help pave the way for a successful recovery. A portion of the proceeds from each book goes back into supporting aphasia awareness and helps others pay for much-needed intensive speech therapy.

Name: Pace’s Fairy
Description:
In the enchanting and imaginative children's book "Pace's Fairy", readers are transported into a fantastical world filled with adventure, magic, and valuable life lessons. At the heart of this captivating tale is Harry the Fairy, a character that quickly captures the hearts of readers young and old.

In Chapter 1, we witness Harry's incredible journey to obtain fairy dust on Fairy Dust Island. Despite his inability to fly like other fairies, Harry's natural talents in driving rockets make him a force to be reckoned with. Throughout this chapter and the rest of the book, we learn an important lesson about the power of self-belief and being true to oneself, no matter how unique we may be.

As the story progresses to Chapter 2th, Harry's journey takes an unexpected turn when he lands in a toilet in a human house, desperately searching for the perfect fuel for his rocket. Enter Phil, a young boy with a loose tooth, and the solution to Harry's problem. Through a clever and magical trade, Harry acquires the tooth and gains a new outlook on the process of growing up and facing new challenges.

With each turn of the page, readers are whisked away on a thrilling and heartwarming adventure, filled with imaginative ideas and valuable life lessons. By the end of the book, readers will undoubtedly fall in love with Harry and his unwavering spirit of courage, determination, and belief in the power of kindness and creativity.

"Pace's Fairy" is a book that will capture the hearts of readers young and old, transporting them to a magical world full of wonder and possibility. Harry's missions are not just exciting and fantastical; they also teach us powerful lessons about friendship, bravery, and believing in oneself.

Name: Newton Bookshop
Description:
You are Welcome to Newton Books!

Our Story

Newton Books was founded on the passion and love for great and best-selling books by the top minds in business and finance, leadership, self-development and help, religion, biography and autobiography, philosophy, psychology, and entrepreneurship categories by the founder. Unfortunately, access to such good books was always problematic because of his geography. He was always on Amazon searching, visiting gates notes to know his recommended books, and visiting the websites of all the known best authors in all the categories mentioned earlier; the likes of Robert Kiyosaki, Tony Robbins books, Malcolm Gladwell books, T.D. Jakes books, Joyce Meyer books, and Simon Sinek books to mention but few to find out the books they would be releasing or have released. When he finally solved that problem of not having access to the books he would love to read, he decided to help the hundreds and thousands of people who have the same problem and that was when NEWTON BOOKS was born.

Our Philosophy

If Knowledge Is Power, Reading Is Your Superpower! 

This simple philosophy has set us on a course to eradicate illiteracy in every form by saving books and making them accessible for individuals who are willing to make meaning with their lives through the power of information to read, which in turn shapes their minds, share them a story, give them a bit of wisdom. Name: Backstory
Description:
Set up in Balham in October 2022 by former journalist Tom Rowley, Backstory is all about celebrating the story behind each story...the backstory. That’s why there’s a long bar and comfy chairs all along one side of our bookshop in south London. We want to encourage browsers to linger over a coffee or a glass of wine, to share bookish conversation with friends new and old - and to leave not only with books, but with stories of their own to tell.

It’s also why events are at the heart of what we do. We host author talks most weeks, delving deeper into the backstory behind a new release. And why not join us at one of our regular live music nights, where words of a different kind come to life?

If you’re not local to London, you can join our thriving literary community. Our two book clubs - fiction and non-fiction - are held monthly on Zoom, so you can take part from anywhere in the world. Better still, the author of the book joins each discussion. Or we’d be delighted to bring the Backstory experience directly to you with one of our tailored book subscriptions. We have so much fun picking out the perfect books for each of our subscribers.

Head to backstory.london for more info or follow us on Instagram @backstory.london

Name: FatorMT
Description:
Fator! Uma palavra concisa da língua portuguesa, mas que contém múltiplos significados. No dicionário, Fator é explicado como motivo, razão ou causa. Em suma, o elemento responsável pelo resultado de determinada ação. Na matemática, Fator é a grandeza que descreve um número ou caractere que será multiplicado. Essa palavra de amplo espectro foi herdada pela língua portuguesa do latim: factor, ōris é a expressão utilizada para descrever “aquele  que faz”.
Ação, razão, intencionalidade e multiplicação. Esse conjunto de sinônimos exprime a proatividade das pessoas e negócios de Mato Grosso. É um povo que faz. Nós acreditamos que esse é o Fator determinante da pujança desse Estado.
Por isso tomamos para nós essa palavra, que passa a nomear o novo e ambicioso projeto de comunicação.
A Fator MT será um veículo de comunicação inteligente, multiplataformas, cunhado para atingir, de forma efetiva, os diferentes públicos sem precisar banalizar a informação. Seremos sintéticos como essa palavra de 5 letras e, ao mesmo tempo, tão abrangentes quanto os sinônimos de Fator.

Name: Librairie Dernier Rempart
Description:
Tout débute avec la reprise par Laurent Parez en 2005 de la librairie indépendante spécialisée BD d’Antibes, le Comic Strips Café. Le formidable essor du medium entraîne rapidement son déménagement en 2007 dans un local de plus de 100 m² toujours dans le centre-ville antibois. 
En 2013, l’arrivée d’associés apporte un souffle nouveau à la librairie qui s’installe davantage dans le paysage local comme un acteur de la culture et emploie 2 libraires. 
En 2021, le Comic Strips Café et la librairie généraliste Masséna d'Antibes dirigée par Jérôme Dugast fusionnent. La nouvelle entité prend alors le nom de Dernier Rempart et se déploie sur deux magasins employant 15 personnes au total: l'un, généraliste, s'étend sur 350m² et l'autre, dans le local historique du Comic Strips Café, est consacré aux mangas et jeux de société
En 2023, Dernier Rempart ouvre une filiale au cœur du centre commercial Cap 3000 à Saint Laurent du Var et confie cette nouvelle librairie à Méline Desplanques. La Librairie du Cap emploie 13 libraires sur 450 m².
Depuis 2021, Dernier Rempart a proposé des centaines de rencontres, dédicaces, ateliers dans ses 3 librairies mais aussi à travers ses festivals: "Polar sur la ville" en mars et "Les Terrasses BD" en juin. En outre, elle participe annuellement au Festival du livre de Mouans Sartoux et au Salon du livre jeunesse de Juan les pins et déploie des librairies éphémères aux Voile d'Antibes et au théâtre d’Antibes, Anthea.
Enfin, Dernier Rempart est adhérent Canal BD et à Libraires ensemble.

Name: Neuroinclusion: A Guide for Managers and Leaders
Description:
"This book is a valuable resource for anyone seeking to create a more equitable and productive work environment". 
- Professor Deborah Christie, Professor of Paediatric and Adolescent Psychology


This book is a practical guide for anyone with managerial and leadership responsibilities. It walks you through what you need to know in order to develop neuroinclusive working cultures that enable, develop and get the best out of all team members.

Up to 20% of the working population has a neurodivergent difference – such as dyslexia, autism or ADHD. The diversity of thought and skills that such people bring to the workplace has been shown to increase creativity, enhance profitability and improve team morale. Managers and leaders have a key role to play in harnessing these benefits: it is up to them to create a neuroinclusive culture by setting the tone and approach.

Written by two experts in the field both with lived experience of neurodiversity, this book is a hands-on manual for adapting your organisation to better support neurodivergent talent and developing a more inclusive and strengths-based management style. The authors provide research evidence, reflective exercises and real-life case studies to deliver an irrefutable rationale for neuroinclusivity and the techniques needed to deliver it. Managers and leaders at all levels will develop their leadership and management capabilities; and organisations will find it easier to attract and retain talent, solve problems creatively and be more resilient – critical competences in the modern working world.

Sam and Liv also offer workshops and speaking events on this topic. For more information, please schedule some time to discuss here - https://calendly.com/olivia_blaney/30-minute-meeting-clone-1

Name: MASTERING RESPECT IN SALES: 7 Essentials for Success
Description:
A JOURNEY OF PASSION AND PURPOSE: MASTERING RESPECT IN SALES  

Albert Einstein's timeless words, "Try not to become a man of success, but rather a man of value," have always resonated deeply with me. My life's dedication revolves around adding value to others in meaningful ways.
Over time, sales has become a core competency through active learning and reflective experiences. This journey has allowed me to embrace my purpose – sharing this value with others. 

In our interconnected world, no one truly stands as an island. We rise by lifting others, and in turn, are uplifted. Throughout the years, I've had the privilege of mentoring and leading aspiring individuals, helping them move closer to their personal and career aspirations. It's been immensely gratifying to witness the majority of these individuals not only grow professionally but also become exceptional human beings. 

However, in a moment of enlightenment, I realized the limitations of this one-on-one approach. Why restrict my ability to impact only a select few? The desire to share my knowledge with all those seeking personal and professional development in the realm of sales and customer satisfaction ignited a new mission. 

This idea sparked the journey of writing "MASTERING RESPECT IN SALES: 7 Essentials for Success," a book dedicated to transforming both yourself and your sales approach into being more customer-focused and growth-driven. Fortunately, writing has always been one of my talents since my school days, which has allowed me to condense my extensive sales journey into this book, a labor of love that required over eight months of dedication, overcoming challenges like time-consuming research, balancing many roles, overcoming writer's block and absorbing the inevitable life hurdles that test your will to name a few. 

Completing the book was only the beginning. Bringing this literature to life in a timely and cost-effective manner was an enormous challenge in itself, but with persistence and resilience, I found a breakthrough. I am deeply honored to have the opportunity to make a significant difference in the world and to inspire individuals to give their best, not just for themselves but also for the betterment of others.

Name: Neuvare
Description:
One cannot explain the devastation stroke can have on one's life, unless it actually happens to you. The books 'Through the Eyes of a Survivor' are the author's way for loved ones to understand what a patient is experiencing by taking the reader deep into their world and letting them see life through their eyes; from the inside looking out.

My mission is to bring a better understanding of stroke to the family. Informal caregivers should understand what is expected of them before blindly jumping in. 

Having lived through the harrowing aftermath of surviving both a Traumatic Brain Injury and a Stroke. Both at relatively young ages. 

The books written by me are based on my personal experiences and not presumptions.

At eighteen, I was involved in a head-on collision when a drunk driver failed to stop at a stop sign and collided head-on with my vehicle. 

After a lengthy hospital stay, they discharged me into the care of my loving family. The years that followed were a sheer nightmare for those close to me, and after an extended recuperation, I miraculously made a full recovery.

In 2011, disaster struck again, but this time, it changed my life forever. I survived a near-fatal haemorrhagic brainstem stroke, which occurred in the early hours of the morning, striking with a destructive force and little to no warning. 

Surviving the stroke came with a hefty price tag, one that cost me an arm and a leg. It left him with permanent hemiplegia down the left side of my body. 

Once again, I evaded a meeting with the Grim Reaper. On both occasions, they turned out to be life-altering ordeals.

I wrote these books intending to take the unknown out of the equation, especially for those with loved one's going through a similar ordeal. The books will take you into the head and life of the survivor, helping you to see things through their eyes, from the inside out.

Description:
At P2P Bookstore, we're revolutionizing the way people buy and sell used books through our peer-to-peer marketplace. Our vision is to emerge as the premier global platform for trading used books.

Have you recently purchased a book? What did you do with the book after you finished reading it? Probably nothing, right? That's because there isn't currently an easy way to do something with it. You can try to sell it, donate it, or even dispose of it, but each of these options is somewhat complicated.

We bridge the gap between your book and someone who wants it. You can list it on our site in less than a minute with minimal effort. You can also purchase or request your next book to read effortlessly. We promote a cycle where you buy, read, and sell books as easily as possible.

Name: Reel Women Magazine
Description:
Welcome to Reel Women Magazine, the premier digital publication that gives women a powerful voice in the fishing industry. By women, for women, we are dedicated to representing and empowering female anglers in every aspect of the sport.

At Reel Women Magazine, we cover it all. Dive into our digital content, featuring in-depth fishing reports from various locations across the United States. Whether you're passionate about saltwater or freshwater fishing, our comprehensive coverage will keep you up to date with the latest techniques, hotspots, and species insights.

But we don't stop there. We proudly share inspiring stories of women heroes within our industry, highlighting their accomplishments and celebrating their contributions. We believe in showcasing the diverse talents and experiences of women who love to fish.

Gear up for success with our expert reviews on the latest fishing equipment, gear, and women-specific apparel. We understand that women have unique needs, and we're here to guide you toward products that enhance your fishing experience.

Reel Women Magazine offers a subscription model that goes beyond the print and digital realm. Upgrade your membership to gain access to exclusive video content, providing an even deeper dive into the world of fishing. It's like having a personal mentor by your side as you navigate the waters.

As a brand new company, we're ready to make waves in the fishing industry. Our engaging, professional, and active approach sets us apart. We're here to connect with women anglers of all ages, from beginners to seasoned pros, and create a community where you can thrive.

Join the movement. Reel Women Magazine: Giving Women a Voice in Fishing.

Name: The 55 Minutes
Description:
Albert Einstein is credited with saying, “If I had an hour to solve a problem, I’d spend fifty-five minutes thinking about the problem and five minutes thinking about solutions.” This book is about how to use those metaphorical first fifty-five minutes wisely. If we want to be successful when we innovate, act, or try to “change the system,” we need to get serious about understanding the problem. But problems don’t exist in a vacuum. They are enmeshed and ensnared in complexity. Moreover, the kinds of problems we face in our workplaces, institutions, and society at large are the results of systems.

Unfortunately, the world that most of us inhabit is focused on those last five minutes—rushing headlong toward a “solution” without having understood the problem. This happens in virtually every industry, organization, and sector of society. It’s one of the reasons most new businesses fail, most public policies are reactive, and “innovation” (whether commercial or social) spends far too much time in the unicorn-seeking land of hackathons, design sprints, and slick pitches, where confident answers make poor substitutes for authentic understanding. We work in “solutions-driven” companies, we expect governments to deliver rapid fixes, and we ask schools to teach and test for the “right” answers, instead of asking new and better questions.

Name: Emigrar a Argelia. Los pied noir valencianos
Description:
Si hoy estamos donde estamos y somos quienes somos es porque en algún momento algún antepasado nuestro tomó la decisión de dejar su casa y vivir en otro lugar. Así pues, este libro, que es una edición revisada y ampliada de una primera publicación, analiza la emigración de valencianos y alicantinos a Argelia, con causas, modos de vida e inquietudes similares a la población del sureste español que también emigró desde el siglo XIX hasta la independencia en 1962 y que tuvieron que exiliarse a Francia o España.  Son "pied noir". 
El libro realiza un esbozo sobre genealogía destinado a los aquellos con apellidos valencianos y que buscan sus antepasados, expone los motivos para emigrar a Argelia, así como una amplia visión de cómo era el modo de vida allí y se centra en historias personales de algunos "pied noir". 
En resumen, la Historia se repite, el patrón es el mismo, pero el destino y la época cambian.

Description: This is the page for all things connected with TJ's War, a book by @Iain Maclean,. This true story is about the life and experiences of Thomas John Maclean, who at the age of 18 was plucked from university in 1939 to become a soldier in the a Highland regiment of the British Army, and by 19 was a sergeant in Military Intelligence. The story is at once a war-story, an anti-war story, and a love story, it covers the entire duration of WWII, with a scope that touches on events in Hawaii, through to clandestine operations in Norway, Italy, Austria and even Ireland.

Welcome to Professional Bookholics, your go-to destination for nurturing the reading habit among professionals in Sri Lanka!

Here's how we're making a difference in the Sri Lankan professional landscape:

Curated Book Recommendations: We curate an extensive collection of self-help, non-fiction, and business books, ensuring that our selection includes the most influential and thought-provoking titles. Knowledge-Sharing Community: Professional Bookholics is more than just a collection of books. It's a vibrant community of like-minded professionals who share their insights, book reviews, and experiences. We encourage open discussions, idea sharing, and peer learning to foster personal and professional growth.

Book Clubs and Events: We host virtual and in-person book clubs, webinars, and events that facilitate discussions on the latest literary treasures. Engage in enriching conversations with fellow professionals and authors to gain new perspectives and ideas.

Reading Challenges: We organize reading challenges and competitions to encourage our members to set and achieve their reading goals. Whether you're aiming to read one book a month or conquer a specific reading list, we're here to support and motivate you.

Name: Faz de Conto Livraria
Description:

Pretendemos inspirar crianças e adultos, incentivando-os a subir a nossa escada e a olhar para dentro dos livros.

A Faz de Conto é uma livraria especializada em livros ilustrados e livros pop-up. Envolvida no verdejante Parque Verde, na margem esquerda do Rio Mondego, a livraria encontra-se no edifício do Exploratório - Centro Ciência Viva.

Para além de ter uma seleção de livros ilustrados e mecânicos, em português, espanhol, inglês e italiano, a Faz de Conto também desenvolve várias atividades na livraria, em escolas e bibliotecas, como sessões de histórias e oficinas de ilustração.

A livraria tem parcerias com empresas, escolas/colégios, fundações e câmaras municipais. Para estas instituições, a Faz de Conto apresenta soluções como: presentes de natal para filhos de funcionários, sessões de histórias, oficinas de ilustação, entre outras.

Name: Finlandia Kirja Oy
Description:
Finlandia Kirja on vuonna 2010 perustettu verkkokirjakauppa ja kirjojen kiertotalouden edelläkävijä, joka tarjoaa ainoana Suomessa laajan valikoiman niin uusia kuin käytettyjä kirjoja. 600 000 käytetyn kirjan valikoima yhdistettynä kotimaisten kustantajien yli 30 000 uuden kirjan valikoimaan tarjoaa markkinoiden monipuolisimman kokonaisuuden erilaisiin lukutarpeisiin.

Toimimme kiertotalouden edelläjävijänä kirja-alalla tarjoten vastuullisia ratkaisuja kirjan koko elinkaaren ajalle niin kuluttajille, kirjankustantajille, kirjastoille kuin uudelleenkäyttöalan toimijoille. Olemme Suomen ensimmäinen kirjakauppa, joka on hyväksytty YK:n Global Conductin jäseneksi. Vastuullisuustavoitteemme perustuvat Global Conductin yritysvastuun periaatetteisiin ja tavoitteisiin. Kierrätämme vuodessa noin 700 000 käytettyä kirjaa, joista suurin osa ohjataan finlandiakirja.fi -verkkokauppamme valikoimaan tai Ilmaisen Kirjan Päivä -hyväntekeväisyys- ja kierrätystapahtumaamme. Elinkaarensa päähän tulleet kirjat kierrätämme uusiokäyttöön, jolloin kirja pysyy edelleen hiilinieluna uusina tuotteina, kuten kotimaisena Ekovillana. Edistämme kuluttajien mahdollisuuksia kierrättää kirjansa vastuullisesti; toteutamme maanlaajuista kotinoutopalvelua yhteistyössä DB Schenkerin kanssa sekä ylläpidämme Kirjan Kiertorata -keräyslaatikoita kirjastoissa.

Olemme Suomen suurin yrittäjävetoinen kirjakauppa. Työllistämme liki 40 henkeä Orimattilan ja Lahden toimipaikoissamme. Olemme jäsenenä Kaupan liitossa, Kirjakauppaliitossa sekä RENET Uudelleenkäyttöverkostossa, missä yrittäjämme Matti Pietilä toimii myös hallituksen jäsenenä.

We send packages of books to schools across the UK. Please email for Europe and global postage options. For more information please take a look at our website www.microclimatebooks.co.uk or contact Rosie at info@microclimatebooks.co.uk

Name: Die Kommunikationsküche
Description:
Willkommen in der
KOMMUNIKATIONSKÜCHE
Was ist das eigentlich, gelingende Kommunikation?
Was zeichnet erfolgreiche Kommunikator:innen aus?
Und wie können wir alle zu einem gelingenderen Miteinander beitragen?
All dem gehen wir in unserem Rezeptbuch auf den Grund.

Wir, das sind Birgit und Anja, die beiden Autorinnen, und in unserem Sachbuch geht es um Kommunikation im beruflichen wie im privaten Kontext. Immer im Bewusstsein, dass Zeit knapp ist, während Aufmerksamkeits-spannen geringer und Zündschnüre kürzer werden. Genau deshalb ist es ein Rezeptbuch geworden: Die Anleitungen sind kurz, einfach nachzuvollziehen und im Ergebnis ein Genuss.

Die Kommunikationsküche will vor allem sensibilisieren. So Vieles im täglichen Miteinander geht nicht aus böser Absicht schief sondern aus Unachtsamkeit. Dieses Rezeptbuch fördert das Erkennen und Meistern kritischer Situationen und lädt zum Ausprobieren im eigenen Alltag ein. Du bekommst mit diesem Ratgeber also eine Sammlung von wertvollen und hilfreichen Good Practices an die Hand, verfeinert durch die erprobte Anwendung in Workshops und Coachings. Umsetzungsstarke Anleitungen und Beispiele, die du im privaten und beruflichen Kontext sofort einsetzen kannst. 

Über die Autorinnen:
Die Marburgerin Birgit Becker ist Trainerin und Corporate Learning Professional. Anja Kellermann lebt in Heidelberg und arbeitet als Business-Coach. Die Illustrationen von Magdalena Adomeit runden das Rezeptbuch ab.

Bestellen kannst du das Buch über unsere Webseite: www.diekommunikationskueche.de

Name: Sherry States Books
Description:
My first book is Take Everything to Christ and the second book is Sherry's Candies and Cookies: Secrets, Tips, and Hints, both authored under my previous married name of Knight. Now I am authoring work under my maiden name of States.
Never Forsaken: God Delivered Me is about the struggles of a woman brought up with feet in both worlds and learning to overcome the world through the guidance and deliverance of God. It took many lessons to learn we cannot live in both worlds and there is a time to choose, which would a Christian wants to live in.
This is a story of rapes, failed marriages, health issues, alcoholism, miscarriages, and many more storms. However, through it, all God never abandons her nor forsakes them here. In addition, to multiple healings from seizures, COPD, and heart attack. As well as overcoming learning disabilities to achieve a Master of Business Administration. Against incredible odds, I survived and conquered with Christ by my side.
As well as moving 53 times in 60 years and a life of being beaten by my stepfather as a child until I learned how to beat him up. I was told I was dumb, had a big mouth, big feet, and would never amount to anything.
. Moving and disabilities I failed high school and then graduated the next year. I went on to earn an MBA and multiple degrees. Against all the odds. I also suffered through 15 years of alcohol addiction and 2 divorces and 1 annulment.  During the marriage of the annulment, I was trapped and locked up and had to escape the marriage. In truth, you cannot make this stuff up. It is greater than fiction. You need to read the book to get all the incidents and events God delivered me from
He is always faithful to deliver me. There are miracles, healings, overcoming tragedies, angel encounters, and near-death. experience. Release date to be determined. Please keep your eyes out for Never Forsaken: God Delivered Me at the end of the year or beginning of next year.

Name: Najib Azad
Description:
Beyond Evacuation
From The Himalayas to the Stature of Liberty:

Najibullah Azad’s memoir offers a whole new and more personal understanding of the ancient and magnificent country of Afghanistan and its people. 
Leader of a progressive political party, and former spokesman for the President of Afghanistan, Azad knew he was a marked man the moment the Taliban entered Kabul in 2021. This is his harrowing and heartwarming story of how he, his wife and four small children were forced, like his parents and grandparents before him, to seek refuge abroad. 
Written on napkins and pieces of cardboard while in refugee camps, the deep love felt by Azad for his country, fellow Afghans and his family emanates from every word as he takes us on his journey from his office in Kabul to a new life in the USA. Readers walk every step with him, feel every moment of anguish as he strives to allay his children’s suffering as well as that of others around him.

Name: The Trust Paradigm
Description:
In any normality trust is paramount, but given current world events, never has there been more need for increased trust. This simple formula emphasizes the key elements of trust for individuals and for organizations:

Trust = Transparency + Relationship + Experience 

The Trust Paradigm draws on the hard-won truths of two authors, Geoff Hudson-Searle and Mark Herbert, and draws on their deep personal lessons from life and business practice, and their efforts to distil those lessons into principles that lead towards a more purposeful life.

The book is intended to be both a holistic overview of what generates and builds trust, and a hands-on guide to how that can be done. A wide range of tips, models and techniques that will help to build strong and effective trust solutions in today’s business world are combined with a range of insights into the topical subjects of the day.

The term ‘trust’ has been overused forever and, during the last decade, considerably devalued. In this book, the authors aim to take the concept back to its essentials and to re-evaluate how real, meaningful trust can be incorporated into management and leadership

Description: A new biography of Charles Lindbergh which reviews his contribution to American security and isolationism. Name: Trauma To Hope
Description:
Introducing the Trauma To Hope: A Haven for Book Lovers and Mental Wellness Advocates

Welcome to the Trauma To Hope, where the love of literature intersects with the importance of mental well-being. We're thrilled to invite you to join our vibrant community of readers, writers, and mental health enthusiasts as we embark on a journey of self-discovery, connection, and support.

What We Offer:

At the Trauma To Hope, we understand the profound impact that books and community can have on our lives. That's why we've created a space where members can come together to share their love of reading, engage in meaningful discussions, and support one another through life's challenges. Here's what you can expect from our community:

Book Clubs and Discussion Groups: Dive into the world of literature by joining one of our book clubs or discussion groups. Whether you're passionate about fiction, non-fiction, poetry, or self-help books, there's a group for you. Share your thoughts, insights, and recommendations with fellow book lovers and discover new literary treasures along the way.

Online Community and Discord Server: Connect with like-minded individuals from around the world through our online community and Discord server. Our Discord server offers a safe and welcoming space where members can chat, share book recommendations, participate in virtual book club meetings, and more. Join us for lively discussions, author Q&A sessions, and special events designed to celebrate our shared love of reading.

Mental Health Support: We recognize the importance of mental health and provide a dedicated space for members to vent, share, and seek support. Our mental health section offers a supportive environment where individuals can express themselves freely, knowing they are among friends who understand and care. Whether you're struggling with anxiety, depression, or simply need someone to listen, you'll find a compassionate community here to support

O resultado é uma oferta conjugada de novo e usado em que procuramos trazer o que de melhor e mais recente se edita no Brasil, recuperando e dando uma nova vida a obras editadas em Portugal, muitas delas esgotadas no mercado editorial.

Paralelamente, e dando expressão ao nosso gosto particular por gadgets literários, procuramos oferecer presentes originais e úteis que satisfaçam o gosto literário dos nossos leitores.

Name: Hiring Humans

The #1 Amazon Best Selling Book from acclaimed author, Craig Fisher

The reviews are in!
"Amazing book for Talent Acquisition Leaders! An enjoyable read that will leave you full of ideas! Craig understands what it takes to get your recruiting function to world-class." - Tim Sackett, President HRU Technical Resources

"A must read for all talent acquisition professionals. This book isn't a tool, it's a weapon in the TA arsenal! I highly recommend you add this to your library today!" - Jim D'Amico, Director Shoreside Talent Acquisition, Holland America Group

"Despite Craig's marquee-studded career, he approaches hiring humans (the book and the concept) with incredible thoughtfulness and practicality. It's clear that Craig Fisher is just getting started." - Maren Hogan, CEO of Red Branch Media

Hiring Humans is both inspirational and actionable and will leave readers with a wealth of ideas to help them hire successfully in the new world of work." – Lars Schmidt, Founder Amplify Talent

on all the targets that keeps job seekers and recruiting professionals up at night.
Great advice, a quick read and a must for every library." - Gerry Crispin, Principal & Co-Founder CareerXroads

Step into the world of talent acquisition advocate Craig Fisher, as he navigates the delicate balance between the cutting edge and the classic—Fisher unveils the art and science of attracting, converting, and retaining top talent.

Name: La Librairie.
Description:
« Un livre pour chacun, un lieu pour tous. »

Un lieu né d’un désir ancien, pas encore nommé.
Un jour, il s’est dessiné. Presque tout seul. Mais pas tout seul.

Un lieu où le livre peut devenir le prétexte d’autre chose : une rencontre, un écho, une transmission.

On ne vient pas seulement chercher un livre à La Librairie.
On y vient pour autre chose.
Pour un silence partagé. Une voix reconnue.
Pour une conversation, un flottement.
Pour un souvenir, parfois. Pour ce qui reste, même une fois sorti.

On n’a pas construit un concept.
On a bâti un lieu à partir de ce qu’on est.

La Librairie., c’est un lieu indépendant.
Sans dogme mais pas sans convictions.
Une librairie généraliste de quartier,
engagée dans le lien de proximité, la création de repères culturels et l’ouverture à toutes les voix :
celles qui résonnent, celles qui dérangent,
celles qu’on n’a pas toujours l’habitude d’entendre.

On y trouve des livres, bien sûr.
Une sélection exigeante mais accessible.
Des récits, des pensées, des formes graphiques.
Des mots qui bousculent, d’autres qui réconfortent.
Des choix, toujours assumés. Et parfois inattendus.

Et puis des rendez-vous. Des ateliers. Des lectures. Des voix.
Des livres lus à haute voix, pour les petits et pour les grands.
Des auteurs, des autrices.
Des idées qui s’échangent sans podium.
Des histoires qui circulent sans costume.

La Librairie., c’est un lieu d’usage.
Un lieu vivant. Un lieu répit. Un lieu repère.
Un lieu qu’on fréquente, qu’on adopte, qu’on recommande.
Un lieu qui s’imprime doucement dans le quotidien.
Et qui laisse la place à chacun et chacune.

Un lieu qui ne ressemble à aucun autre,
mais qui pourrait, peut-être, ressembler un peu à chacune.

Un lieu qu’on rêve de transmettre.
Un lieu qu’on rêve de voir durer.

Name: Casa Cosmos
Description:
Era uma vez uma mãe, uma filha e uma cabana mágica. Essa cabana era também secreta: esconderijo para onde fugiam sempre que a vida ficava feia ou chata demais. Era só entrar na cabana para esquecer o mundo lá fora e viver aventuras com companheiros incríveis como o urso Paddington e o Pequeno Príncipe.

Com o passar do tempo, a cabana foi ficando pequena demais para tantas aventuras. Precisaram criar uma Casa acolhedora e grande o suficiente para abrigar infinitas histórias e receber todos que quisessem se juntar. Uma casa que abrigasse todo o Cosmos. A Casa Cosmos. Lugar para amar livros, ser criança sem pressa e fazer parte de uma corrente de afeto e cuidado.

Nessa Casa, acreditamos que os livros são ferramentas poderosas para refletir sobre o mundo e nos conectar com nossas emoções. Nos sustentamos em seis pilares fundamentais: leitura, brincadeira, natureza, arte, diversidade e aventura. Focamos em editoras menores, que oferecem conteúdos profundos e originais. Valorizamos histórias com temas fraturantes, como morte, gênero, e assuntos essenciais para o crescimento emocional das crianças.

Somos também um espaço de acolhimento, um lugar que recebe pais e mães não para doutrinar sobre a criação perfeita, mas para aprender como construir juntos a infância respeitosa tão essencial para o desenvolvimento humano. Somos um polo de atividades culturais que proporciona vivências para cuidadores e bebês e oficinas educativas para crianças. Somos um ponto de encontro para rodas de conversa, cursos e eventos relacionados à infância e à parentalidade. Somos um lugar em que adultos podem tomar café da manhã no restaurante do jardim, enquanto seus filhos brincam ao lado. Um espaço onde as crianças são verdadeiramente vistas e bem-vindas, e onde cuidadores podem compartilhar experiências sem medo de julgamentos. Um lugar que a mãe e filha da cabana não conseguiram encontrar lá atrás enquanto enfrentavam um processo de luto.

Vem visitar a Casa e embarcar no nosso foguete!

Name: John Wemlinger - Author
Description:
I was a young Army captain in 1973 when our nation’s military transitioned from a conscripted to an all-volunteer force. I had doubts, but over the next twenty-two years, I took great pride as the Army moved from an institution scorned in the years immediately following Vietnam to one held in the highest respect today. Today’s military has fewer men and women in it than ever before, but I have the greatest confidence in their ability to defend the freedoms all of us cherish as Americans. Today’s military is better equipped, better trained, and more professional.

Since September 11, 2001, America has necessarily been engaged in a Global War on Terrorism. Fighting an enemy that does not wear a uniform, has little regard for human life and no moral compass guiding it is much more of a challenge than anything I faced while in service. Our military faces difficult issues. So, I write to help all of us understand these difficulties impacting our men and women in uniform.

Here’s a quick glimpse of the issues addressed by each of my books:

Winter’s Bloom deals with PTSD

Operation Light Switch takes on the vagaries of military justice

Before the Snow Flies tells a complex story of military suicide

The Widow and the Warrior is about vigilante justice

The Cut is historical fiction set after the Civil War. It tells the story of two wounded vets, one white, the other black, who become reluctant leaders taking on Big Lumber in northern Michigan in 1871.

The Road to Empire is a modern-day family saga telling what it’s like for service members and their families to serve during the Global War on Terrorism. 

Those of us who are readers, do so for various reasons. Regardless of your reason for reading, I hope you enjoy the read.

John currently serves on the following boards:
• State Library of Michigan Foundation, Board of Directors – Board Member
• Village of Onekama Council – Trustee

Copyright, John Wemlinger, LLC, 2024. All rights reserved.

Name: MyLittleHero
Description:
Il avait 6 ans.
On lui a offert un livre. Il a lu 3 pages. Puis il a dit :

“C’est pas moi ça… c’est toujours les autres les héros.”

Et là, on a compris :
 Les enfants ne lisent pas juste des histoires.
Ils veulent se voir dedans.
Ils veulent devenir les héros de leur propre vie.

 Une étude menée auprès de 2 000 enfants montre :

91 % sont plus engagés quand ils s’identifient au personnage principal.
Mais dans la majorité des livres, ils sont absents. Invisibles.

“Les enfants deviennent ce qu’on leur répète chaque soir.”

Alors on a créé My Little Hero : une collection de livres personnalisés puissants, pour les enfants de 1 à 9 ans.
Des histoires construites pour renforcer l’estime, la confiance, l’intelligence émotionnelle… et l’amour de la lecture.

Chaque livre contient :
 L’enfant en héros
 Son prénom, son apparence, son doudou
 Un message personnalisé des parents
 Une problématique forte : séparation, peur, confiance…
 Des défis simples à faire à la maison
 Une morale claire
 Une comptine personnalisée
 Validé par des psych
Nos livres sont adaptés à chaque tranche d'âge, avec des thématiques et un vocabulaire conçus pour correspondre au développement et aux besoins de chaque enfant.

Notre mission est d'aider les enfants à découvrir leurs forces et à se développer émotionnellement et intellectuellement à travers des aventures ludiques, engageantes et éducatives. 

Nous proposons :

Des Livres de Développement Personnel Personnalisés 
Des Aventures Magiques Adaptées à Votre Enfant 
Des Histoires qui Enseignent des Valeurs comme la Gentillesse, le Courage et la Résilience 

Avec My Little Hero, le nom, les traits et la personnalité de votre enfant sont intégrés dans chaque histoire, faisant de chaque livre un voyage unique et inoubliable. Ensemble, nous aidons les parents à nourrir des héros en herbe confiants, curieux et compatissants. 

Inspirons la prochaine génération de héros, une histoire à la fois !

Name: LoveReading4Kids
Description:
Reading books changes lives. Now buying books through the LoveReading4Kids online bookstore can change lives, too.

LoveReading and LoveReading4Kids, the UK’s leading book recommendation website, has launched an online bookshop with social purpose, in response to the book funding crisis in schools – in a move that’s been praised by the New Children’s Laureate.

Launched 17 years ago, LoveReading and LoveReading4Kids have since become a staple for readers looking for their next book.

Now, they have relaunched, enabling readers the ability to purchase books directly from the site, with 25% of the cover price being donated to a school, delivering better outcomes for the UK’s children. Readers will also receive 10% off the RRP on a huge selection of titles.

Recent research by the Centre for Literacy in Primary Education found that the school funding crisis means that 60% of classrooms have no access to a budget for new books.

Studies also show that reading and writing are key to unlocking a child’s learning potential and allows them to overcome a disadvantaged background.

Offering a socially conscious way to buy books online, LoveReading’s new venture will allow book buyers to actively support their local school. For books ordered and directly allocated to a particular school, the school will receive 25% of the cover price from each sale. When a sale is made and not attributed to a specific school, 10% of the cover price will go into a pot that will then be split between LoveReading’s school members, prioritising a percentage for schools in particular need and supporting pupils in deprived areas.

Go on, buy a book, support a school  and make a difference. 
Because books change lives.

www.lovereading.co.uk 
www.lovereading4kids.co.uk

Disgruntled housewife, Joann Santiago, desires a little adventure in her life and decides to have an affair. Name: Grace At Road's End
Description:
Buoyed by a year of promise, Danny Callahan begins a new year believing he’s finally found his forever—love, a promising career, and a life that makes sense. Instead, it becomes the year that breaks him.

In the wreckage of his old life, Danny drives south to Key West in search of somewhere—anywhere—to land. What he finds there isn’t escape. It’s a chance to rebuild.

In the quiet company of new friends and unexpected mercies, Danny begins the slow work of stitching himself back together. But healing requires more than sunshine and rum-soaked evenings, and the ocean has a way of unburying what hurts. To move forward, Danny must confront what he’s lost, what he still fears, and the unexpected love that asks him to believe again.

Heartfelt, funny, and overflowing with warmth, Grace at Road’s End is a novel about the people who pick us up, the losses that reshape us, and the surprising grace waiting at the end of even our hardest seasons.

Future Release: Fall 2026
