Name: FriendlyFireVeterans
Description:
This book was written for patients, their loved ones, mental health professionals, policymakers, and anyone interested in learning more about treatment for PTSD with medical cannabis.

In Friendly Fire: Why Vets Are Ditching Pills and Lighting Up to Treat PTSD, you’ll get answers to the most common questions people have about cannabis and PTSD:
- What research supports the use of cannabis as a PTSD treatment?
- What is the endocannabinoid system (our body’s own cannabinoid system) and how is it implicated in PTSD?
- What are the potential risks and benefits of using cannabis to treat PTSD?
- In terms of safety and efficacy, how does cannabis as a treatment compare to pharmaceutical drugs?
- Are there physiological causes of PTSD, rather than just psychological reasons? What are they, why are they important, and how can cannabis help address underlying physiological causes?
- What treatments are effective to treat PTSD that don’t involve medication?

We’ll also address many of the myths surrounding PTSD, as well as myths and facts about medical cannabis. And, while we discuss cannabis as treatment throughout this book, we are not proposing that cannabis alone can “cure” post-traumatic stress. There is no “magic pill” — or, in this case, a “magic flower."

If you want to sift through the misinformation and disinformation about PTSD and long-stigmatized cannabis, this book is for you. If you are living with PTSD or a loved one is living with PTSD, this book is for you. If you want to gain the knowledge necessary to defend cannabis as a treatment for PTSD, this book is for you.

Buy Friendly Fire today to gain valuable insights into PTSD treatment that works.

Name: Dale Bailey
Description:
ABOUT THE BOOK

This book opens with a concise overview of how poetry became an essential component in Mr. Bailey’s journey toward recovery from PTSD. It is followed by a collection of 61 poems written from the initial onset of his PTSD to the present, charting his progression from the darkest periods through to his current state.

ABOUT THE AUTHOR

Dale M. Bailey is a United States Air Force veteran and retired Master Sergeant (E-7). Over his 20-year military career, he served 16 years as a member of Security Forces (military police) before retraining into the Command Post, where he spent his final four years as superintendent at Charleston Air Force Base in South Carolina. His assignments included Seymour Johnson Air Force Base in North Carolina from February 1990 to February 1994—with a deployment to Saudi Arabia following the first Gulf War—Osan Air Base in the Republic of Korea from February 1994 to February 1995, and a return to Seymour Johnson Air Force Base from March 1995 to September 2005. During this period, he was deployed multiple times to the Middle East in support of Operations Southern Watch, Enduring Freedom, and Iraqi Freedom. Throughout his tenure in Security Forces, Mr. Bailey held various roles including Installation Entry Controller, patrolman, desk sergeant, criminal investigator, non-commissioned officer-in-charge of Security Forces Training, and flight sergeant. A significant incident as flight sergeant in September 2004 led to the onset of his PTSD

Description:
Belgium has a history full of blurring borders, battles over boundaries, and consequent shifts in local land and culture. Perhaps, its geographic location ignites an inherent interest in cartography. For centuries, Belgium has built a reputation for its magnificent maps, but in today’s satellite world, is there a place for old-fashioned Flemish cartography in the world of modern crafts?
Stefan Ceulemans certainly thinks so. The latest in the line of outstanding Flemish cartographers, Stefan is a firm believer in the artistic and cultural merit of maps. In 1997 Mr. Ceulemans father was approached by the state of Israel to create an art-map series of Jerusalem in honor of the 50 year anniversary of the Israeli State.
The series took over three years to complete, and it received international attention while being promoted by the National Geographic Society.

Name: Wohlfühloase Selbstbewusstsein
Description:
Selbstbewusstsein wird überall gefeiert – aber versteht noch jemand, was es wirklich bedeutet?

In sozialen Medien, Politik und Wirtschaft gilt heute: Wer überzeugt klingt, hat recht. Wer zögert, verliert. Und wer zweifelt, gilt als schwach.

Doch was, wenn diese Kultur der permanenten Selbstüberzeugung uns gerade das raubt, was echtes Selbstbewusstsein ausmacht?

Das erwartet Sie in diesem Buch:
„Wohlfühloase Selbstbewusstsein" ist kein klassischer Ratgeber. Es verspricht keine 5-Schritte-Formel zum Erfolg, keine schnelle Lösung, keine bessere Version des Ichs. Stattdessen nimmt es Sie mit auf eine kritische, oft satirische Reise durch die Welt der Ich-Experten, Motivationsseminare und PowerPoint-Kulturen – und zeigt, wie sehr wir Selbstbewusstsein mit Selbstdarstellung verwechselt haben.

✓ Satirisch, aber nie zynisch
Die Beispiele sind zugespitzt – vom Fitness-Propheten über den Finanz-Messias bis zum politischen Influencer. Nicht, um zu verletzen, sondern um sichtbar zu machen, was im Gewohnten unsichtbar wird.

✓ Gesellschaftlich relevant
Das Buch zeigt, wie die Verwechslung von Lautstärke mit Kompetenz nicht nur Individuen, sondern ganze Systeme prägt – von Unternehmen über Politik bis zur öffentlichen Debatte.

Für wen ist dieses Buch?
✓ Für alle, die sich in der Welt der Selbstdarstellung unwohl fühlen
Sie haben das Gefühl, dass etwas nicht stimmt mit der permanenten Selbstvermarktung – können es aber nicht genau benennen? Dieses Buch gibt Ihnen die Worte dafür.

✓ Für Führungskräfte und Entscheider
Sie wollen verstehen, warum Ihre Organisation mehr redet als handelt – und wie man wieder zu echter Kompetenz zurückfindet.

Was Sie NICHT erwarten sollten:
 Eine 7-Schritte-Anleitung zu mehr Selbstbewusstsein
 Motivationssprüche und Affirmationen
 Einfache Antworten auf komplexe Fragen
 Ein Wohlfühlbuch, das Ihnen nach dem Mund redet

Name: Libros del Sur
Description:
En Libros del Sur, creemos que el acceso al conocimiento transforma futuros.

Nacimos desde el corazón del mundo académico, entendiendo de primera mano las necesidades reales de estudiantes e instituciones. Nuestra misión es ser el puente más ágil y eficiente entre el saber esencial y quienes lo buscan para crecer.

Comenzamos como un socio estratégico para universidades, especializándonos en la provisión de textos académicos y material de estudio.

Hoy, expandimos esa misión. Entendemos que el aprendizaje no se limita al aula. Por eso, estamos construyendo un ecosistema que conecta nuestro catálogo curado no solo con más instituciones, sino también directamente con los lectores, profesionales y estudiantes que liderarán el mañana.

Lo que hacemos
Creamos soluciones de abastecimiento de libros para dos mundos que se complementan:

 Para Universidades e Instituciones: Somos más que un proveedor; somos un socio logístico y académico. Entendemos sus ciclos, presupuestos y la urgencia del material de estudio. Ofrecemos una gestión de compras ágil, precios competitivos al por mayor y la certeza de que el conocimiento correcto llegará a sus bibliotecas y aulas a tiempo.

 Para Estudiantes y Lectores: Te conectamos directamente con los libros que necesitas para tu carrera y tu curiosidad. Olvídate de las barreras. Accede a un catálogo de calidad académica, seleccionado por expertos, y pensado para tus ganas de aprender. [Próximamente lanzaremos nuestra plataforma directa al lector].

Nuestro Enfoque
No solo movemos libros. Aplicamos una visión moderna de negocios y ciencia de datos para optimizar nuestra selección, logística y precios. Esto nos permite ser más eficientes para las grandes instituciones y, a la vez, más accesibles para el estudiante.

Somos Libros del Sur. Conectando la academia con los lectores.

Không giống như những kiến thức trên internet bạn chỉ cần sử dụng công cụ tìm kiếm là có thể ra hàng trăm kết quả, muốn tìm một cuốn sách không phải điều dễ dàng. Có những cuốn sách, bạn muốn tìm đọc nhưng vì đã cũ nên không còn tái bản nữa. Ngày nay, nhiều hiệu sách đã được mở nhưng Nhà Sách Xưa và Nay vẫn được nhiều độc giả mến mộ.

Đến với nhà sách, bạn sẽ tìm được vô vàn những cuốn sách có giá trị. Thậm chí, ngay cả những cuốn sách đã không còn được xuất bản nữa, bạn có thể tìm thấy ở đây. Nhà sách cũ có rất nhiều sách thuộc rất nhiều thể loại mà không phải nhà sách nào cũng có thể đáp ứng được.

Name: Yemen Book Shop
Description:
Since 1980, Yemen Bookshop has been on a mission to transform education across Yemen. As the exclusive partner of 40+ global publishers, we've fought through challenges to bring world-class English educational resources to our nation. Under the passionate leadership of Nashwan Al-Maghafi, we don't just deliver books – we deliver opportunities, connecting Yemeni students, teachers and professionals to the knowledge they need to thrive.
About Us
When we opened our doors as Yemen's first independent English bookstore in 1980, we had a simple but powerful vision: to make quality education accessible to everyone in our country. Today, that vision drives everything we do.
Our dedication goes beyond books. We've trained over 5,000 teachers, transformed curricula in private schools, created vibrant reading clubs for children, and built bridges between international publishers and local readers. During times when others closed their doors, we expanded – opening new branches in Sana'a and Aden in 2015 despite the conflict.
We're proud to offer:

Specialized English resources for students, teachers, doctors and researchers
Teacher training that brings modern teaching methods to Yemeni classrooms
Weekly "Journey with YBS" activities connecting children with the joy of reading
Support for schools implementing international curricula
Community programs that have touched over 10,000 students

The challenges we face are real, but so is our commitment. Even as war threatened to disconnect Yemen from global education, we've remained the vital link, continuing to import books when others couldn't. Because we believe that even in the hardest times, access to knowledge isn't a luxury – it's essential.
Join us in building a future where every Yemeni has the resources they need to learn, grow and succeed.

Name: Nodes of Wisdom
Description:
Unlock the secrets of design excellence with Nodes of Wisdom: Lessons from 100 Creative Visionaries by Ravi Tejj. This compelling guide dives deep into the minds of the world's leading creatives, revealing their unique insights, strategies, and stories. This book covers everything from mastering the fundamentals to exploring cutting-edge technologies like AI, AR, and VR.

Discover how empathy fuels innovation, storytelling breathes life into data, and resilience turns setbacks into stepping stones. Uncover the art of personal branding, the power of feedback, and the essentials of design leadership. Each chapter is a practical guide filled with inspiring anecdotes and actionable frameworks designed to empower and elevate your creative practice.

Whether you're a student, a seasoned professional, or simply someone intrigued by the world of design, Nodes of Wisdom welcomes you with open arms. This book is more than a guide—it's a mentor, a motivator, and a source of endless inspiration, tailored to your unique creative needs.

Embark on a personal growth journey with Tejj through the dynamic design world and uncover the secrets to creating beautiful, impactful, and meaningful products. Nodes of Wisdom is not just a book it's a catalyst for your creative evolution. Your transformative journey begins here.

Name: Book Renewal Network
Description:
The Book Renewal Network is a sustainability-driven initiative committed to rescuing books from destruction and giving them new life in the hands of readers, educators, and communities in need. Our mission is simple but powerful: reduce waste, revive knowledge, and renew the joy of reading, while keeping perfectly good books out of landfills.

Through our growing network of volunteers, partners, and Eco-conscious readers, we collect unwanted books destined for disposal and re-home them where they'll be valued again, whether in schools, shelters, local libraries, or curated resale bundles that support green literacy efforts.

We believe every book has the power to spark imagination and inspire change. By keeping stories in circulation, we help protect the planet and preserve the power of the written word.

 Renewing Books. Restoring the Planet. One Story at a Time.

Name: What Could Go Right
Description:
Now available in Paperback and Kindle!

What Could Go Right invites you to ditch cynicism about the future, and build the one you want.

Instead of worst-case scenarios or Pollyanna optimism, you can envision an ideal world and be empowered to build it. The opportunity of our era is to transition to a sustainable, equitable, abundant global economy. When you rethink your mindset, understand tech and social trends, and design a future you want to live in, you can thrive by building a better future for us all.

Packed with insights, tools, and ideas for what an ideal future might look like and how to build it, What Could Go Right focuses on these three things.

Mindset: Rather than accepting dystopian tropes about our future, we'll look at the reality of our current time as the most abundant and empowered humanity has ever been-and witness it getting better. By focusing on an ideal future, you can switch to an empowered mindset and invite collaborators to build a better future together. You'll explore tools and frameworks like Design Thinking, Three Horizons, Five Dynamics, and more, to turn inspiration into pragmatic thinking, planning, and execution.

Trends and Opportunities: Explore the empowering tools, sustainable shifts in industry and technology, and social evolutions that are making a more equitable, distributed, democratic, cleaner economy possible. The economic, climate, and social crises around us are accelerating the urgency for change. This motivates communities and societies to collaborate. It inspires innovators to create new tools and approaches-all to make the transition to a better future.

Envision a Better Future: Start imagining what an ideal future might look like by making the most of existing technology and knowledge. With thought leaders and industry experts, you'll tour a future that is abundant, a Zero Marginal Cost Society, post-scarcity, and Omni-Thriving, all by applying Maslow's hierarchy of personal needs to social needs.

Name: An American's Guide to the Constitution
Description:
My Fellow American,

Our nation was founded on the premise that all people are created equal. No matter their background, Americans are entitled to unalienable rights, given to us by God and secured under the US Constitution.

The purpose of this constitution guide is to give you–my fellow American–the opportunity to better understand these rights, so that the legacy of our founders is not forgotten.

I urge you–do not fall victim to the manufactured division and hate that plagues our society.

As you study this book, remember:
You are an American. We are Americans.

And together, we can preserve the American identity of freedom and prosperity, for everyone.


For liberty,

Zander Guckian
Citizen of the United States of America

Description:
THE GOLDEN BOY - Trader

Written by Lucas Baurianne, sponsored by Derivatives Academy, Prepcareer, Prepaya. Reviewed by dozens of traders from the biggest investment banks in the world.

Step into the exciting life of a trading intern through The Golden Boy, a captivating 110-page illustrated book. Follow Enzo as he navigates the competitive world of global markets.

Name: Sidelined No Longer: the Untold Story of Women’s College Sports
Description:
While today's women athletes fill stadiums and sign multimillion-dollar contracts, the architects of their opportunity remain largely unknown. Sidelined No Longer reveals the battle waged by eleven women administrators in the late 1970s who recognized that the very organizations meant to advance women's athletics were sometimes holding them back.

At the story's center is Jean Cerra, the University of Missouri's women's athletic director. Cerra and her colleagues at major universities challenged the Association for Intercollegiate Athletics for Women's limiting vision. Cerra, herself, fought for a pragmatic approach that would truly deliver on Title IX's promise of equality.

Karen Rudolph masterfully connects these "hidden figures" to today's explosion in women's sports—from Nebraska's 92,000 volleyball fans to the first privately-financed women's soccer stadium. This essential history illuminates how yesterday's unsung heroes created a foundation for women to compete, lead, and inspire based on competence "from the neck up" rather than gender.

Name: De Boekenkamer Kootwijkerbroek
Description:
In het hart van ons dorp Kootwijkerbroek schuilt een bijzondere schat, een oase van kennis, verhalen en ontspanning. Boekenwinkel De Boekenkamer, gelegen aan de doorgaande weg van ons dorp, is niet zomaar een boekenwinkel; het is een toevluchtsoord voor zij die houden van lezen of op zoek zijn naar een naslagwerk. Hier, tussen de planken vol spannende verhalen vinden klanten niet alleen boeken, maar ook ontspanning, rust en christelijke boeken.

Als trotse eigenaar van deze boekenwinkel ben ik verheugd om te zien hoe onze ruimte zich ontpopt tot een plek waar nieuwsgierige lezers en ‘boekzoekenden’ samenkomen. We koesteren een rijke verzameling nieuwe en tweedehands christelijke boeken, die variëren van tijdloze theologische werken tot werken rondom actuele thema’s.

In een tijdperk waarin digitale schermen en virtuele ervaringen steeds meer de aandacht van kinderen trekken, blijft het belang van traditioneel speelgoed in de ontwikkeling van kinderen van onschatbare waarde. Bij de Boekenkamer, een bruisende winkel van verhalen en ontdekkingen, geloven we sterk in de kracht van speelgoed om kinderen te stimuleren, te inspireren en te laten groeien. 

Een van de belangrijkste aspecten van speelgoed is het vermogen om kinderen aan te moedigen tot exploratie en ontdekking. Door middel van spelen leren kinderen over oorzaak en gevolg, ruimtelijke relaties, en het ontwikkelen van probleemoplossend vermogen. Onze collectie speelgoed is ontworpen om deze nieuwsgierigheid en ontdekking aan te moedigen, waardoor kinderen de wereld om hen heen op een speelse en interactieve manier kunnen verkennen.

Welkom bij onze winkel aan de Wesselseweg 178-2 te Kootwijkerbroek!

Of je nu op zoek bent naar een meeslepend verhaal om te verdwalen in de pagina's van een boek, een uniek stuk speelgoed om de verbeelding van je kinderen te prikkelen, of een geschenk dat recht uit het hart komt, bij ons vind je het allemaal.

Name: Happiness After All

Your Go-To Sanctuary for Authentic Self-Love & Empowerment

Why We Exist:

Happiness After All is on an elevated mission to be your most authentic and empowering self-love ally. Our approach is playful yet potent, deeply rooted in the real-life, no-nonsense journey to self-discovery that our founder navigated herself. You see, we don't just preach self-love; we live it every single day.

What We Do:

We offer an array of resources, all thoughtfully curated for the modern woman who's juggling a million things but refuses to drop the ball on herself. Whether it's our series of 33 bite-sized books, perfect for consuming in those rare moments of 'me-time,' or our therapeutic coloring books designed for ultimate relaxation and reflection, we've got you covered.

How We Make an Impact:

At the core of our mission is the belief that self-love isn't a destination—it's a lifelong journey, and we're your travel companions. We promote holistic wellness through external tools and internal shifts, all wrapped up in a package of empowerment and authenticity.

Our Vision:

We're not just building a company; we're cultivating a community—a sisterhood, if you will. We envision a world where women are seen, heard, and celebrated for their unique selves, free from societal labels that limit their expansive potential. As we grow, watch out for an evolving suite of daily practices, coloring books, and digital platforms, each intentionally designed to enhance your journey to becoming the very best version of you.

Our Promise:

Everything we do, from product design to community engagement, is delivered with an uncompromising blend of passion and intentionality. We're here to inspire you to take that bold, exciting first step toward the life you're destined for, but perhaps never dared to live.

Come join us in rewriting the narrative around self-love, in shattering glass ceilings, and in unlocking the limitless potential that exists within every woman.

Name: The Introduction Effect

One particular person had introduced them to an opportunity that helped them succeed or, in some cases, changed their lives. The winning principles of human-centered recruiting are important for Talent and HR practitioners, but they are actually important for us all. We are all recruiters.

In this interactive resource, you'll find thought-provoking concepts around how activating your network can create limitless opportunities for yourself and others, along with science, logic, stories, and timeless methods behind aligning great people with great opportunities.

Name: When I Grow Up
Description:
I believe that all babies are born with a predestined purpose. A purpose to impact
the world so that the Earth grows to greater heights. But in order to have an impact on the world, we should grow ourselves first. We should learn that pain, sacrifices, knowledge, understanding, love and inner peace are all needed for us to grow and become the best versions of ourselves.

What is your predestined purpose? It is all the dreams that you imagined when you were asked as a child what you wanted to be when you grew up. Why as a child? That’s because you didn’t know what doubt and limitations were. And now that you remember those dreams, it’s time for you to grow into becoming your
dream version of yourself.

Darius Tabane penned the title during the 2020 nationwide lockdown and the book was launched at The Capital Empire Hotel in Sandton the following year. The book can currently be found in Exclusive Books, Bargain books, Takealot, Amazon, Clarke's Bookshops and Eveybody's Books.

The book presents different perspectives and insights to enable the reader to explore ways to reshape their reality, and not wait until they have actually grown up to live the life they want.

Name: Marcus B. Hunter
Description:
Reclaiming Hope: A Journey Through Grief

Are you searching for solace after losing someone dear to you? "Reclaiming Hope" is here to guide you through the darkness of grief and help you rediscover hope.

Written by a pastor and hospice chaplain who has personally journeyed through profound loss, this book is more than just a memoir—it's a roadmap for those navigating the challenging path of grief. The author shares his own experience of losing both parents unexpectedly at a tender age, offering a heartfelt and relatable perspective.

Drawing from clinical training and pastoral expertise, "Reclaiming Hope" extends a hand of understanding and practical wisdom to those feeling lost in their sorrow. Each page is infused with warmth, personal stories, and professional insights, providing comfort and a sense of hope to caregivers and grieving individuals alike.

Through this book, readers will find an invitation to acknowledge and honor their grief as a natural part of the human experience. The author’s words offer healing and encouragement, reminding us that while life encompasses both good and bad times, those who persevere and never give up ultimately win the battle of life.

Join this transformative journey to reclaim hope and find light even in the darkest times.

Name: ProbateReads.com
Description:
ProbateReads.com is a new resource created to help readers, families, attorneys, fiduciaries and authors discover the best books related to probate, guardianship, estate planning and elder law. Our goal is simple. We want to connect people who need trustworthy guidance with the authors and creators who provide it.

Many families turn to books when they are handling an estate or caring for a loved one. Professionals also rely on books to stay current in their field. Authors work hard to create helpful content, but it can be difficult for readers to know where to start. ProbateBooks.com brings these groups together in one easy place.

We feature books across a wide range of topics including probate, guardianship, conservatorship, estate planning, special needs planning, elder care, power of attorney, fiduciary duties and related subjects. Our listings include summaries, author information and links to purchase or learn more. When available, full reviews are posted on our primary platform at ProbateCourtBond.com, with additional book details on ProbateReads.com.

We also welcome submissions from authors, publishers, attorneys and educators. If you know of a helpful book, workbook, podcast, guide, or new release, we invite you to share it with us. Our goal is to build a growing library of resources that support families and professionals who work in these important areas.

ProbateReads.com is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice. Instead, we serve as a neutral educational hub where readers can explore trusted materials and authors can reach new audiences. As the site grows, we will continue adding book reviews, interviews, podcasts, author features, and helpful links to related services.

If you write, teach, practice or simply want to learn more about probate and estate planning topics, we welcome you to connect with us and share your work.

Name: Bloch Editores
Description:
Grupo Bloch, also known as Empresas Bloch, was a Brazilian media conglomerate, founded by Ukrainian businessman Adolpho Bloch's family after their arrival in Rio de Janeiro in 1922, when they created Joseph Bloch & Filhos company. The company, which published pamphlets and other printed material, also started to print magazines. Thus, in 1953, the company launched Manchete magazine. With its successful launch, the publishing division of Bloch Editores was established.
The group owned various Brazilian communication companies. At the end of the 1970s, the company funded the Rádio Manchete, a medium wave (AM) radio station as well as Manchete FM radio network.[ With the success of the radio stations, at the beginning of the 1980s the group entered the Brazilian government's competition to be one of the dealers of two television networks formed from the hunting concessions of the networks Tupi and Excelsior. Grupo Bloch was one of the bid winners, along with Grupo Silvio Santos, and immediately launched the Sistema Brasileiro de Televisão (SBT). The Rede Manchete, owned by Grupo Bloch, had already been launched in 1983.
With millions in debt, the company had to sell Rede Manchete in 1992, but after the new owner, Hamilton Lucas de Oliveira, did not comply with the contract of sale, Grupo Bloch regained ownership of the network. Still accumulating debts, the company had to get rid of the television business in 1999, selling concessions for five owned-and-operated stations of Manchete to the Grupo TeleTV owners, Amilcare Dallevo Jr. and Marcelo de Carvalho, who launched a new network called RedeTV! to replace Rede Manchete.
Bloch Editores filed for bankruptcy in 1999, and was closed in 2000. The company portfolio of magazines was sold to Manchete Editora, founded in 2002 by Mark Dvoskin. The radio stations of the Manchete FM network were sold to Grupo Sol Panamby.

Name: adhoc Buchhandel
Description:
Willkommen bei adhoc Buchhandlung in Wil SG! Unsere Geschichte begann vor über zwei Jahrzehnten mit der Vision von Natal Müller und Eliane Egli Müller, die ihre Liebe zu Büchern in die Tat umsetzen wollten. Inspiriert vom lateinischen Wort "adhoc" (aus dem Augenblick heraus entstanden) haben sie unsere Buchhandlung ins Leben gerufen.

Unsere Mission ist es, Ihnen in jedem Lebensmoment das perfekte Buch zu bieten. Mit über 11 Millionen Büchern, E-Books, Lehrmitteln und Hörbüchern zu fairen Preisen haben wir für jeden Lesegeschmack etwas im Angebot. Unsere Buchhandlung erstreckt sich über zwei Etagen und bietet gemütliche Sitzgelegenheiten sowie eigene Parkplätze, um sich bei uns wie zu Hause zu fühlen.

Unsere Dienstleistungen sind darauf ausgerichtet, Ihr Leseerlebnis zu bereichern. Wir bieten internationale Buchbestellungen, schnelle Lieferungen am selben Tag, bequeme Online-Bestellungen mit Abholung im Laden und seltene Buchfunde. Zusätzlich belohnen wir Sie mit unserem Bonuspunktesystem und spezialisierten Kundenprogrammen.

Was uns einzigartig macht? Unsere "Nacht in der Buchhandlung". Genießen Sie eine kostenlose Übernachtung, stöbern Sie, lesen Sie und tauchen Sie in Geschichten ein – ein inspirierendes Erlebnis. Wir bieten auch eine "Fair-Preis-Garantie", um transparente Buchpreise ohne künstliche Preiserhöhungen sicherzustellen.

Heute gehören wir zu den größten Online-Buchhändlern der Schweiz und setzen uns für Nachhaltigkeit ein. Unser Versand erfolgt größtenteils regional und an Großkunden in der Schweiz mit wiederverwendbaren Versandboxen, um die Umweltbelastung zu minimieren.

Besuchen Sie adhoc Buchhandlung in Wil SG, erleben Sie unsere einzigartige Atmosphäre und lassen Sie sich von uns beraten. Wir freuen uns darauf, Ihnen bei der Suche nach Ihrem nächsten Lieblingsbuch zu helfen.

Ihre Buchhändlerfamilie Müller Egli und das gesamte Team  #adhocBuchhandlung #Bücher #Lesen #WilSG #Buchliebhaber #Nachhaltigkeit #OnlineBuchhandel

Name: El Sabio Books
Description:
El Sabio Books Inc. is an independent antiquarian book and manuscript company dedicated to preserving and sharing the world’s cultural and intellectual heritage. Based in Calgary, Alberta, and family-operated, we specialize in acquiring, cataloging, and curating rare books, manuscripts, and historical documents that span centuries and disciplines. Our growing collection includes more than 3,000 antiquarian works and over 1,000 manuscripts and ephemera, covering subjects from philosophy, theology, law, and science to political revolutions and cultural milestones.

At El Sabio Books, we believe that books are more than artifacts — they are vessels of knowledge, creativity, and human experience. Our mission is to connect collectors, institutions, and scholars with works that shaped the past and continue to inform the present. Each piece in our inventory is carefully assessed for authenticity, condition, and historical significance. We provide detailed cataloging, provenance research, and market valuation, ensuring that every acquisition is treated with respect and presented with integrity.

Our clients include private collectors, libraries, universities, and auction houses. Whether supplying institutions with rare holdings, guiding new collectors through their first acquisitions, or advising on investment-grade purchases, we aim to deliver exceptional service and expertise.

Beyond commerce, El Sabio Books is committed to cultural preservation. By safeguarding fragile works and placing them in the hands of those who value their significance, we ensure that voices of the past remain accessible to future generations. From incunabula and revolutionary tracts to annotated legal texts and unique manuscripts, our inventory reflects a deep appreciation for history and the printed word.

El Sabio Books Inc. is more than a business; it is a passion for discovery, scholarship, and stewardship.

Name: Untu Notes and Stationery
Description:
At Untu Notes + Stationery, we believe creativity deserves a home.
We design and craft African-made notebooks, planners, and stationery that inspire mindful living, intentional work, and creative expression.

Born in Kenya, Untu is more than a stationery brand, it’s a movement to make creativity feel local, soulful, and sustainable. Every product we make is thoughtfully designed, produced in small batches, and rooted in African stories. We celebrate culture not as a trend, but as a lifestyle, one built around writing, reflection, and collaboration.

Our name “Untu” comes from Ubuntu “I am because we are.” That spirit runs through everything we do.
We collaborate with local artisans, illustrators, writers, and photographers to co-create products that reflect the diversity, beauty, and rhythm of life in East Africa. Each notebook, journal, or calendar is a piece of art made by hand, built with intention, and designed to hold your ideas, plans, and dreams.

We stand for mindful creativity, slowing down, writing things by hand, and reconnecting with our thoughts in a world that moves too fast.
Whether you’re a writer, designer, student, traveler, creator, dreamer, Leader. Untu is your space to write, draw, plan, and be.

Our creative collaborations include:
The Untu Kenya Calendar Project - celebrating Kenya through the eyes of local photographers and storytellers.

Creative Collaborations - every quarter we partner with artists to design limited-edition stationery inspired by African culture, nature, and daily life.

Everything we make is crafted with intention, made in Kenya, and guided by the belief that design can inspire change in how we see ourselves, our continent, and our potential.
Untu Notes + Stationery is for those who love design with meaning, creativity with purpose, and craftsmanship with heart.

Write. Plan. Reflect. Be.
African-made stationery for mindful living.
Collaboration over competition.

#UntuNotes #MadeInKenya

Name: Libraria Cair Paravel
Description:
Cair Paravel este libraria copiilor, un spatiu creativ si imaginativ ca o fereastra prin care povestea se revarsa printre noi. Cair Paravel este castelul celor patru tronuri din tinutul Narniei, unde patru copii obisnuiti, odata intrati in poveste, se confrunta cu o sumedenie de incercari si sunt innobilati, devenind ei insisi regi si regine, aparatori ai binelui, frumosului si adevarului. 
 
Cair Paravel se bazeaza pe o selectie riguroasa a cartilor – atat in ce priveste valoarea textului literar, cat si calitatea ilustratiilor – a obiectelor si a imaginilor expuse, a produselor si a genului de activitati organizate (programe educative si ateliere de creatie artistica, ateliere muzicale, evenimente culturale, lansari de carte, intalniri cu creatori de poveste si ilustratori, programe educative pentru scoli si gradinite.
 
Cair Paravel este o cafenea literara pentru parinti,un loc de intalnire si socializare intr-o atmosfera de tihna si armonie. Incurajam relatiile si comuniunea in familie si intre prieteni, de aceea in timp ce petreceti un timp relaxant si reconfortant impreuna, copiii se cufunda in lumea jocului in Sifonier.
Incurajam aprecierea pentru literatura si o conectare mai profunda si de durata intre copii, parinti si lumea cartilor, a artei si a ideilor.

While our long-term goal is to provide job training and mentorship opportunities for foster youth, we're currently focused on broad community support as we grow towards opening our brick-and-mortar location.

Join us in turning pages and making a difference—because at Beyond the Covers, every story matters, and every purchase has purpose.

The Gut Healing Kitchen is your guide to restoring balance, repairing your digestive system, and embracing a healthier way of living. Karina Lamarr provides Science-backed insights into gut health and why it matters, along with the truth about modern diets and easy-to-follow meal plans. Name: Love Games: Decoding Modern Romance
Description:
In an age where digital interactions often overshadow face-to-face connections, the landscape of love and relationships has transformed dramatically. Swipe left, swipe right—these simple gestures have come to define how many embark on their romantic journeys. Gone are the days of handwritten letters and shy glances across crowded rooms. Today, algorithms dictate compatibility, and social media curation paints a sometimes-unrealistic picture of love.

This insightful book explores the nuances of online dating, the challenges of mixed signals, and the ever-shifting landscape of modern relationships. Through engaging anecdotes, thought-provoking analysis, and insightful research, "Love Games" equips you with the tools to decode the modern dating scene and find genuine connection in a world obsessed with digital love.

Name: Print Ain't Dead
Description:
Print Ain't Dead is a Black, queer and volunteer-led organization in Boston that distributes, publishes and builds around literary ephemera produced by people of color. 

We focus on materials we consider radical, revolutionary or liberatory in nature. We believe in the power of press as a tool for the people and draw inspiration from a long lineage of Black owned publishers and book spaces that were hotspots for movement and coalition building.

We run several programs that help us achieve our mission, including the Black Feminist Study Hall, Combahee's Library and These Magic Hands. We sell low cost books at our reading room in Hyde Park and publish zines and collections either by or that highlight  people of color. We work with other organizations to co-curate projects that are catalysts for change in thought and coalition building.

Name: The Womb Bookstore
Description:
The Womb Bookstore is a woman owned, independent bookstore in Kapa’a, Kauai. We specialize in books that make you think. You'll find philosophy, nature, metaphysics and psychology books as well as fiction novels and children's books in our store. We also sell crystals, sage, tarot cards, and art among other things. We have a little bit of everything, even locally made items like our jewelry, dream catchers, stickers, and beach towels.

We believe that humans were created to learn. As babies we come into the world as a completely blank slate. We learn everything from how to talk, how to walk, etc. That education continues for the rest of our lives, we learn how to write, drive a car, do calculus. Somewhere along the line, we get busy, life happens, and we forget about the joys of learning. The Womb Bookstore gives patrons the opportunity to return to that sense of curiosity and read about topics like, love, astrology, nature and philosophy. 

The unique thing about this store is that it is a book store, but also an art gallery, a yoga studio, a classroom, a meeting space, etc. Patrons have the opportunity to shop AND exchange knowledge. The books in the store rotate quite often; in as little as two weeks the bookstore can have very different books. Books are a mixture of classics, new releases and random books that look interesting to read. Products and events rotate often as well. There is always something new happening at The Womb Bookstore!

Name: Auteure sur la résilience
Description:
As an entrepreneur, I, Christiane, faced a life-altering challenge back in 2019 when I received a stage 3C cancer diagnosis. Despite the sudden upheaval and the looming COVID-19 pandemic, I refused to let illness dictate my life's course. Instead, I harnessed it as a powerful source of motivation.

Throughout my journey, I didn't abandon my consulting firm or my clients in the midst of economic uncertainty. In fact, I persisted in helping them navigate these turbulent times. Today, my goal is to share my story and provide invaluable insights to fellow entrepreneurs grappling with similar trials. I want to show them how adversity can be transformed into a wellspring of strength, allowing them to surmount even the most formidable challenges.

Within the pages of this book, you'll discover answers to pressing questions that many entrepreneur-patients like myself face:

How long will my absence be?
Must I alter my business strategies?
Can someone temporarily step in for me?
Will I require additional financial resources?
Do I need to adapt my service offerings during my absence?
Where can I find the support I need?

My book is a practical guide that empowers you to construct a comprehensive action plan, one that harmonizes the essential aspects of a patient-entrepreneur's life: managing your business, nurturing your personal life, and navigating the rigors of treatment. This action plan is structured around four crucial resources:

Time
Financial resources
Human support
Therapeutic resources

I've designed this approach to be highly adaptable, demonstrating that it's entirely feasible to lead a life as both a patient-entrepreneur and a resilient fighter.

Name: Eliza Jane Harrington
Description:
Eliza Jane Harrington is an avid surfer, skier, water sports enthusiast and volunteer lifeguard. She is a resident of Costa Rica. Prior to relocating to beautiful Costa Rica, the author worked in a myriad of professions to include the defense industry, outdoor recreation industry and emergency medicine. In her spare time, she tutors local school children in English. She rides a motorcycle and spends her days writing and waiting for the tide to be good for surfing.


About The Book

WAVES OF REDEMPTION

Waves of Redemption follows the life of characters who are in the process of having to reinvent themselves out of necessity. The Olas Verdes resort provides the opportunity for people to relocate and renew their life’s possibility. It is even possible for some of the characters to experience romance that they were unable to find in their prior busy lives. Waves of Redemption is a modern era romance with a twist of government conspiracy. Intrigue in the tropical paradise of beautiful Costa Rica.

Name: Brownness Is Relative
Description:
We are Regina Maria Creations, a small Singaporean start up and founders of Brownness Is Relative. As a couple of Singaporean women, through our personal experiences we have created 'Independently Brown' which complements in building a more positive and inclusive community promoting self-love and self appreciation among women.

'Independently Brown' a 68-page pull out colouring book for all ages. This book contains beautiful illustrations depicting Brown women in various settings, celebrating their skin and celebrating their achievements in our society.

The book also contains motivational and inspirational messages to uplift women letting them know that they too achieve independent greatness.

Those who have bought our books have mentioned that they resonate greatly with the images, and some even said they wished they had this book in their time. We've also had a couple of young girls say that they are glad to have a set of skin toned colour pencils and have coloured the picture they associate with the best.

Through these books we would like to be a catalyst for change to show that Brown women around the world can be who they want to be, despite our differences.

We want to give the gift of independence to all women of different shades of colour!

Name: Comparatly
Description:
Comparatly is an American online product comparison platform created to redefine how people make purchasing decisions in the digital age. Built on a foundation of truth, independence, and transparency, Comparatly exists to help consumers cut through the noise of advertising, fake reviews, and biased rankings that dominate today’s e-commerce landscape.

At its core, Comparatly is not just another comparison site — it’s an independent, data-driven platform that evaluates products across all major categories: from beauty and personal care to electronics, home and garden equipment, construction tools, and lifestyle goods. Each product featured is analyzed through a rigorous methodology that considers price, efficiency, performance, sustainability, delivery reliability, and authentic customer feedback gathered from trusted review platforms like Trustpilot and Verified Reviews.

What makes Comparatly unique is its commitment to neutrality. The platform does not sell rankings or accept paid placements. Every list, guide, and product review is built on objective data and editorial integrity, ensuring that users receive honest recommendations based on evidence, not influence.

Beyond comparison, Comparatly aims to educate and empower consumers. It provides clear, in-depth insights into how products are rated, where data comes from, and why a certain product stands out. This approach transforms the act of online shopping into an informed, transparent process, restoring trust between buyers and the digital marketplace.

Comparatly’s team is made up of analysts, editors, and data scientists who share a common vision: to make online commerce more ethical, reliable, and consumer-centered. Using a combination of artificial intelligence and human expertise, they continuously update rankings to reflect the real-time state of the market, so users always see the most accurate and current information available.

Description:
This ebook explores the historical challenges faced by the Black community regarding their diets and health. It provides information and resources on adopting a vegan lifestyle as a means to overcome these challenges, aiming to inspire and empower individuals to make healthier food choices while honoring our cultural heritage by offering plant-based alternatives to traditional Black dishes. The ebook emphasizes the importance of proper nutrition for overall health, supporting bodily functions, the immune system, energy levels, cognitive function, and disease prevention. Ultimately, adopting a plant-based diet can reduce the risk of chronic diseases, enhance quality of life, and promote longevity.

Categories:

1. Health & Nutrition

2. Cultural Heritage 3. African-American History

4. Vegan Lifestyle 5. Diet & Nutrition

Sin is a sickness of the soul—and The Kolinahr Discipline is the cure. Based on the powerful acronym R.E.P.E.N.T, this six-step process helps you recognize, confront, and overcome sin with biblical wisdom and practical action. Blending scripture with unique sci-fi analogies, this book offers a fresh, effective approach to true repentance and lasting spiritual growth. Take the first step toward freedom today.

Name: Abby Lynn
Description:
Charlamay & Friends: The Easter Egg Hunt by Abby lynn

This spring, the adventurous corgi-beagle mix Charlamay is going to discover more than she anticipated! Excitement is in the air in Elizabethtown. Not far off is the largest Easter egg hunt the community has ever witnessed. There are treasures hidden around every corner, baskets to fill, and candies to gather. But when one very important egg vanishes for no apparent reason, Charlamay and her friends realize this isn't just any ordinary hunt. Join Charlamay, her bouncy brother Jack, and Harry the peanut-loving squirrel as they come together with some unexpected new pals to find surprises, follow hints, and preserve the day's charm. You'll guess, you'll laugh, and you may even wish you could be part of the hunt. Because the greatest adventures are frequently the ones that find you, not the ones you plan. Prepare yourself for an endearing, tail-wagging, candy-filled mystery that honors camaraderie, cooperation, and the small surprises that make holidays special.

Bu səbəbdən sizə yalnız ən yaxşı və keyfiyyətli nəşrləri təqdim etməkdən qürur duyuruq.

SizinKitab-da biz təkcə populyar kitabları deyil, həm də müəlliflərin, mütəfəkkirlərin, elm adamlarının və filosofların əsərlərini təqdim edirik. Beləliklə, bütün janrlarda oxucuların ixtiyarına verəcək seçmə təqdim edirik. Kitablarımızın məzmunu oxucularımıza onları maraqlandıran mövzuları öyrənməyə, ideyalarını inkişaf etdirməyə və dünyaya fərqli rakursdan baxmağa kömək etmək üçün diqqətlə seçilir. 
SizinKitab olaraq biz, müəlliflər və elm dünyasındakı son yeniliklər, eləcə də kitablar haqqında məlumat veririk. Sosial media hesablarımız və bloqumuz vasitəsilə oxucularımıza dünyanı daha yaxşı başa düşmək, araşdırmaq və öyrənmək üçün məqalələr və yazılar təqdim edirik.

Bizimlə siz biliklərinizi genişləndirə, sizi maraqlandıran mövzuları kəşf edə və dünyanı daha yaxşı başa düşə bilərsiniz. Kitab oxumaq düşüncənizi inkişaf etdirmək və yeni ideyalar əldə etmək üçün əla vasitədir. SizinKitab olaraq bu yolu sizin üçün açmaq və oxumağı daha zövqlü etmək üçün çalışırıq.

Name: George MacPherson
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of George MacPherson—visionary author, innovator, and the creative force behind The Hive Series. Through his work, George explores bold ideas that challenge the status quo and inspire a future built on abundance, sustainability, and human potential.

George is dedicated to transforming the way society functions, focusing on revolutionary concepts like Total Enclosure Systems (TES)—self-sustaining cities powered by renewable energy, advanced technology, and shared resources. His flagship vision, The Honeycomb, offers a practical solution to global challenges, paving the way for a world free from scarcity and inequality.

As George says, “I’m going to become a billionaire by building an abundant world where money no longer needs to exist. JOIN ME! If I’m wrong, you’ll have prosperity for generations. If I’m right, so will everyone else.” This ambitious philosophy drives his work, inspiring others to rethink what’s possible.

The Hive Series combines thrilling storytelling with thought-provoking ideas, inviting readers to explore the ethical, technological, and societal dilemmas of creating a better world. George’s novels are more than fiction—they’re a call to action, igniting imagination and challenging conventional thinking.

This page is your hub for updates, insights, and opportunities to engage with George’s vision. Whether you’re a reader, innovator, or changemaker, you’re invited to join the movement to create a world where abundance and opportunity are within everyone’s reach.

Follow this page for news, events, and the latest releases as we work together to build a better tomorrow.

Name: Kim Popovich
Description:
1. Why Men Fear Bitches
This bold, witty manifesto takes on outdated gender norms and reclaims the word “bitch” as a symbol of strength. Through humor, real talk, and sharp insights, it encourages women to own their ambition unapologetically and challenges men to confront their discomfort with powerful women.

2. The World Needs More Bitches
Forget “nice.” This empowering guide shows that boldness, not people-pleasing, drives change. It urges women to stop shrinking themselves, speak up, and lead with authenticity—because the world needs more roar, not silence.

3. The Am-bitch-ous Woman
A sassy, smart playbook for ambitious women who are “too much” in all the right ways. It blends personal stories and real-life advice to help women succeed without losing compassion, proving you can be kind, bold, and unstoppable.

4. How Bitches Can Have Riches
This high-energy financial guide shows ambitious women how to build wealth with confidence and flair. Covering budgeting, investing, and side hustles, it proves you can be powerful, stylish, and financially fierce—all at once.

5. Be Kind, But Take No Shit
A soulful guide to healing, boundaries, and strength. Combining spiritual wisdom with real-life recovery tools, it teaches that kindness isn’t weakness, and boundaries are essential to self-respect and authentic living.

Name: Librar Lazi
Description:
Librar Lazi, este un proiect început din necesitatea (fiți atenți, fiți atenți) unui librar de a se realiza ca librar. Necesitatea de a librări constant și calitativ, studiat, amplu, cu pasiune și plăcere (da-da, cu plăcere). 
Din această „afacere” au de câștigat tot oamenii care vor urmări paginile rețelelor sociale ale proiectului, tot oamenii care vor să fie la zi cu Literatura, Scrisul, Noutățile editoriale și Viața Culturală din Republica Moldova (în pincipal) sau Limba Română (dacă să generalizăm). 

Prin urmare proiectul a primit și înfățișarea unui site – www.la-zi.md – care e și o platformă de vânzare de carte și un blog în care urmează să se citească multe, dar multe articole bune. 

Pe site se găsește atât literatură pentru copii, multă și bună, cât și Ficțiune, Poezie, Lifestyle și Business, Artă și Albume voluminoase pentru adulți. Pe lângă recomandările pe care reușește să le înșiruie Librarul Lazi, vă puteți alege și după modelul atracției după copertă cărțile.

Achiziția, așa cum am și început acest text, tinde să susțină Librarul Lazi (în numele lui Victor Fală), să devină un librar independent la un moment dat, care să se ocupe doar de studiul și chitibușarea literaturii și, evident, oferirea acestei bogății de informații tuturor, în toate formatele posibile și pe toate platformele existente, astfel ca cititul să ajungă la cât mai multă lume, să se realizeze de plăcere.

Follow Siggie as her curiosity takes her on an exciting sensory journey where she explores new foods and embraces the delightful adventures of mealtime. With every whiff, crunch, and touch, Siggie learns that trying unfamiliar things can be incredibly enjoyable if you use all of your senses! When things feel tricky, Siggie uses her problem-solving and critical thinking skills to figure out the best solution. Open your eyes, ears, nose, and mind as your follow Siggie on a fun, food-filled voyage; you might just find your new favorite treat along the way!

This book encourages children to use sensory awareness while exploring new, healthy foods. It promotes curiosity and helps kids develop essential skills like problem-solving, open-mindedness, critical thinking, and the confidence to try new things -- making mealtime an exciting and educational adventure!

Since our inception on September 1, 2021, ConnecTheShelf has embarked on a dynamic journey within the realm of retail and ecommerce, focusing on books and printed media. As a burgeoning startup, our dedication to reshaping the industry landscape has been evident through our progressive growth and commitment to fostering talent.

Services: Specializing in offering a curated selection of books and printed media through our online platform, we've strived to create a seamless shopping experience for book enthusiasts worldwide.

Growth Trajectory: Despite being a young company, our growth has been remarkable. From generating an initial revenue of 5 lakhs in our inaugural financial year to achieving 14 lakhs in the subsequent year, our trajectory underscores our commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

Cultivating Talent: AtConnecTheShelf, we not only prioritize business growth but also invest in the next generation of professionals. We've onboarded and provided enriching experiences to several interns, offering them hands-on exposure and valuable insights into the retail and ecommerce landscape.

Differentiation: What sets us apart is our dedication to constant learning and adaptation. Embracing the evolving nature of retail and ecommerce, we've stayed agile, leveraging new technologies and strategies to enhance our customer's experience.

As a startup deeply rooted in passion for literature and innovation, ConnecTheShelf is committed to pushing boundaries, driving growth, and fostering a culture of continuous learning. We're excited about the future, aiming to expand our offerings, reach more audiences, and remain at the forefront of innovation within the retail and ecommerce sphere.

Name: Librería Hipérbole
Description:
Hace más de treinta años que en Librería Hipérbole (Jacinta y Julián al frente) iniciamos un modesto diálogo entre el libro y los habitantes de este rincón del Mediterráneo que es Ibiza.

Con el tiempo,trabajo duro y mucha ilusión, el grupo de amigos que formamos Hipérbole, ha convertido la librería en un refugio cultural donde protegemos una relación que abarca infinidad de sensaciones, sentimientos y recuerdos que tienen como protagonista al mundo del libro.

Fruto de ese esfuerzo hemos organizado eventos como “Ibiza, Puerto Mediterráneo de libro (2008), que reunió a poetas y novelistas, entre ellos el premio Cervantes Juan Gelmán. También acogimos el encuentro de editores independientes (2012) y recibimos reconocimientos como la mención especial a Librería cultural que concede anualmente Cegal (2015).

En Hipérbole queremos mantenernos vivos día a día. Por ello, en nuestro espacio se realizan a menudo presentaciones de libros, talleres, coloquios y jornadas literarias. Del mismo modo que intentamos dar a conocer las obras de escritores locales.

Name: Ive Already Made It Book & Workbook
Description:
As a young girl, I was thrown in the foster care and adoption system. I endured abandonment, homelessness, physical and mental abuse. I had no one to help me figure out how to sift through the hurt and pain and make sense of what I was going through. 

I cried out… and Jehovah listened to me. He took my hand and walked me through this thing called life. He showed me it didn’t matter if I didn’t have anyone by my side because He was all I needed. All my suffering and pain was going to pay off if I would just hang on. He showed me not only how to become free mentally, but how to come into my own as a woman, how to bless others, and how to succeed and be the best version of myself. 

At the age of 24, I opened the doors of Dream of Kalamazoo Hair Salon, I own I Dream of Buying LLC., I am a licensed cosmetology instructor, licensed cosmetologist, and an author. God never left me. He was my example! My Father showed me the way, and I followed. I survived it all, and now I’m going to tell my story!

Xem tin tức bongdaso trực tiếp hôm nay, nhận định trước trận, kết quả trực tuyến, lịch thi đấu, bảng xếp hạng tất cả các giải bóng đá,.. mới nhất tại bongdaso.online website bóng đá số 1 khu vực.

Bóng đá số là gì?
Bóng đá số là trang chia sẻ cho bạn những tin tức mới nhất về bóng đá một cách chính xác và đầy đủ trong 24h. Ngoài ra, bạn còn nhận được rất nhiều thông tin quan trọng bên lề liên quan đến môn thể thao bóng đá, giúp người hâm mộ tiếp cận tin tức mới nhất.

Tại Việt Nam, bong da là môn the thao được rất nhiều người yêu thích nhất. Khi mà số lượng người hâm mộ cực kỳ lớn với những lúa tuổi khác nhau. Chính vì thế, nhu cầu xem tin tức bóng đá trực tuyến khá là cao. Chính vì lý do này mà trang web bongdaso đã được ra đời. Chúng tôi luôn huy vọng, sẽ trở thành trang web bóng đá trực tuyến hàng đầu tại Việt Nam.

Còn nếu bạn? Là một người đam mê bóng đá thì chắc chắn sẽ không thể bỏ qua các tin tức mới nhất của các giải đấu hàng đầu thế giới. Tại đây, bóng đá số sẽ cập nhật liên tục các tin tức bóng đá 24h mới nhất hôm nay. Vậy ở Vệt Nam từ khóa nào được tim kiếm nhiều nhất? theo thống kê từ Google, người hâm mộ Việt Nam thường hay sử dụng các từ như “bóng đá“, “bóng đá 24h“, hoặc là “bongdaso“ cũng có thể là “bóng đá số“.

Name: Stareworthy Custom Children's Books
Description:
Our beautifully designed Photo Story Books bring your family memories to life for your child by featuring your very own photographs as the illustrations! 

All Stareworthy books are thoughtfully designed to enhance early childhood development and preserve treasured memories.  The driving mission of Stareworthy is to provide people with products that are inherently good. There is purity and wholesomeness behind every Stareworthy story. Wholesomeness, our desires for good, our love for the important people in our lives, is our common ground. It is what unites us all in heart and spirit- and it is what we seek to capture in every Stareworthy product.

Based on research from leading figures in childhood development, we've designed stories to enhance the brain-growth of your child based on their age range and encourage milestone achievement in a way that is wholesome, engaging, and fun!

With the rise of handheld technological devices and social media, parents worry about the effects of overstimulation on their young children. The camera rolls on our mobile devices contain thousands of images, and despite the convenience of carrying our memories with us in the palms of our hands, research suggests a detrimental impact of smartphone usage on the young, developing minds of children. We believe in using the modern accessibility of our favorite photos to create products that promote in children a strong sense-of-self and healthy connections with caregivers; leading to well-rounded, resilient kids.

A mix between a high quality photo album and a charming story book, a Stareworthy book brings your family memories to life in a way that is both engaging and fun! They are one-of-a-kind and not mass produced. Specially crafted by a professional writer and graphic designer just for you and your family, your story will always be uniquely yours!

Visit us at Grimsby Books and embark on a journey of imagination, knowledge, and connection. Discover the magic that unfolds within the pages of our books and become part of our close-knit literary community. Together, let's celebrate the written word and foster a lifelong love for reading.

Name: Scale Selling Book
Description:
"Scale Selling: The Digital Marketing Survival Guide" by Spencer R. Williams

In today's world, where digital marketing is not just a choice but a necessity, "Scale Selling: The Digital Marketing Survival Guide" emerges as a beacon for aspiring and established entrepreneurs alike. Authored by Spencer R. Williams, Canada's #1 Online Business Coach, this book is an essential read for anyone looking to navigate the sophisticated world of online business.

About Scale Selling:
"The Digital Marketing Survival Guide" is more than just a guide; it is a masterclass in digital marketing and online entrepreneurship. Drawing from years of practical experience, Spencer Williams articulates proven strategies for professionals to venture into or expand their digital marketing expertise. The book is a treasure trove of insights, offering readers a roadmap to not only increase sales and traffic but also to fundamentally grow their business with the online world.

Key Highlights:
- In-depth exploration of digital marketing strategies.
- Real-world examples of successful online business models.
- Step-by-step guidance on creating and scaling an online business.

About the Author:
Spencer R. Williams is a name synonymous with online business success. As the author of "The Online Millionaire" and the brain behind Williams Wealth Creation, Spencer has not only scaled his own business ventures but has also been instrumental in the success of numerous others. 

His program, "The Six Step Success System" has revolutionized how individuals approach life, online entrepreneurship, sales, personal finance, and digital marketing.

At the heart of his work is Scale Selling, a full-service digital marketing agency dedicated to empowering individuals and businesses to thrive online. Through this agency, Spencer extends his expertise, helping people like you achieve the life and success that business can offer.

A review speaks volumes: " With a serious commitment to accuracy and truth, Daddyjohn and Me take readers on a guided tour back in time. The author vividly recounts personal, professional, and private experiences that range from the interestingly informative to intriguingly shocking. Daddyjohn and Me is saturated with things and stuff that great movies are made of. Kudos to John Henry Hill, III, for sharing his truth and shining this much-needed light. You'll laugh, you'll frown, but you won't be able to put the book down." - Paulette Walker Johnson, EdD, Professor Emeritus, Virginia State University, Radio Host, Author  (Click on 'Learn More' - above)

Our selection is curated with care, ensuring that you will find the best books that cater to your interests.

Whether you're looking for a book that will make you laugh, cry, or swoon with romantic feelings, we have it all. Our drama section features stories that will keep you on the edge of your seat, while our romance selection will make your heart skip a beat. Our fantasy and science fiction books will take you to other worlds and introduce you to extraordinary creatures, while our spiritual fiction novels will inspire and uplift your soul.

If you're a history buff, you'll love our historical fiction section, which offers a glimpse into the past through captivating and well-researched stories. But that's not all, we have many other genres waiting for you to discover and explore.

At Imagine To Dream Bookstore LLC, we believe that reading is an essential part of personal growth and we are dedicated to providing our customers with the best reading experience possible. So, come and visit us today, and let us help you find your next favorite book!

Imagine To Dream Bookstore: Where Your World Transforms, One Page at a Time.

Name: The Art of Solitude
Description:
When was the last time you were truly alone?

In a world where we are more connected than ever, why do so many of us feel disconnected - from ourselves, from others, and from the life we truly want to lead? The Art of Solitude offers a refreshing answer to this modern dilemma. Rather than seeing solitude as isolation or loneliness, this book redefines it as a powerful tool for unlocking your potential and living a richer, more meaningful life.

Through the lens of the Human 4Cs - Calm, Clarity, Creativity, and Connection - you’ll learn how embracing solitude can transform your emotional well-being, fuel your creativity, and deepen your relationships. Illustrated with personal stories, cultural insights, and practical exercises, The Art of Solitude takes you on a journey that is both deeply personal and universally relatable.

Whether you're seeking more peace in your busy life, looking to rekindle your creative spark, or longing to connect more authentically with yourself and others, this book provides the roadmap. You’ll discover how solitude can help you navigate life’s challenges with confidence and grace - whether you're single, in a relationship, or somewhere in between.

This isn’t just another self-help book - it’s your guide to turning moments of quiet into lasting fulfilment. Step into the transformative world of solitude, and watch as it reshapes your mind, enriches your relationships, and leads you to a life that feels truly yours.

Are you ready to embrace the silence and find the strength within?

Name: Our Hearts' Desire: How Our Stories Reveal the Thing We Want Most
Description:
We cannot escape our deepest desire.

The human heart longs for many things―love, joy, peace, abundance―but it longs for one thing even more: to experience a love story with God. In his debut work, Bob Wheatley reveals that all our favorite stories provide whispers of this truth.

Why do we tell the same stories again and again? What is it about the hero, the villain, and the love interest in distress that continues to draw us in? Are these just storytelling tactics, or do they teach us something more? The truth is, our stories reveal the cry of our heart―we want to live out this story ourselves.

With references to The Dark Knight, The Hunger Games, Friends, and dozens of other stories from popular culture, Wheatley walks readers through the three acts of storytelling, revealing how every story we tell is a reflection of God’s ultimate love story.

Name: DisciplinePlanner
Description:
Bij DisciplinePlanner geloven we dat discipline de sleutel is tot persoonlijke en zakelijke groei. Onze wetenschappelijk onderbouwde planner is ontworpen voor iedereen die een stapje dichter bij zijn doelen wil komen en zijn maximale potentieel wil benutten, ongeacht geslacht. 

Onze missie is om mensen te inspireren en te ondersteunen bij hun reis van persoonlijke groei en zelfontwikkeling. We geloven in de kracht van doelgerichte planning en bieden een hoogwaardige tool die individuen helpt hun leven bewust vorm te geven en hun doelen te bereiken. Het vereist toewijding, doorzettingsvermogen en een sterke focus. Daarom hebben we de DisciplinePlanner ontwikkeld. Het is een krachtig hulpmiddel dat je helpt om strakke structuur aan te brengen in je dagelijkse routine en je te concentreren op wat echt belangrijk is: je doel.

In de huidige maatschappij zien we helaas een gebrek aan discipline. Veel mensen worden afgeleid door constante prikkels en verliezen daardoor hun focus. Bij DisciplinePlanner willen we dit veranderen. We willen mensen inspireren en motiveren om discipline te omarmen als een waardevolle eigenschap die hen zal helpen hun doelen te bereiken.

Of je nu je persoonlijke leven wilt verbeteren of je zakelijke ambities wilt realiseren, DisciplinePlanner is er voor jou! Onze planner biedt een gestructureerde aanpak om je tijd effectief te beheren, je prioriteiten te stellen, doelen te stellen, te reflecteren, je voortgang bij te houden en progressie te maken. Met de DisciplinePlanner ben je in staat om je dagelijkse gewoonten te versterken en jezelf te ontwikkelen op zowel persoonlijk als professioneel vlak.

Ontdek hoe DisciplinePlanner jou kan helpen bij het behalen van je volledige potentieel & Join The Disciplined Family!

Name: Bridgebuilders Book
Description:
In the face of ever more complex societal challenges, this book provides an essential new model for transforming the public sector and getting things done.

Pandemics. Climate change. Refugee resettlement. Global supply chains. We face a new generation of complex problems that stretch across the public and private sectors and flow over organizational boundaries. To meet the moment, we need a fresh, new approach that strengthens institutions and government agencies by breaking free from organizational boxes and rigid, top-down leadership.

As William D. Eggers, executive director of Deloitte's Center for Government Insights, and Donald F. Kettl, public management scholar, show in this indispensable book, we need a government of bridgebuilders who collaborate with partners—inside and outside government—to get the job done. These leaders manage horizontally instead of vertically; they see their role as connectors; and they identify which players have the assets needed to solve the unprecedented problems at hand.

Each chapter examines one of the ten core principles of bridgebuilding and features practical tips and dynamic cases of how effective leaders have put each bridgebuilding principle to work. The book also includes a special section that helps government leaders create a hundred-day bridgebuilding plan.

Throughout, Eggers and Kettl tell fascinating and instructive stories about some of today's bridgebuilders—federal, state, and local government leaders who transcend boundaries, partner across sectors, and get stuff done.

Trusted and effective government has never been more important than today. Bridgebuilders provides a new model that current government decision makers—as well as young leaders who aspire to public service—can learn from and apply right now to transform government and restore public trust.

Name: Forget the Customer, See the Person
Description: There has been a trend over the past few years to focus on big data and to believe it can give us everything we could possibly need to know about our customers. We propose that while big data has its place and value, it’s only one piece of the puzzle. The way the world works nowadays makes it really hard and expensive to stand out as a product-centric company. Another key piece of the puzzle is the human side of data and business. Focusing on individual customers and what they care about, desire and value is a much better approach, known as customer-centricity. In this book, we explain the difference between these two approaches and advocate for the balance between them. We tell stories, give examples, and provide simple overviews on how to gather all the right information to ensure that businesses can create meaningful connections with their customers.

Name: The Power of With
Description:
The Power of With is a concise and entertaining handbook for what business managers need to know to sign new clients, serve clients, and lead people. This book features Scripture, but it’s not only for Believers. Whether you’re a senior executive or an aspiring entrepreneur, and whatever your faith tradition, the unique blend of 21st-century best practices and 1st-century wisdom will make you better—as a leader and a person.

The most meaningful human activity is helping other people. The Power of With is invaluable to anyone who wants to do well while doing good. In that spirit, 100% of the proceeds from this book are being donated to nonprofits that feed people, house people, educate people, heal people, empower people, and create jobs for people.

“Mark McIntyre piles on the wisdom, then coats it in wit. Read this terrific book and pass it on.”—Chris Erskine, former LA Times columnist whose column “Man of the House” appeared in 600 newspapers nationwide

“In this practical, actionable, and insightful book, Mark embodies his own advice: Keep it simple. Filled with engaging stories, memorable anecdotes, and lessons centered on strong character, this book is a valuable resource for busy leaders looking to elevate their performance while integrating their faith.”—Megan Katerjian, CEO of Door of Hope

“The Power of With is a fun, fast read. It’s full of business best practices and spiritual guidance.”—Kat Landa, nonprofit consultant and certified spiritual director

Mark D. McIntyre is principal and cofounder of Merchant McIntyre Associates, the leading federal government relations agency serving nonprofit institutions and organizations. After decades navigating the business world and the storied halls of the federal government—including as a presidential speechwriter—Mark shares what he’s learned from building agencies while striving to follow Jesus of Nazareth.

Eli the duck and the Jewish holidays allows our children to reconnect with the Jewish tradition, strengthen their identity and interduces them to the Jewish holidays in a way that is different than the usual, a way that emphasizes values of fun, family, and love.

Are we the only ones that are right? That can’t be true. And so consequently, ‘A Separate God: Journal of an Amish Girl.’”

Name: Laurel Tree Books

Since 2021 we have provided thousands of quality secondhand books a new home with a keen reader. 

Secondhand books are so much more than just an old story written by an author. The jacket, cover and pages contain their own histories from their previous owners. And who can deny the smell of old books is nothing but comforting. Whether it’s vintage, antique, rare, or a recent printing, secondhand books give people the chance to fill their homes with stories that are imaginary, informative or personal. 

And secondhand bookstores provide an opportunity to browse and stumble across something you would never be able to find elsewhere. Our ultimate goal is to absolutely delight someone with a book. 

At Laurel Tree Books, we aim to heavily curate a selection of books to appeal to the curious, the weirdos, the intrigued and the obsessed. We try to stock a wide variety of genres, but we do have a focus on science fiction and non-fiction (at the moment).

Please feel free to get in touch if you have any questions about our stock or if you would like to request a book. Additionally, if you have books that you would like to offload, we are happy to take them off your hands if you live in the Fife or Edinburgh area! Email us at enquiries@laureltreebooks.co.uk.

Name: The Entrepreneur’s Gambit
Description: Meet a Man named Lou, whose life represents the highs and lows of entrepreneurship in 20th-century America. Born to immigrant parents during the Great Depression, Lou grew up in economic hardship and widespread poverty. Follow his career from the 1950’s through the turn of the century and beyond. Discover the incentives and challenges that entrepreneurs face in their pursuit of financial success and professional freedom. With time, he realized and understood the importance of having a trusted support group — family, employees, and advisors — which helped him in his hard times. Another perspective worthy of reflection is the gender role model which was ingrained within the generation representing the time frame of Lou’s career. This book doesn’t just celebrate entrepreneurial successes or criticize failures. Instead, it offers a balanced view through fictional stories that highlight the unpredictable nature of business ventures. You’ll see that success isn’t guaranteed — it takes hard work, sacrifice, luck, and the ability to seize opportunities. About the Author: (Joe Rosetti LLC) encourages readers to learn from Lou’s experiences; whether you want to start your own business or are curious about the entrepreneurial spirit, Lou’s story is a rich and thought-provoking read, full of twists and turns that reflect the real-life challenges of building a business. A Book by Joe Rosetti LLC is an amazing read for those who are seeking help in balancing their practical and business lives. Grab your book now; it is available on Amazon.

Description:
கொக்குவில் வளர்மதி முன்னேற்றக் கழக வெளியீடான உள்ளம் சஞ்சிகை மீண்டும் 2021 ன் இறுதிப்பகுதியில் வெளிக் கொணரப்பட்டது. இன்று இளைய படைப்பாளிகள் உட்பட ஏராளமான படைப்பாளிகள், ஓவியர்களுக்கு களம் அமைத்துக் கொடுக்கும் சஞ்சிகையாக வளர்ந்து நிற்பதுடன் கணிசமான அளவு வாசக்ரகளையும் தன்னிடத்தே கொண்டுள்ளது. 
வாசகப் பரப்பை விரிவுபடுத்தும் நோக்கிலும் அதனை ஊக்குவிக்கும் விதத்தில் இலங்கையில் மாணவர்கள், சிறைக்கைதிகள், சீர்திருத்தப்பள்ளிகள் மற்றும் புனர்வாழ்வு மையங்களுக்கு இலவசமாக உள்ளம் சஞ்சிகையினை விநியோகிப்பதற்கு முடிவெடுத்துள்ளோம். எமது இந்த முயற்சிக்கு ஆதரவளிக்கும் வளர்மதி மற்றும் உள்ளம் சஞ்சிகையின் ஆர்வலர்கள்,அபிமானிகள் மற்றும் அங்கத்தவர்களை நன்றியுடன் நினைவு கூருகின்றோம். 
வளர்மதியின் 60 வது ஆண்டில் உள்ளம் சஞ்சிகை பதினைந்து துறைகளில் போட்டிகளை நடாத்தி 1.2 மில்லியனுக்கு மேற்பட்ட பொற்கிழிப் பரிசுகளை வழங்கவுள்ளது. இப் பரிசுகள் யாவும் எதிர்வரும் ஏப்ரல் மாதம் 9ம் திகதி வவுனியா நகரசபை மண்டபத்தில் நடைபெறும் விழாவில் வைத்து வழங்கப்படும்.

Name: Santa's Prayer
Description:
Saint Nicholas, more commonly known as Santa Claus, lived in Greece in the 3rd century.  He was a devout follower of Jesus Christ.  He loved to give gifts, but his greatest desire was for children of all ages to receive the greatest gift ever given… the gift of God’s Son, Jesus.  
This is a story about a Christmas Eve conversation Santa has with the father of two children while delivering presents. Santa confesses his sadness about people missing the true meaning of Christmas, and his desire to share the hope of that message.  

Author Curt Campbell is a lover of “story” in all forms… songs, cinema and the written and spoken word.  He believes story is what connects us to each other and ultimately to the One who created us, for we are all a part of His story.  Curt’s passion is to help others understand and more greatly value their role in The Story.

He resides in Nashville, TN, with the love of his life, Emily.
